snvindel.gene_function: MUTYH基因属于抑癌基因。编码蛋白是介导碱基切除修复的DNA糖基化酶，可以修复由于氧化损伤导致的鸟嘌呤与腺嘌呤错配的DNA损伤，防止碱基GC转化为TA（PMID: 23507534, PMID: 1495996, PMID: 17581577）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 310th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Glutamine to Histidine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.3135(1570/5008), 0.2967(28865/97294), 0.2601(377531/1451368), 0.2696(41017/152134), 0.4569(56071/122724) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=41767) is Benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). The COSMIC database records 32 times of amino acid change at the MUTYH protein position 310, of which the mutant Q310H is recorded 30 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.3135(1570/5008), 0.2967(28865/97294), 0.29(67377/232316), 0.2562(8021/31308), 0.4571(49642/108604) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively; the COSMIC database records 32 times of amino acid change at the MUTYH protein position 310, of which the mutant Q310H is recorded 30 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.3135（1570/5008）、0.2967（28865/97294）、0.2601（377531/1451368）、0.2696（41017/152134）、0.4569（56071/122724）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=41767）的胚系突变分类为Benign（可靠度为两颗星）。COSMIC数据库记录32次MUTYH蛋白第310位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型H记录30次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第310位氨基酸由谷氨酰胺突变为组氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: MUTYH, mutY DNA glycosylase, encodes for an enzyme that is part of the base excision pathway, which is responsible for excising an adenine that was inserted into the DNA to pair with the oxidation base lesion, 8-Oxoguanine (PMID: 21235684). Germline MUTYH mutations have been linked to an increased risk for colorectal cancer development (PMID: 29147111), and have been associated with an elevated risk for breast cancer (PMID: 21952991).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.8137（4075/5008）、0.7138（86635/121374）、0.7177（180276/251202）、0.6838（21410/31310）、0.9879（76507/77444）；Cancer Hotspots、COSMIC数据库无记录。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: GEN1，Flap内切酶GEN homolog 1，是一种结构特异性内切酶，能够在有丝分裂和减数分裂的双链DNA修复事件中处理Holliday连接体（PMID: 28327556）。在乳腺癌中已经发现蛋白截断的GEN1体细胞变异，但对BRCA1/2阴性的家族性乳腺癌易感性没有明显的贡献（PMID: 20512659）。

The COSMIC database records 11 times of amino acid change at the GEN1 protein position 92, of which the mutant S92T is recorded 11 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: GEN1, Flap endonuclease GEN homolog 1, is a structure-specific endonuclease capable of processing Holliday junctions during double-stranded DNA repair events within mitosis and meiosis (PMID: 28327556). Somatic truncating GEN1 variants have been identified in breast cancers, but do not contribute significantly to BRCA1/2-negative familial breast cancer susceptibility (PMID: 20512659).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: GEN1基因耐受单倍剂量不足，该变异为蛋白长度改变的变异。该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.05931（297/5008）、0.08765（10602/120964）、0.08671（21729/250588）、0.08181（2567/31376）、0.08726（6754/77400）；COSMIC数据库记录10次GEN1蛋白第839位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型K839Efs*2记录1次。
snvindel.gene_function: GEN1，Flap内切酶GEN homolog 1，是一种结构特异性内切酶，能够在有丝分裂和减数分裂的双链DNA修复事件中处理Holliday连接体（PMID: 28327556）。在乳腺癌中已经发现蛋白截断的GEN1体细胞变异，但对BRCA1/2阴性的家族性乳腺癌易感性没有明显的贡献（PMID: 20512659）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a frameshift mutation, which induces a substitution of Lysine with Glutamic acid at position 839 and causes termination of the protein at codon 840.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The GEN1 gene either has no/little evidence for haploinsufficiency or dosage sensitivity unlikely, this variant causes a change in protein length. The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.05931(297/5008), 0.08765(10602/120964), 0.1031(150653/1460940), 0.07697(11714/152180), 0.08825(10783/122186) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=1168946) is Benign in germline classification (review status: two stars).

snvindel.gene_function_en: GEN1, Flap endonuclease GEN homolog 1, is a structure-specific endonuclease capable of processing Holliday junctions during double-stranded DNA repair events within mitosis and meiosis (PMID: 28327556). snvindel.gene_function: ALK基因属于原癌基因，其编码蛋白隶属于胰岛素受体家族中的受体酪氨酸激酶（RTK），为跨膜蛋白。该蛋白在大脑的发育过程中起着重要的作用，其对神经系统中特定神经元产生影响。ALK基因的融合、突变或扩增现象广泛存在于多种肿瘤中，例如间变性大细胞淋巴瘤、神经母细胞瘤、结直肠癌及肺癌等（PMID: 8122112, PMID: 18593892, PMID: 19737969）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 1461st amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Isoleucine to Valine.

The COSMIC database records 33 times of amino acid change at the ALK protein position 1461, of which the mutant I1461V is recorded 32 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: ALK, anaplastic lymphoma kinase, is a receptor in the insulin receptor superfamily and is a key regulator of neuronal development (PMID: 21502284) and also promotes cell proliferation through activation of MAPK and PI3K signaling pathways (PMID: 27573755). Alk activating mutations, rearrangements, and fusions have been identified in various cancers (PMID: 22649787), including EML4-ALK in non-small cell lung cancer (PMID: 30108712, PMID: 30194140), and a number of mutations confer resistance in the context of Alk fusions (PMID: 25749034, PMID: 21948233).

The COSMIC database records 12 times of amino acid change at the EPCAM protein position 115, of which the mutant M115T is recorded 12 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第115位氨基酸由蛋氨酸突变为苏氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: EPCAM, epithelial cell adhesion molecule, is a glycoprotein that mediates cell-cell adhesion and regulates cell proliferation and differentiation (PMID: 23618806). Germline deletion of EPCAM is associated with Lynch syndrome and overexpression of EPCAM has been associated with poor prognosis in a variety of cancers (PMID: 23891921, PMID: 23618806).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在gnomADe、gnomADg数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.1835（267218/1455968）、0.1888（28722/152158）；CKB数据库报道为unknown，OncoKB数据库报道为Inconclusive，COSMIC数据库记录24次MSH6蛋白第39位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型G39E记录23次。基于该变异的HCI致病性先验概率认为该变异为neutral。
snvindel.gene_function: MSH6基因属于抑癌基因，其编码蛋白能与MSH2蛋白形成异二聚体，共同构成MutSα错配修复（MMR）复合物。该复合物能够识别DNA复制过程中产生的错配碱基对与双核苷酸插入-缺失环，从而启动错配修复通路（PMID: 8816473）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 39th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Glycine to Glutamic acid.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.1835(267218/1455968), 0.1888(28722/152158) in the gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=36581) is Benign in germline classification (review status: three stars). Based on HCI prior probability for pathogenicity, the variant is considered neural.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.1835(267218/1455968), 0.1888(28722/152158) in the gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively; this variant is reported as unknown in the CKB database, and Inconclusive in the OncoKB database, the COSMIC database records 24 times of amino acid change at the MSH6 protein position 39, of which the mutant G39E is recorded 23 times. Based on HCI prior probability for pathogenicity, the variant is considered neural.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在gnomADe、gnomADg数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.1835（267218/1455968）、0.1888（28722/152158）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=36581）的胚系突变分类为Benign（可靠度为三颗星）。基于该变异的HCI致病性先验概率认为该变异为neutral。

snvindel.gene_function_en: MSH6, mutS homolog 6, binds with Msh2 to form the MutS-alpha complex, which functions in initiation of the DNA mismatch repair system (PMID: 23391514) and is associated with microsatellite instability (MSI) (PMID: 30121009). Mutations in MSH6 are associated with susceptibility to colon cancer and endometrial cancer (PMID: 20028993), and germline MSH6 mutations are associated with Lynch (Hereditary Nonpolyposis Colorectal Cancer) syndrome (PMID: 15528792).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.3662（1834/5008）、0.3783（45875/121256）、0.3739（93956/251276）、0.384（12025/31318）、0.3596（27839/77426）；CKB数据库报道为no effect - predicted，COSMIC数据库记录7次BARD1蛋白第507位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型M记录7次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: BARD1基因属于抑癌基因，编码蛋白是一种衔接蛋白，与BRCA1蛋白（PMID: 11573085）复合时，可作为E3连接酶发挥作用。BARD1-BRCA1复合物参与多种细胞过程，包括DNA修复、基因表达、复制叉维护和染色质调节的各个阶段（PMID: 27239795）。BARD1蛋白与BRCA1蛋白相互作用，结合新复制DNA上的DNA损伤，并将泛素分子添加到组蛋白H2A上的赖氨酸残基（PMID: 30804502）；BARD1-BRCA1复合物介导DNA损伤的切除，驱逐拮抗性修复蛋白53BP1，并将几种DNA反应蛋白募集到受损部位，包括RAD51蛋白（PMID: 27239795）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 507th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Valine to Methionine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.3662(1834/5008), 0.3783(45875/121256), 0.3664(535041/1460184), 0.3713(56462/152068), 0.3591(43995/122512) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=140757) is Benign/Likely benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). The COSMIC database records 20 times of amino acid change at the BARD1 protein position 507, of which the mutant V507M is recorded 20 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.3662(1834/5008), 0.3783(45875/121256), 0.3739(93956/251276), 0.384(12025/31318), 0.3597(39061/108582) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively; this variant is reported as no effect - predicted  in the CKB database, the COSMIC database records 20 times of amino acid change at the BARD1 protein position 507, of which the mutant V507M is recorded 20 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: BARD1, BRCA1 associated RING domain 1, forms a heterodimer with Brca1, which functions as an E3 ubiquitin ligase and mediator of DNA repair through homology-directed repair (HDR) (PMID: 8944023, PMID: 30925164) and centrosome regulation (PMID: 29858377). Germline mutations in BARD1 are associated with increased susceptibility to breast and ovarian cancers (PMID: 21344236), somatic mutations are highest in colon and endometrial cancers (PMID: 27283171) and BARD1 has also been implicated in neuroblastoma (PMID: 32047556).

snvindel.gene_function: FANCD2，Fanconi贫血互补组D2，由Fanconi贫血核心复合物单泛素化激活，并在DNA修复中起作用（PMID: 24905007, PMID: 27145721）。 FANCD2胚系突变与范可尼贫血有关，后者涉及多种癌症的易感性（PMID: 24025411, PMID: 12509764）。

Germline FANCD2 mutations are associated with Fanconi anemia, which involves predisposition to various cancers (PMID: 24025411, PMID: 12509764).

evi_sum.evi_interpretation: FANCD2基因的双等位基因致病性或疑似致病性胚系变异（纯合或复合杂合）与范可尼贫血（常染色体隐性遗传）明确相关（ClinGen）。范可尼贫血表型包括骨髓衰竭、急性髓系白血病、骨髓增生异常综合征，以及其他表型及临床特征：身材矮小、皮肤色素沉着(皮肤色素沉着或色素沉着斑)、骨骼异常(拇指、手臂)、多种其他先天性异常、头/颈/外阴/阴道鳞状细胞癌、肝脏肿瘤、染色体脆性增加（NCCN Myelodysplastic Syndromes Version 2.2025）。
evi_sum.evi_interpretation_en: Biallelic pathogenic or likely pathogenic germline variants (homozygous or compound heterozygous) in the FANCD2 gene are definitively associated with Fanconi anemia (autosomal recessive inheritance) (ClinGen). Clinical features are consistent with other FA subtypes: bone marrow failure, acute myeloid leukemia, myelodysplastic syndrome, short stature, pigmentary anomalies, skeletal abnormalities, congenital malformations, squamous cell carcinoma of the head/neck/vulva/vagina, liver tumors, and chromosomal fragility (NCCN Myelodysplastic Syndromes, Version 2.2025).

snvindel.gene_function: VHL基因属于抑癌基因，编码蛋白是E3泛素蛋白连接酶复合物的一部分，可促进HIF-α和细胞生长和血管生成所需的其他蛋白质靶标的降解（PMID: 24583008, PMID: 30194449），并维护基因组稳定性（PMID: 31747945）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为3'UTR区突变。
snvindel.gene_function_en: VHL, von Hippel-Lindau tumor suppressor, is part of an E3 ubiquitin protein ligase complex, which promotes degradation of HIF-alpha and other protein targets required for cellular growth and angiogenesis (PMID: 24583008, PMID: 30194449), and plays a role in genomic stability (PMID: 31747945).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.6847（3429/5008）、0.6325（76030/120198）、0.6086（883010/1450814）、0.6479（98450/151958）、0.5939（72865/122680）；COSMIC数据库记录16次XPC蛋白第939位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型Q939K记录15次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: XPC（XPC 复合物亚基，DNA 损伤识别和修复因子）是一种蛋白质编码基因。与XPC相关的疾病包括色素性皮肤病-C组。其相关途径包括蛋白质代谢和转录偶联核苷酸切除修复（TC-NER）。在缺乏DNA修复的情况下，XPC复合物还充当转录辅激活剂：XPC与DNA结合转录因子 E2F1 在特定启动子上相互作用，招募KAT2A和组蛋白乙酰转移酶复合物（HAT）（PMID: 29973595, PMID: 31527837）。KAT2A 的招募会特异性地促进组蛋白变体H2A.Z.1/H2A.Z的乙酰化，但不会促进H2A.Z.2/H2A.V的乙酰化，从而促进靶基因的表达（PMID: 31527837）。

The COSMIC database records 16 times of amino acid change at the XPC protein position 939, of which the mutant Q939K is recorded 15 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: XPC (XPC Complex Subunit, DNA Damage Recognition And Repair Factor) is a Protein Coding gene. Diseases associated with XPC include Xeroderma Pigmentosum, Complementation Group C and Xeroderma Pigmentosum, Variant Type. Among its related pathways are Metabolism of proteins and Transcription-Coupled Nucleotide Excision Repair (TC-NER). In absence of DNA repair, the XPC complex also acts as a transcription coactivator: XPC interacts with the DNA-binding transcription factor E2F1 at a subset of promoters to recruit KAT2A and histone acetyltransferase complexes (HAT) (PubMed:29973595, PubMed:31527837). KAT2A recruitment specifically promotes acetylation of histone variant H2A.Z.1/H2A.Z, but not H2A.Z.2/H2A.V, thereby promoting expression of target genes (PMID: 31527837).

snvindel.gene_function: ATR基因属于抑癌基因，其编码蛋白是一种丝氨酸/苏氨酸激酶，该蛋白与ATM蛋白同属一个激酶家族，在DNA损伤应答中扮演关键角色。ATR蛋白响应DNA损伤信号与单链DNA暴露信号，进而激活细胞周期检查点与DNA修复通路（PMID: 12791985, PMID: 20818375, PMID: 17157788）。此外，它也参与调控端粒维持、DNA复制起始及减数分裂等细胞周期核心过程（PMID: 17687332, PMID: 15220931, PMID: 23824539）。

The COSMIC database records 59 times of amino acid change at the ATR protein position 211, of which the mutant M211T is recorded 58 times. snvindel.gene_function_en: ATR, ataxia telangiectasia and Rad3 related, is involved in regulation of the DNA damage response and mediation of cell-cycle checkpoints (PMID: 25512053). Inhibition of Atr selectively sensitizes cancerous cells to radiation and chemotherapy (PMID: 23583268).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.4189（2098/5008）、0.4308（52300/121392）、0.4423（111166/251352）、0.3717（11641/31320）、0.62（48012/77440）；COSMIC数据库记录7次ABRAXAS1蛋白第348位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型T记录7次。
snvindel.gene_function: FAM175A基因（又名ABRAXAS1基因）编码一种DNA修复蛋白ABRAXAS1，ABRAXAS1通过直接与BRCA1结合，调节用于DNA损伤检查点调控和DNA损伤修复的DNA双链断裂处BRCA1蛋白募集过程。ABRAXAS1-BRCA1复合物在肿瘤抑制中起重要作用。在多种人类癌症中，包括子宫内膜癌、结肠癌、肺癌、肝癌、肾癌和白血病中观察到FAM175A（ABRAXAS1）基因拷贝丢失和体细胞突变，其中在子宫内膜癌的突变率最高（2.5%）（PMID: 25066119）。研究发现一个新型的FAM175A（ABRAXAS1）胚系突变会损害BRCA1依赖性DNA修复功能，并导致家族性乳腺癌易感性的升高（PMID: 22357538）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 348th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Alanine to Threonine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.4189(2098/5008), 0.4308(52300/121392), 0.417(609371/1461480), 0.3591(54603/152048), 0.6215(76316/122784) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=1166234) is Benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). The COSMIC database records 11 times of amino acid change at the ABRAXAS1 protein position 348, of which the mutant A348T is recorded 11 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.4189(2098/5008), 0.4308(52300/121392), 0.4423(111166/251352), 0.3717(11641/31320), 0.6203(67369/108600) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively; the COSMIC database records 11 times of amino acid change at the ABRAXAS1 protein position 348, of which the mutant A348T is recorded 11 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.4189（2098/5008）、0.4308（52300/121392）、0.417（609371/1461480）、0.3591（54603/152048）、0.6215（76316/122784）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=1166234）的胚系突变分类为Benign（可靠度为两颗星）。COSMIC数据库记录11次ABRAXAS1蛋白第348位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型A348T记录11次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第348位氨基酸由丙氨酸突变为苏氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: ABRAXAS1 (FAM175A), abraxas 1, BRCA1 A complex subunit, is a BRCA1-binding protein that plays a role in DNA repair and regulation of the G2/M cell cycle phase checkpoint (PMID: 17525340, PMID: 29497033). ABRAXAS1 variants have been identified in several breast cancer pedigrees (PMID: 22357538) and contribute to a small proportion of unexplained hereditary breast cancer cases (PMID: 27270457).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.9022（4518/5008）、0.8731（105841/121224）、0.8735（219003/250730）、0.8708（27302/31352）、1.0（77406/77408）；COSMIC数据库记录48次MSH3蛋白第949位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型R记录47次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: MSH3基因属于抑癌基因，编码蛋白质MutS同源物3（MSH3），是细菌MutS蛋白的人类同源物，在DNA的错配修复（MMR）途径中起作用。MSH3与MSH2结合形成异二聚体MutS-β，对于识别和修复错配的碱基对非常重要，形成DNA-MutS复合物，向MMR机制的其他组件发出信号以切除异常的核苷酸（PMID: 9679053）。MSH3的缺失或功能缺失突变可导致MMR缺陷，与MSH6的缺失共同导致突变率的增加和肿瘤发生的增加（PMID: 10706084）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 949th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Glutamine to Arginine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.9022(4518/5008), 0.8731(105841/121224), 0.8533(1246501/1460792), 0.8672(131897/152096), 0.9999(122677/122692) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=821892) is Benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). The COSMIC database records 56 times of amino acid change at the MSH3 protein position 949, of which the mutant Q949R is recorded 55 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.9022(4518/5008), 0.8731(105841/121224), 0.8735(219003/250730), 0.8708(27302/31352), 1.0(108568/108570) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively; the COSMIC database records 56 times of amino acid change at the MSH3 protein position 949, of which the mutant Q949R is recorded 55 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.9022（4518/5008）、0.8731（105841/121224）、0.8533（1246501/1460792）、0.8672（131897/152096）、0.9999（122677/122692）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=821892）的胚系突变分类为Benign（可靠度为两颗星）。COSMIC数据库记录56次MSH3蛋白第949位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型Q949R记录55次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。

snvindel.gene_function_en: MSH3, mutS homolog 3, encodes for one of the DNA mismatch repair proteins, which forms a stable heterodimer with MSH2 in order to recognize and repair mismatched DNA (PMID: 8942985). Somatic MSH3 mutations have been identified in colon, lung, and breast cancers, and oral squamous cell carcinoma while MSH3 polymorphisms, which may be associated with increased risk, have been observed in ovarian and prostate cancers, and non-small cell lung carcinoma (PMID: 25966119).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.7202（3607/5008）、0.7305（88636/121342）、0.7294（183208/251172）、0.7089（22213/31334）、0.7522（58249/77442）；COSMIC数据库记录38次MSH3蛋白第1045位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型T记录36次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。

snvindel.gene_function_en: MSH3, mutS homolog 3, encodes for one of the DNA mismatch repair proteins, which forms a stable heterodimer with MSH2 in order to recognize and repair mismatched DNA (PMID: 8942985). Somatic MSH3 mutations have been identified in colon, lung, and breast cancers, and oral squamous cell carcinoma while MSH3 polymorphisms, which may be associated with increased risk, have been observed in ovarian and prostate cancers, and non-small cell lung carcinoma (PMID: 25966119).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.8654（4334/5008）、0.7981（96526/120944）、0.7948（199083/250474）、0.8094（25384/31360）、0.9065（98422/108578）；CKB数据库报道为unknown，COSMIC数据库记录68次APC蛋白第1822位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型D记录68次。基于剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: APC基因属于抑癌基因，其编码蛋白是Wnt/β-catenin信号通路的负调控因子（PMID: 8259518, PMID: 8259519），通过调控细胞内β-catenin的水平来发挥其核心抑癌功能（PMID: 11978510）。APC蛋白是降解复合体中的关键组分，该复合体能够介导细胞质中β-catenin的泛素化降解（PMID: 10984057）。当APC基因功能失活时，Wnt/β-catenin信号通路会发生异常激活，导致细胞增殖并最终驱动肿瘤进展（PMID: 8259511）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 1822nd amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Valine to Aspartic acid.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.8654(4334/5008), 0.7981(96526/120944), 0.7767(1133202/1459012), 0.8201(124789/152160) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively, with no record in the iJGVD database; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=21030) is Benign in germline classification (review status: three stars). Based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing; the loss-of-function mechanism is the main pathogenic mechanism of the APC gene, and this variant is located outside the first 15-amino acids of the β-catenin binding domain(p.1021-p.1035).
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.8654(4334/5008), 0.7981(96526/120944), 0.7948(199083/250474), 0.8094(25384/31360), 0.9065(98422/108578) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively; this variant is reported as unknown  in the CKB database, the COSMIC database records 71 times of amino acid change at the APC protein position 1822, of which the mutant V1822D is recorded 71 times. Based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.8654（4334/5008）、0.7981（96526/120944）、0.7767（1133202/1459012）、0.8201（124789/152160），iJGVD数据库无记录；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=21030）的胚系突变分类为Benign（可靠度为三颗星）。基于剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接；功能丧失机制（Loss of function, LOF）是APC基因的主要致病机制，该变异位于β连环蛋白结合结构域前15个氨基酸（p.1021-p.1035）范围之外。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第1822位氨基酸由缬氨酸突变为天冬氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: APC, adenomatous polyposis coli, is a tumor suppressor (PMID: 30562755) and multi-domain protein regulating numerous cellular functions through interaction with beta-catenin and subsequent inhibition of Wnt signalling (PMID: 10959075). APC germline mutations are associated with familial adenomatous polyposis (PMID: 30562755) and somatic mutations with colon, endometrial, NSCLC, and breast cancers (PMID: 27283171).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在gnomADe、gnomADg数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.8487（1238139/1458898）、0.8653（131629/152116）；OncoKB数据库报道为Likely Neutral，COSMIC数据库记录17次PMS2蛋白第541位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型K541E记录17次。
snvindel.gene_function: PMS2基因属于抑癌基因，编码一种核酸内切酶。编码蛋白在错配修复（MMR）途径中起重要作用，并与微卫星不稳定性（MSI）（PMID: 30121009）和基因组稳定性（PMID: 31747945）有关。

snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.8487(1238139/1458898), 0.8653(131629/152116) in the gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=135065) is Benign in germline classification (review status: two stars).
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.8487(1238139/1458898), 0.8653(131629/152116) in the gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively; this variant is reported as Likely Neutral in the OncoKB database, the COSMIC database records 17 times of amino acid change at the PMS2 protein position 541, of which the mutant K541E is recorded 17 times.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在gnomADe、gnomADg数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.8487（1238139/1458898）、0.8653（131629/152116）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=135065）的胚系突变分类为Benign（可靠度为两颗星）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第541位氨基酸由赖氨酸突变为谷氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: PMS2, PMS1 homolog 2, mismatch repair system component, interacts with MLH1 to form the MutL-alpha complex, which functions in DNA mismatch repair (PMID: 18157157, PMID: 24333356) and is associated with microsatellite instability (MSI) (PMID: 30121009) and genomic stability (PMID: 31747945). Germline PMS2 mutations are associated with Lynch syndrome (PMID: 15528792), mutations in PMS2 are associated with susceptibility to colon cancer and endometrial cancer (PMID: 24978665), and overexpression has been reported in prostate cancer (PMID: 27803051).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在gnomADe、gnomADg数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.402（587541/1461700）、0.372（56519/151938）；OncoKB数据库报道为Likely Neutral，COSMIC数据库记录20次PMS2蛋白第470位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型P470S记录19次。基于该变异的MAPP/PP2致病性先验概率认为该变异为neutral。
snvindel.gene_function: PMS2基因属于抑癌基因，编码一种核酸内切酶。编码蛋白在错配修复（MMR）途径中起重要作用，并与微卫星不稳定性（MSI）（PMID: 30121009）和基因组稳定性（PMID: 31747945）有关。

snvindel.gene_function_en: PMS2, PMS1 homolog 2, mismatch repair system component, interacts with MLH1 to form the MutL-alpha complex, which functions in DNA mismatch repair (PMID: 18157157, PMID: 24333356) and is associated with microsatellite instability (MSI) (PMID: 30121009) and genomic stability (PMID: 31747945). Germline PMS2 mutations are associated with Lynch syndrome (PMID: 15528792), mutations in PMS2 are associated with susceptibility to colon cancer and endometrial cancer (PMID: 24978665), and overexpression has been reported in prostate cancer (PMID: 27803051).

snvindel.gene_function: WRN基因属于抑癌基因，编码DNA解旋酶亚基，编码蛋白具有DNA解旋酶和核酸外切酶活性，因此在维持基因组稳定性方面发挥着重要作用（PMID: 27902925）。

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.0001997（1/5008）、0.00001729（2/115702）、0.000007531（11/1460592），gnomADg数据库EAS人群等位基因频率为0.0003899（2/5130），iJGVD数据库无记录；Cancer Hotspots、COSMIC数据库无记录。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为intermediate，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: RET基因属于原癌基因，是一种受体酪氨酸激酶，可以激活MAPK和PI3K/AKT途径并调节细胞生长和分化（PMID: 24561444, PMID: 29134959）。在癌症中，RET基因可以通过点突变或与多种易位基因重排而被激活，从而构成活性的癌蛋白（PMID: 24561444）。RET基因的遗传突变导致MEN2A综合征（如甲状腺髓样癌、嗜铬细胞瘤、甲状旁腺功能亢进）、MEN2B（如甲状腺髓样癌、嗜铬细胞瘤、多发性肠粘膜神经瘤、星形胶质细胞瘤和Marfan综合征）和家族性甲状腺髓样癌（FMTC）（PMID: 15322516）；RET基因的体细胞突变包括点突变和RET基因座的基因组重排，导致逆转或易位；目前，已经在各种癌症中被确定，包括乳头状甲状腺癌、肺腺癌和慢性粒细胞白血病（CMML）。此外，野生型RET的异常表达或激活与胰腺癌的肿瘤侵袭和转移以及乳腺癌的内分泌治疗耐药相关（PMID: 24561444）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 278th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Threonine to Alanine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.0001997(1/5008), 0.00001729(2/115702), 0.000007531(11/1460592) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe databases, 0.0003899(2/5130) in the EAS population of the gnomADg database, respectively, with no record in the iJGVD database; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=220205) is Uncertain significance in germline classification (review status: two stars). Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered intermediate, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.0001997(1/5008), 0.00001729(2/115702), 0.000007531(11/1460592) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe databases, 0.0003899(2/5130) in the EAS population of the gnomADg database, respectively, with no record in the iJGVD database; the Cancer Hotspots database and the COSMIC database have no record for this variant. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered intermediate, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.0001997（1/5008）、0.00001729（2/115702）、0.000007531（11/1460592），gnomADg数据库EAS人群等位基因频率为0.0003899（2/5130），iJGVD数据库无记录；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=220205）的胚系突变分类为Uncertain significance（可靠度为两颗星）。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为intermediate，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第278位氨基酸由苏氨酸突变为丙氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: RET, ret proto-oncogene, is a receptor tyrosine kinase that activates MAPK and PI3K/AKT pathways and regulates cell growth and differentiation (PMID: 24561444, PMID: 29134959). RET germline mutations result in MEN2 syndromes and familial medullary thyroid carcinoma (PMID: 20930041, PMID: 24561444) and somatic RET activating mutations, fusions, and Ret overexpression has been associated with a variety of cancers including lung (PMID: 30257958) and colorectal (PMID: 30210625, PMID: 30038711).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.4998（2503/5008）、0.3558（43160/121298）、0.3575（89783/251114）、0.4123（12922/31340）、0.7155（55412/77444）；COSMIC数据库记录3次BMPR1A蛋白第2位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型T记录2次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: BMPR1A基因属于抑癌基因，编码IA型骨形态发生蛋白受体，是一种丝氨酸/苏氨酸激酶受体，可激活SMAD信号通路，从而调节参与生长发育的基因转录（PMID: 16246179）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 2nd amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Proline to Threonine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.4998(2503/5008), 0.3558(43160/121298), 0.2859(411907/1440912), 0.4044(61474/152024), 0.7142(87708/122806) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=41782) is Benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.4998(2503/5008), 0.3558(43160/121298), 0.3575(89783/251114), 0.4123(12922/31340), 0.715(77650/108604) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively; the COSMIC database records 9 times of amino acid change at the BMPR1A protein position 2, of which the mutant P2T is recorded 7 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.4998（2503/5008）、0.3558（43160/121298）、0.2859（411907/1440912）、0.4044（61474/152024）、0.7142（87708/122806）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=41782）的胚系突变分类为Benign（可靠度为两颗星）。COSMIC数据库记录6次BMPR1A蛋白第2位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型T记录4次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第2位氨基酸由脯氨酸突变为苏氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: BMPR1A, bone morphogenetic protein receptor type IA, is a serine/threonine kinase receptor that activates SMAD signaling pathways, thus regulating transcription of geens involved in growth and development (PMID: 16246179). Germline mutations of BMPR1A are associated with juvenile polyposis syndrome (PMID: 16246179).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.8345（4179/5008）、0.9378（113724/121270）、0.9374（235276/250986）、0.8947（28021/31318）、0.7608（58920/77442）；CKB数据库报道为unknown，COSMIC数据库记录25次MEN1蛋白第546位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型A记录25次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为intermediate，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: MEN1基因属于抑癌基因。编码蛋白是一种支架蛋白，与多种伴侣蛋白协同作用，控制基因转录、信号转导和基因组完整性（PMID: 23850066）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 541st amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Threonine to Alanine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.8345(4179/5008), 0.9378(113724/121270), 0.9772(1428180/1461428), 0.8974(136597/152222), 0.7622(93410/122550) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=134640) is Benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). Based on the ensemble prediction tool BayesDel, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.8345(4179/5008), 0.9378(113724/121270), 0.9374(235276/250986), 0.8947(28021/31318), 0.7619(82741/108602) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively; the Cancer Hotspots database and the COSMIC database have no record for this variant. Based on the ensemble prediction tool BayesDel, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.8345（4179/5008）、0.9378（113724/121270）、0.9772（1428180/1461428）、0.8974（136597/152222）、0.7622（93410/122550）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=134640）的胚系突变分类为Benign（可靠度为两颗星）。基于整合预测工具BayesDel认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第541位氨基酸由苏氨酸突变为丙氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: MEN1, multiple endocrine neoplasia I, is a scaffold protein that can function with various partners to control gene transcription, signal transduction, and genome integrity (PMID: 23850066). MEN1 is mutated in patients with multiple endocrine neoplasia type 1 syndrome (PMID: 9215690).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg数据库人群等位基因频率分别为1.0（5008/5008）、1.0（121308/121308）、1.0（251212/251212）、1.0（31404/31404），iJGVD数据库无记录；COSMIC数据库记录50次ATM蛋白第1983位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型S记录48次。基于剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: ATM基因属于抑癌基因，其编码蛋白是DNA损伤应答机制的核心调控者，其主要功能是在DNA双链断裂或其他形式的细胞应激时，被激活以启动DNA损伤检查点信号（PMID: 23219553）。激活后的ATM蛋白能够磷酸化数百种底物，进而激活并增强DNA损伤应答反应，最终驱动DNA修复、细胞周期停止或细胞凋亡等进程（PMID: 17525332）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 1983rd amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Asparagine to Serine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 1.0(5008/5008), 1.0(121308/121308) in the 1000G, ExAC databases, respectively, with no record in the gnomAD or iJGVD databases; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=133627) is Benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 1.0(5008/5008), 1.0(121308/121308), 1.0(251212/251212), 1.0(31404/31404) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg database, respectively, with no record in the iJGVD database; the COSMIC database records 53 times of amino acid change at the ATM protein position 1983, of which the mutant N1983S is recorded 51 times. Based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC数据库人群等位基因频率分别为1.0（5008/5008）、1.0（121308/121308），gnomAD、iJGVD数据库无记录；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=133627）的胚系突变分类为Benign（可靠度为两颗星）。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第1983位氨基酸由天冬酰胺突变为丝氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: ATM, ATM serine/threonine kinase, is a member of the serine-threonine kinase family and coordinates cellular responses to DNA damage through activation of distinct DNA repair and signaling pathways (PMID: 22079189). ATM germline mutations are associated with ataxia telangiectasia (PMID: 27283171) and ATM somatic mutations are associated with endometrial, colon, pancreatic, breast cancers (PMID: 27283171, PMID: 27413114) and urothelial cancer (PMID: 29682192).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.9858（4937/5008）、0.9726（117863/121184）、0.9732（244403/251146）、0.9771（30682/31402）、1.0（77436/77436）；Cancer Hotspots、COSMIC数据库无记录。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: CHEK1基因属于抑癌基因，编码检查点激酶1（PMID: 30562755），属于丝氨酸/苏氨酸蛋白激酶家族。CHEK1蛋白在DNA损伤检查点通路中起着不可或缺的作用，组织损伤细胞进入细胞循环中。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 471st amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Isoleucine to Valine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.9858(4937/5008), 0.9726(117863/121184), 0.9659(1411205/1460990), 0.9747(148465/152312), 1.0(122793/122794) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=496139) is Benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). The COSMIC database records 10 times of amino acid change at the CHEK1 protein position 471, of which the mutant I471V is recorded 10 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.9858(4937/5008), 0.9726(117863/121184), 0.9732(244403/251146), 0.9771(30682/31402), 1.0(108598/108598) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively; the COSMIC database records 10 times of amino acid change at the CHEK1 protein position 471, of which the mutant I471V is recorded 10 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.9858（4937/5008）、0.9726（117863/121184）、0.9659（1411205/1460990）、0.9747（148465/152312）、1.0（122793/122794）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=496139）的胚系突变分类为Benign（可靠度为两颗星）。COSMIC数据库记录10次CHEK1蛋白第471位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型I471V记录10次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第471位氨基酸由异亮氨酸突变为缬氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: CHEK1, checkpoint kinase 1, is a tumor suppressor (PMID: 30562755) and serine/threonine kinase activated in response to DNA damage that is responsible for mediating checkpoint signaling from ATM and ATR (PMID: 23613359, PMID: 12781359). Overexpression of Chek1 has been observed in several tumor types, including gastric cancer, small cell lung cancer, and T-cell leukemia (PMID: 25132270, PMID: 26867682, PMID: 28490518).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G数据库EAS_CDX人群等位基因频率为0.01613（3/186），ExAC、gnomADe数据库EAS人群等位基因频率分别为0.003374（29/8594）、0.00294（54/18368），gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.00006384（2/31326）、0.0008414（91/108156）；OncoKB数据库报道为Unknown，Cancer Hotspots、COSMIC数据库无记录。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为intermediate，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: RECQL基因属于抑癌基因，它编码一个DNA解旋酶，该解旋酶定位于DNA损伤的位点，在该位点也招募错配修复因子并解开DNA（PMID: 15886194）。 RECQL的确切作用机制在很大程度上尚不清楚，但认为对于正确的DNA复制，DNA修复和基因组稳态是必需的（PMID: 23095637）。 RECQL的替代功能包括端粒维护（PMID: 24623817）。 RECQL已被描述为调节促进细胞迁移和侵袭并抑制细胞凋亡的基因（PMID: 25483193）。 RECQL基因在肿瘤中很少改变（cBioPortal, MSKCC, 2016年12月）。 RECQL中的胚系突变与乳腺癌易感性有关（PMID: 25945795）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 372nd amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Valine to Isoleucine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.0009318(113/121272) in the iJGVD database, 0.003374(29/8594), 0.001514(60/39642), 0.002512(13/5176) in the EAS population of the ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg databases, 0.01613(3/186) in the EAS_CDX population of the 1000G database, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=1116480) is Benign/Likely benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered intermediate, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.00006384(2/31326), 0.0008414(91/108156) in the gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively, 0.003374(29/8594), 0.00294(54/18368) in EAS population of the ExAC, gnomADe database, respectively, 0.01613(3/186) in EAS_CDX population of the 1000G database; the Cancer Hotspots database and the COSMIC database have no record for this variant. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered intermediate, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率为0.0009318（113/121272），ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg数据库EAS人群等位基因频率分别为0.003374（29/8594）、0.001514（60/39642）、0.002512（13/5176），1000G数据库EAS_CDX人群等位基因频率为0.01613（3/186）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=1116480）的胚系突变分类为Benign/Likely benign（可靠度为两颗星）。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为intermediate，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第372位氨基酸由缬氨酸突变为异亮氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: The RECQL gene encodes a DNA helicase that localizes to sites of DNA damage where mismatch repair factors are also recruited and unwinds the DNA (PMID: 7961977, 8056767, 15886194). The precise mechanisms of action of RECQL are largely unknown, but it is thought to be required for proper DNA replication, DNA repair and genome homeostasis (PMID: 18074021, 20065033, 15886194, 23095637). Alternative functions for RECQL include a role in telomere maintenance (PMID: 24623817). RECQL has been described to regulate genes that promote cell migration and invasion and inhibit apoptosis (PMID: 25424877, 25483193). The RECQL gene is rarely altered in tumors (cBioPortal, MSKCC, Dec. 2016). Germline mutations in RECQL have been associated with breast cancer susceptibility (PMID: 25915596, 25945795).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在gnomADe、gnomADg数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.3335（487181/1460848）、0.2886（43847/151952）；CKB数据库报道为unknown，OncoKB数据库报道为Inconclusive，Cancer Hotspots数据库记录4次HNF1A蛋白第27位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型I27L记录4次。该变异位于HNF1A基因的DNA结合和二聚化结构域。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为intermediate。
snvindel.gene_function: HNF1A基因属于抑癌基因，是具有肿瘤抑制活性的转录因子，并在肝细胞分化和葡萄糖转运中发挥作用（PMID: 25233928, PMID: 26855178, PMID: 25076298）。HNF1A失活突变与3型青少年发病的成人型糖尿病（MODY3）和肝腺瘤相关（PMID: 33245425, PMID: 25076298）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 27th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Isoleucine to Leucine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.3335(487181/1460848), 0.2886(43847/151952) in the gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=14937) is Benign/Likely benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). This variant is located in defined regions of the DNA binding and dimerization domains. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered intermediate.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.3335(487181/1460848), 0.2886(43847/151952) in the gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively; this variant is reported as unknown in the CKB database, and Inconclusive in the OncoKB database, the Cancer Hotspots database records 4 times of amino acid change at the HNF1A protein position 27, of which the mutant I27L is recorded 4 times. This variant is located in defined regions of the DNA binding and dimerization domains. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered intermediate.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在gnomADe、gnomADg数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.3335（487181/1460848）、0.2886（43847/151952）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=14937）的胚系突变分类为Benign/Likely benign（可靠度为两颗星）。该变异位于HNF1A基因的DNA结合和二聚化结构域。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为intermediate。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第27位氨基酸由异亮氨酸突变为亮氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: HNF1A, HNF1 homeobox A, is a transcription factor that demonstrates tumor suppressor activity and plays a role in hepatocyte differentiation and glucose transport (PMID: 25233928, PMID: 26855178, PMID: 25076298). HNF1A inactivating mutations are associated with maturity onset diabetes of young, type 3 (MODY3) and hepatic adenomas (PMID: 33245425, PMID: 25076298).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在gnomADe、gnomADg数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.3123（456021/1460154）、0.2728（41510/152144）；CKB数据库报道为no effect，COSMIC数据库记录47次HNF1A蛋白第487位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型S487N记录46次。研究者在双中心从四个方面对变异进行研究，包括来源于两个荧光素酶报告系统的反式激活实验、 免疫印迹法测定蛋白表达和亚细胞定位，以及DNA结合实验，与野生型进行对比，研究结果分别为反式激活：conflict、蛋白表达：40%-75%、亚细胞定位：40%-75%、DNA结合：not detected（PMID: 32910913）。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为intermediate。
snvindel.gene_function: HNF1A基因属于抑癌基因，是具有肿瘤抑制活性的转录因子，并在肝细胞分化和葡萄糖转运中发挥作用（PMID: 25233928, PMID: 26855178, PMID: 25076298）。HNF1A失活突变与3型青少年发病的成人型糖尿病（MODY3）和肝腺瘤相关（PMID: 33245425, PMID: 25076298）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 487th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Serine to Asparagine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.3123(456021/1460154), 0.2728(41510/152144) in the gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=129230) is Benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). Researchers at two centers investigated the variant from four aspects, including transactivation activity (concluded from two luciferase reporter assays), protein expression and subcellular localization by Western blot analysis, and DNA binding assay. Compared with the wild-type, the results were: transactivation activity: conflict, protein expression: 40%-75%, subcellular localization: 40%-75%, and DNA binding: not detected (PMID: 32910913). Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered intermediate.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.3123(456021/1460154), 0.2728(41510/152144) in the gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively; this variant is reported as no effect  in the CKB database, the COSMIC database records 47 times of amino acid change at the HNF1A protein position 487, of which the mutant S487N is recorded 46 times. Researchers at two centers investigated the variant from four aspects, including transactivation activity (concluded from two luciferase reporter assays), protein expression and subcellular localization by Western blot analysis, and DNA binding assay. Compared with the wild-type, the results were: transactivation activity: conflict, protein expression: 40%-75%, subcellular localization: 40%-75%, and DNA binding: not detected (PMID: 32910913). Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered intermediate.

snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第487位氨基酸由丝氨酸突变为天冬酰胺。

HNF1A inactivating mutations are associated with maturity onset diabetes of young, type 3 (MODY3) and hepatic adenomas (PMID: 33245425, PMID: 25076298).

snvindel.gene_function_en: HNF1A, HNF1 homeobox A, is a transcription factor that demonstrates tumor suppressor activity and plays a role in hepatocyte differentiation and glucose transport (PMID: 25233928, PMID: 26855178, PMID: 25076298). snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.2494（1249/5008）、0.2779（33565/120768）、0.2805（409992/1461426）、0.2379（36183/152084）、0.2141（26235/122560）；OncoKB数据库报道为Likely Neutral，COSMIC数据库记录111次BRCA2蛋白第372位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型N372H记录111次。该变异位于BRCA2基因重要功能域之外，基于整合预测工具BayesDel认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: BRCA2基因属于抑癌基因，编码蛋白参与同源重组通路，进行双链DNA修复，从而在基因组稳定性中发挥作用（PMID: 27530658）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 372nd amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Asparagine to Histidine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.2494(1249/5008), 0.2779(33565/120768), 0.2805(409992/1461426), 0.2379(36183/152084), 0.2141(26235/122560) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; this variant is being reviewed by the BRCAExchange expert group as Benign / Little Clinical Significance, the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=9329) is Benign in germline classification (review status: three stars). This variant is located outside the important functional domain of the BRCA2 gene, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.2494(1249/5008), 0.2779(33565/120768), 0.2805(409992/1461426), 0.2379(36183/152084), 0.2141(26235/122560) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; this variant is reported as Likely Neutral in the OncoKB database, the COSMIC database records 111 times of amino acid change at the BRCA2 protein position 372, of which the mutant N372H is recorded 111 times. This variant is located outside the important functional domain of the BRCA2 gene, based on the ensemble prediction tool BayesDel, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.2494（1249/5008）、0.2779（33565/120768）、0.2805（409992/1461426）、0.2379（36183/152084）、0.2141（26235/122560）；BRCAExchange数据库专家组复核为Benign / Little Clinical Significance，ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=9329）的胚系突变分类为Benign（可靠度为三颗星）。该变异位于BRCA2基因重要功能域之外，基于剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第372位氨基酸由天冬酰胺突变为组氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: BRCA2, breast cancer type 2 susceptibility protein, is a tumor suppressor involved in the homologous recombination pathway for double-strand DNA repair, thereby playing a role in genome stability (PMID: 27530658).

snvindel.gene_function_en: BRCA2, breast cancer type 2 susceptibility protein, is a tumor suppressor involved in the homologous recombination pathway for double-strand DNA repair, thereby playing a role in genome stability (PMID: 27530658).

snvindel.gene_function: MAX基因是抑癌基因。编码蛋白是螺旋-环-螺旋亮氨酸拉链转录因子家族的成员，是MYC家族成员的转录辅助因子，在调节细胞生长中发挥作用（PMID: 16908182, PMID: 11031250）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为3'UTR区突变。
snvindel.gene_function_en: MAX, MYC associated factor X, is a member of the helix-loop-helix leucine zipper transcription factor family, and acts as a transcriptional cofactor for Myc family members, playing a role in regulation of cell growth (PMID: 16908182, PMID: 11031250). MAX inactivating mutations and deletions are associated with gastrointestinal stromal tumors (PMID: 28270683), and have been identified in pheochromocytoma (PMID: 22452945).

snvindel.gene_function_en: RAD51B, RAD51 paralog B, plays a role in homologous recombination in DNA repair, and mutations in RAD51B are associated with susceptibility to breast cancer (PMID: 21821141, PMID: 24139550).

snvindel.gene_function: MLH3基因是DNA错配修复（MMR）基因的MutL同源（MLH）家族的成员，MLH参与DNA复制与减数分裂重组后基因组完整性的维持。MLH3基因的体细胞突变经常发生在表现出微卫星不稳定性的肿瘤中，胚系突变与遗传性非息肉性结直肠癌7型（HNPCC7）相关。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 826th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Asparagine to Aspartic acid.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.9904(4960/5008), 0.9968(121011/121400), 0.9989(1460221/1461822), 0.989(150683/152358), 1.0(122608/122608) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=257251) is Benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.9904(4960/5008), 0.9968(121011/121400), 0.9973(250717/251402), 0.9903(31097/31402), 1.0(108586/108586) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively; the COSMIC database records 8 times of amino acid change at the MLH3 protein position 826, of which the mutant N826D is recorded 8 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.9904（4960/5008）、0.9968（121011/121400）、0.9989（1460221/1461822）、0.989（150683/152358）、1.0（122608/122608）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=257251）的胚系突变分类为Benign（可靠度为两颗星）。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第826位氨基酸由天冬酰胺突变为天冬氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: MLH3, DNA mismatch repair protein Mlh3, is a DNA mismatch repair gene that dimerizes with MLH1 and localizes to centrosomes (PMID: 24333356, PMID: 25116689). MLH3 mutations have been associated with cervical squamous cell carcinoma (PMID: 24759751).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.000599（3/5008）、0.0001592（5/31398）、0.009581（742/77444），ExAC、gnomADe数据库EAS人群等位基因频率分别为0.003004（26/8654）、0.002664（49/18394）；COSMIC数据库记录1次BLM蛋白第947位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型V记录1次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: BLM（也称Bloom综合征蛋白）是一种DNA解旋酶，在维持基因组完整性方面起重要作用（PMID: 28232778）。Blm蛋白功能的丧失会导致布卢姆综合症以及患癌风险增加（PMID: 28232778）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 947th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Isoleucine to Valine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.009712(1191/122638) in the iJGVD database, 0.003004(26/8654), 0.005543(220/39692), 0.003089(16/5180) in the EAS population of the ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg databases, 0.009615(2/208) in the EAS_JPT population of the 1000G database, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=454121) is Conflicting classifications of pathogenicity (Uncertain significance, benign, likely benign) in germline classification (review status: one star). Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.0001592(5/31398), 0.009705(1054/108604) in the gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively, 0.003004(26/8654), 0.002664(49/18394) in EAS population of the ExAC, gnomADe database, respectively, 0.009615(2/208) in EAS_JPT population of the 1000G database; the COSMIC database records twice of amino acid change at the BLM protein position 947, of which the mutant I947V is recorded once. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: BLM, Bloom syndrome RecQ like helicase, is a DNA helicase that plays important roles in maintaining genomic integrity (PMID: 28232778). Loss of Blm protein function leads to Bloom's syndrome and increased cancer risk (PMID: 28232778).

snvindel.gene_function: TP53基因属于抑癌基因（PMID: 30562755），编码蛋白参与细胞周期停滞和凋亡，是肿瘤中最常发生突变的基因（PMID: 10065147, PMID: 22713868）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 72nd amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Proline to Arginine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.7477(831482/1111994), 0.745(50641/67974) in the NFE population of the gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively; the FLOSSIES database reports 8372 women over 60 years of age with no diagnosed cancer carrying this variant; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=12351) is Benign in germline classification (review status: two stars) and Benign in somatic classification (review status: one star). The Cancer Hotspots database has no record for this variant. Based on the prediction tools REVEL and aGVGD, this variant is considered neutral, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.7477(831482/1111994), 0.745(50641/67974) in the NFE population of the gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively; this variant is reported as unknown  in the CKB database, the COSMIC database records 247 times of amino acid change at the TP53 protein position 72, of which the mutant P72R is recorded 204 times. The Cancer Hotspots database has no record for this variant. Based on the prediction tools REVEL and aGVGD, this variant is considered neutral, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在gnomADe、gnomADg数据库NFE人群等位基因频率分别为0.7477（831482/1111994）、0.745（50641/67974）；FLOSSIES数据库报道有8372位60岁以上且未确诊癌症的女性携带该变异；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=12351）的胚系突变分类为Benign（可靠度为两颗星），体系突变分类为Benign（可靠度为一颗星）。Cancer Hotspots数据库无记录。基于预测工具BayesDel及aGVGD认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。

snvindel.gene_function_en: TP53, cellular tumor antigen p53, is a tumor suppressor (PMID: 30562755) involved in cell cycle arrest and apoptosis, and is the most frequently mutated gene in cancer (PMID: 10065147, PMID: 22713868). TP53 germline mutations are common in Li-Fraumeni syndrome (PMID: 30239254) and somatic missense mutations are frequent in almost all cancer types cancers (PMID: 30224644) and are also implicated in chemoresistance (PMID: 9927204, PMID: 24065105, PMID: 27066457).

snvindel.gene_function: RAD51D基因属于抑癌基因，编码蛋白在DNA的同源重组修复和端粒维持中发挥作用（PMID: 21821141, PMID: 23108668）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 165th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Arginine to Glutamine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.09505(476/5008), 0.1593(17419/109322), 0.1406(205147/1458982), 0.1211(18427/152210), 0.03985(4880/122462) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=142159) is Benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). The COSMIC database records 104 times of amino acid change at the RAD51D protein position 165, of which the mutant R165Q is recorded 101 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.09505(476/5008), 0.1593(17419/109322), 0.1555(38415/247030), 0.1197(3755/31366), 0.03894(4229/108604) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively; the COSMIC database records 104 times of amino acid change at the RAD51D protein position 165, of which the mutant R165Q is recorded 101 times. snvindel.gene_function_en: RAD51D, RAD51 paralog D, functions in homologous recombination in DNA repair and plays a role in telomere maintenance (PMID: 21821141, PMID: 23108668). Mutations in RAD51D are associated with increased susceptibility to ovarian cancer (PMID: 23372765, PMID: 21822267).

evi_sum.evi_interpretation: NCCN子宫肿瘤指南（2024 Version 2）推荐奥拉帕利、鲁卡帕尼、尼拉帕利用于BRCA突变的晚期复发/转移或不能手术的子宫平滑肌肉瘤（LMS）患者的二线或后线治疗。
临床前研究表明（2024 AACR, Abstract 670），LAE120有效抑制BRCA突变的MDA-MB-436乳腺癌细胞的增殖，并且在BRCA突变的MDA-MB-436细胞异种移植模型中，LAE120显示出强大的单药肿瘤抑制活性和良好的剂量依赖性响应，LAE120联合奥拉帕利在低剂量下具有更强、更持久的抗肿瘤疗效。
临床前研究表明（2024 AACR, Abstract 670），LAE120有效抑制BRCA突变的MDA-MB-436乳腺癌细胞的增殖，并且在BRCA突变的MDA-MB-436细胞异种移植模型中，LAE120显示出强大的单药肿瘤抑制活性和良好的剂量依赖性响应，LAE120联合奥拉帕利在低剂量下具有更强、更持久的抗肿瘤疗效。
乳腺癌NCCN指南（2025 V4）指出，针对携带BRCA1、BRCA2胚系突变的复发、无法手术（局部或区域性转移病灶）或IV期（M1）浸润性乳腺癌患者，优先推荐采用奥拉帕利、他拉唑帕利（Talazoparib）进行治疗（等级1）。

evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准奥拉帕利联合贝伐珠单抗用于一线铂类为基础的化疗完全或部分缓解的、HRD阳性的晚期卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌成人患者的治疗，其中HRD阳性定义为携带BRCA有害或疑似有害突变或基因组不稳定。
evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_en:
FDA approved Olaparib in combination with bevacizumab for the maintenance treatment of adult patients with advanced epithelial ovarian, fallopian tube or primary 
peritoneal cancer who are in complete or partial response to first-line platinum-based chemotherapy and whose cancer is associated with homologous recombination deficiency (HRD)-positive status defined by either: a deleterious or suspected deleterious BRCA mutation, and/or genomic instability.
evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项随机、双盲、安慰剂对照、多中心的III 期临床试验（PAOLA-1, NCT03737643），入组806例经一线含铂化疗和贝伐珠单抗治疗后达到完全缓解或部分缓解的晚期高级别上皮性卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌患者。患者按照2:1比例随机接受每日两次口服奥拉帕利（300mg）联合贝伐珠单抗（537例）或安慰剂联合贝伐珠单抗（269例）治疗，研究主要终点为无进展生存期（PFS），次要终点为总生存期（OS）。研究结果显示，奥拉帕利联合贝伐珠单抗治疗组对比安慰剂联合贝伐珠单抗治疗组的中位PFS分别为22.1 个月 和16.6 个月（HR 0.59; 95% CI: 0.49-0.72;p<0.0001）；同时，研究者对入组患者的HRD及tBRCAm进行了检测并分组分析，结果显示，对于HRD阳性患者，经奥拉帕利联合贝伐珠单抗治疗后PFS显著高于安慰剂组（28.1 个月 vs 16.6个月），tBRCA阳性患者经奥拉帕利联合贝伐珠单抗治疗后PFS同样显著高于安慰剂组（37.2 个月 vs 21.7 个月），而HRD和tBRCA同时阳性的患者PFS获益最为明显（37.2 个月 vs 17.7个月）。基于上述研究，FDA批准奥拉帕利联合贝伐珠单抗用于一线铂类为基础的化疗完全或部分缓解的、HRD阳性的晚期卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌成人患者的治疗，其中HRD阳性定义为携带BRCA有害或疑似有害突变或基因组不稳定。

evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_cn: NMPA批准氟唑帕利单药或联合甲磺酸阿帕替尼用于新辅助、辅助或转移阶段接受过化疗治疗的伴有胚系BRCA突变（gBRCAm）的人表皮生长因子受体（HER2）阴性转移性乳腺癌成年患者。激素受体（HR）阳性乳腺癌患者既往需接受过内分泌治疗或被认为不适合接受内分泌治疗。
evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项随机对照、开放、多中心的III期临床试验（FZPL-III-303, NCTO4296370），截至2023年12月15日，共入组203例伴有gBRCA1/2突变的HER2阴性转移性乳腺癌患者，其中201例纳入意向性治疗集（ITT），按1∶1∶1比例随机分配至氟唑帕利联合阿帕替尼（n=69）、氟唑帕利（n=67）或标准化疗方案（n=65）进行治疗。入组的患者既往均接受过蔥环类和/或紫杉类治疗，且在复发转移阶段接受至多2线系统化疗。对于激素受体阳性乳腺癌患者，既往均接受过至少一线内分泌治疗或不适合接受内分泌治疗。研究的主要终点为由盲态独立影像评审委员会（BICR）根据RECIST v1.1评估的无进展生存期（PFS），次要终点为根据研究者评估的无进展生存期（PFS）、客观缓解率（ORR）、疾病控制率（DCR）以及总生存期（OS）等。研究结果显示：BIRC评估的中位PFS在氟唑帕利联合甲磺酸阿帕替尼组、氟唑帕利单药组以及研究者选择化疗组分别为11.0个月、6.7个月和2.8个月，客观缓解率（ORR）分别为66.7%、43.6%及21.4%，疾病控制率（DCR）分别为87.0%、80.6%和46.2%。基于以上研究，NMPA批准氟唑帕利单药或联合甲磺酸阿帕替尼用于新辅助、辅助或转移阶段接受过化疗治疗的伴有胚系BRCA突变（gBRCAm）的人表皮生长因子受体（HER2）阴性转移性乳腺癌成年患者。激素受体（HR）阳性乳腺癌患者既往需接受过内分泌治疗或被认为不适合接受内分泌治疗。

evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_cn: NMPA批准帕米帕利用于既往经过二线及以上化疗的伴有胚系BRCA（gBRCA）突变的复发性晚期卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌患者的治疗。
evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项多中心、开放标签I/II期临床试验（NCT03333915）的II期临床部分，入组113例既往接受过至少两项标准化疗、携有胚系BRCA1/2突变的高级别上皮性卵巢癌（包括输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌）或高级别子宫内膜上皮样癌中国患者，其中包括90例晚期铂敏感卵巢癌患者（队列1）和23例晚期铂耐药卵巢癌患者（队列2）。患者接受帕米帕利每日两次口服用药、每次60 mg的治疗，试验的主要终点为客观缓解率（ORR）。在101例疗效可评估患者中，队列1中的铂敏感卵巢癌患者的中位随访时间为17.0个月，ORR为68.3%，中位缓解持续时间（DOR）为13.8个月；队列2中的铂耐药卵巢癌患者的中位随访时间为11.6个月，ORR为31.6%，中位DOR为11.1个月。基于上述研究，NMPA附条件批准帕米帕利用于治疗既往经过二线及以上化疗、伴有胚系BRCA（gBRCA）突变的复发性晚期卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌患者的治疗。
乳腺癌NCCN指南（2025 V4）指出，针对携带BRCA1、BRCA2胚系突变的复发、无法手术（局部或区域性转移病灶）或IV期（M1）浸润性乳腺癌患者，优先推荐采用奥拉帕利、他拉唑帕利（Talazoparib）进行治疗（等级1）。
NCCN子宫肿瘤指南（2024 Version 2）推荐奥拉帕利、鲁卡帕尼、尼拉帕利用于BRCA突变的晚期复发/转移或不能手术的子宫平滑肌肉瘤（LMS）患者的二线或后线治疗。

一项多中心1/2期临床试验（PETRA），评估Saruparib在306名经治HRR缺陷型乳腺、卵巢、胰腺或前列腺癌患者中的安全性、耐受性和有效性。患者的肿瘤在HRR相关基因中出现突变，包括：BRCA1、BRCA2、PALB2、RAD51C或RAD51D。数据显示，在接受60mg Saruparib治疗的31名乳腺癌患者中，客观缓解率（ORR）为48.4%，中位缓解持续时间（mDOR）为7.3个月，中位无进展生存期（PFS）为9.1个月。

evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_cn: NMPA批准氟唑帕利单药或联合甲磺酸阿帕替尼用于新辅助、辅助或转移阶段接受过化疗治疗的伴有胚系BRCA突变（gBRCAm）的人表皮生长因子受体（HER2）阴性转移性乳腺癌成年患者。激素受体（HR）阳性乳腺癌患者既往需接受过内分泌治疗或被认为不适合接受内分泌治疗。
evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项随机对照、开放、多中心的III期临床试验（FZPL-III-303, NCTO4296370），截至2023年12月15日，共入组203例伴有gBRCA1/2突变的HER2阴性转移性乳腺癌患者，其中201例纳入意向性治疗集（ITT），按1∶1∶1比例随机分配至氟唑帕利联合阿帕替尼（n=69）、氟唑帕利（n=67）或标准化疗方案（n=65）进行治疗。入组的患者既往均接受过蔥环类和/或紫杉类治疗，且在复发转移阶段接受至多2线系统化疗。对于激素受体阳性乳腺癌患者，既往均接受过至少一线内分泌治疗或不适合接受内分泌治疗。研究的主要终点为由盲态独立影像评审委员会（BICR）根据RECIST v1.1评估的无进展生存期（PFS），次要终点为根据研究者评估的无进展生存期（PFS）、客观缓解率（ORR）、疾病控制率（DCR）以及总生存期（OS）等。研究结果显示：BIRC评估的中位PFS在氟唑帕利联合甲磺酸阿帕替尼组、氟唑帕利单药组以及研究者选择化疗组分别为11.0个月、6.7个月和2.8个月，客观缓解率（ORR）分别为66.7%、43.6%及21.4%，疾病控制率（DCR）分别为87.0%、80.6%和46.2%。基于以上研究，NMPA批准氟唑帕利单药或联合甲磺酸阿帕替尼用于新辅助、辅助或转移阶段接受过化疗治疗的伴有胚系BRCA突变（gBRCAm）的人表皮生长因子受体（HER2）阴性转移性乳腺癌成年患者。激素受体（HR）阳性乳腺癌患者既往需接受过内分泌治疗或被认为不适合接受内分泌治疗。

BRCA1基因的功能缺失型致病性或疑似致病性胚系变异（杂合）与BRCA1相关肿瘤易感综合征（常染色体显性遗传）明确相关（ClinGen）。乳腺癌疾病风险为：原发性乳腺癌的绝对风险为60%-72%，对侧乳腺癌20年累积风险为30%-40%，绝经前女性15年累积风险为>20%，男性在70岁患乳腺癌绝对风险为0.2%-1.2%；卵巢癌、胰腺癌、前列腺癌绝对风险分别为39%-58%、≤5%、7%-26%，患胆道癌、黑色素瘤风险增加（NCCN Genetic/Familial High-Risk Assessment: Breast, Ovarian, Pancreatic, and Prostate Version 3.2025, NCCN Pancreatic Adenocarcinoma Version 2.2025, NCCN Biliary Tract Cancers Version 1.2025, NCCN Prostate Cancer Version 2.2025, NCCN Melanoma: Cutaneous Version 2.2025）。
BRCA1基因的双等位基因致病性和/或疑似致病性胚系变异（纯合或复合杂合）与范可尼贫血（常染色体隐性遗传）明确相关（ClinGen）。范可尼贫血表型包括骨髓衰竭、急性髓系白血病、骨髓增生异常综合征，以及其他表型及临床特征：身材矮小、皮肤色素沉着(皮肤色素沉着或色素沉着斑)、骨骼异常(拇指、手臂)、多种其他先天性异常、头/颈/外阴/阴道鳞状细胞癌、肝脏肿瘤、染色体脆性增加（NCCN Myelodysplastic Syndromes Version 2.2025）。
evi_sum.evi_interpretation_en:
Heterozygous loss-of-function pathogenic or likely pathogenic variants in BRCA1 are definitively associated with BRCA1-related hereditary cancer predisposition syndrome (autosomal dominant) (ClinGen). Breast cancer: 60%–72% absolute risk for primary breast cancer; 30%–40% 20-year cumulative risk for contralateral breast cancer; >20% 15-year cumulative risk in premenopausal women; 0.2%–1.2% risk of male breast cancer by age 70. Ovarian, pancreatic, and prostate cancers: 39%–58%, ≤5%, and 7%–26% absolute risks, respectively. Increased risks for cholangiocarcinoma and melanoma. (NCCN Genetic/Familial High-Risk Assessment: Breast, Ovarian, Pancreatic, and Prostate V3.2025; Pancreatic Adenocarcinoma V2.2025; Biliary Tract Cancers V1.2025; Prostate Cancer V2.2025; Melanoma: Cutaneous V2.2025).
Biallelic pathogenic or likely pathogenic germline variants (homozygous or compound heterozygous) in the BRCA1 gene are definitively associated with Fanconi anemia (autosomal recessive inheritance) (ClinGen). Clinical features include bone marrow failure, acute myeloid leukemia, myelodysplastic syndrome, congenital anomalies (short stature, hyperpigmentation, skeletal abnormalities), and increased risk for squamous cell carcinomas (head/neck, vulva, vagina), liver tumors, and chromosomal instability (NCCN Myelodysplastic Syndromes, Version 2.2025).

evi_sum.regimen_name: 尼拉帕利阿比特龙片+泼尼松龙
evi_sum.tumor_name_cn: 转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌
evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_cn: NMPA批准尼拉帕利阿比特龙片联合泼尼松或泼尼松龙用于携带胚系和/或体系 BRCA基因突变的转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌成人患者（mCRPC）。
evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_en: The NMPA has approved Niraparib and Abiraterone Acetate Tablets in combination with prednisone or prednisolone for adult patients with metastatic castration-resistant prostate cancer (mCRPC) who harbor germline and/or somatic BRCA gene mutations.
evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项随机双盲、安慰剂对照的、多中心、多队列、III期临床试验（MAGNITUDE，NCT03748641），入组423例携带HRR相关基因变异（mHRR）的转移性趋势抵抗性前列腺癌（mCRPC）患者，随机（1:1）接受了尼拉帕利200 mg和阿比特龙1000 mg（AKEEGA组，N＝212）或安慰剂和阿比特龙（N＝211）给药，时间持续至出现不可耐受的毒性或疾病进展。所有患者均接受了泼尼松或泼尼松龙10mg/天和 GnRH类似物治疗或既往接受过双侧睾丸切除术。在纳入的423例患者中，225例（53%）有BRCA基因突变（BRCAm）。主要疗效指标是BICR评估得到的放射学无进展生存期（rPFS）、其他疗效指标包括总生存期（OS）。研究结果显示，在BRCAm和意向治疗（ITT）人群中观察到AKEEGA组与安慰剂组相比rPFS有统计学显著改善，BRCAm亚组中两组的PFS风险比为0.53，中位rPFS分别为16.6个月和10.9个月。在BRCAm患者亚组的探索性OS分析中，AKEEGA组与安慰剂组的中位OS分别为30.4个月和28.6个月， OS风险比为0.79。基于上述研究，NMPA批准尼拉帕利阿比特龙片联合泼尼松或泼尼松龙用于治疗携带胚系和/或体系BRCA基因突变的转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌成人患者（mCRPC）。

evi_sum.regimen_name: 尼拉帕利阿比特龙片+泼尼松
evi_sum.tumor_name_cn: 转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌
evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_cn: NMPA批准尼拉帕利阿比特龙片联合泼尼松或泼尼松龙用于携带胚系和/或体系 BRCA基因突变的转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌成人患者（mCRPC）。
evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_en: The NMPA has approved Niraparib and Abiraterone Acetate Tablets in combination with prednisone or prednisolone for adult patients with metastatic castration-resistant prostate cancer (mCRPC) who harbor germline and/or somatic BRCA gene mutations.

evi_sum.tumor_name_cn: 转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌
evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_cn: NMPA批准他拉唑帕利联合恩扎卢胺治疗同源重组修复(HRR)基因突变的转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌(mCRPC)成人患者。
evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项随机、双盲、安慰剂对照、多队列III期临床试验（TALAPRO-2, NCT03395197），评估了他拉唑帕利与恩扎卢胺联合治疗同源重组修复（HRR）基因突变的转移性、去势抵抗性前列腺癌（mCRPC）患者的疗效。研究纳入399例mCRPC患者，按1:1的比例随机接受恩扎卢胺联合他拉唑帕利或安慰剂给药，直至出现不可接受的毒性或疾病进展，要求患者至少携带直接或间接涉及HRR通路的12个基因（ATM、ATR、BRCA1、BRCA2、CDK12、 CHEK2、FANCA、MLH1、MRE11A（MRE11）、NBN、PALB2、RAD51C）中的至少1个突变基因。主要疗效指标是由盲法独立中心评审（BICR）根据RECIST 1.1和前列腺癌工作组（PCWG3）（针对骨骼）标准评估的影像学无进展生存期（rPFS），另一个疗效指标是总生存期（OS）。在HRR基因突变人群中，与安慰剂+恩扎卢胺组相比，他拉唑帕利+恩扎卢胺组的rPFS有统计学上的显著改善，他拉唑帕利+恩扎卢胺组 vs 安慰剂+恩扎卢胺组的中位rPFS：未达到 vs 13.8个月（HR 0.45; 95% CI: 0.33, 0.61; p<0.0001）。在rPFS分析时，OS 数据尚未成熟（观察到24%的死亡事件）。按BRCA突变状态进行的探索性rPFS分析显示，BRCA突变组的HR为0.20（95% CI: 0.11, 0.36），非BRCA基因突变组的HR为0.72（95% CI: 0.49,1.07）。基于上述研究，NMPA批准他拉唑帕利联合恩扎卢胺治疗同源重组修复(HRR)基因突变的转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌(mCRPC)成人患者。

evi_sum.regimen_name: 奥拉帕利+醋酸阿比特龙+泼尼松
evi_sum.tumor_name_cn: 转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌
evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准奥拉帕利与阿比特龙和泼尼松（或泼尼松龙）联合用于有害或疑似有害BRCA突变（BRCAm）转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌（mCRPC）成人患者。
evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项随机、双盲、安慰剂对照的多中心III期临床试验（PROpel; NCT03732820），入组了796名mCRPC患者，患者被随机分配（1：1）接受奥拉帕利联合阿比特龙或安慰剂联合阿比特龙，并且所有患者还接受泼尼松或泼尼松龙治疗。BRCA基因突变(BRCAm)状态在随机分组后、初步分析前对ctDNA或组织样本进行测定。主要疗效终点指标为研究者评估的放射学无进展生存期（rPFS），其他疗效终点指标包括总生存期（OS）。在接受检测的796名患者中，85名患者（11%）检测出BRCAm。研究结果显示，在意向治疗（ITT）人群中，观察到与安慰剂联合阿比特龙相比，奥拉帕利联合阿比特龙的rPFS出现统计学显著改善。85例（11% ITT人群）BRCAm患者的探索性亚组分析显示，奥拉帕利+阿比特龙组 vs 安慰剂+阿比特龙组中位rPFS分别为NR vs 8个月（风险比[HR]=0.24），中位OS分别为NR vs 23个月（HR=0.30）。711例（89% ITT人群）无BRCAm的患者中，rPFS HR为0.77，OS HR为0.92，表明在ITT人群中观察到的rPFS改善主要归因于BRCAm患者。基于以上研究，FDA批准奥拉帕利与阿比特龙和泼尼松（或泼尼松龙）联合用于有害或疑似有害BRCA突变（BRCAm）转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌（mCRPC）成人患者。

evi_sum.regimen_name: 奥拉帕利+醋酸阿比特龙+泼尼松龙
