snvindel.variant_interpret_en: This variant is expected to form functionally impaired or inactivated proteins. The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.000002736(4/1461756), 0.000006570(1/152196) in the gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively, with no record in the 1000G, ExAC or iJGVD databases; this variant is being reviewed by the BRCAExchange expert group as Pathogenic, the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=37435) is Pathogenic in germline classification (review status: three stars). A multifactor likelihood analysis model based on clinical phenotypic data indicated the Likelihood ratio (LR) for this variant is 199 (Family-History LR:199) (PMID: 31853058).
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: This variant is expected to form functionally impaired or inactivated proteins. The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.000002736(4/1461756), 0.000006570(1/152196) in the gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively, with no record in the 1000G, ExAC or iJGVD databases; this variant is reported as Likely Oncogenic in the OncoKB database, the Cancer Hotspots database and the COSMIC database have no record for this variant.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异可能形成功能损伤或失活的蛋白。该变异在gnomADe、gnomADg数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.000002736（4/1461756）、0.000006570（1/152196），1000G、ExAC、iJGVD数据库无记录；BRCAExchange数据库专家组复核为Pathogenic，ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=37435）的胚系突变分类为Pathogenic（可靠度为三颗星）。基于临床表型数据的多因素似然分析模型显示，该变异的Likelihood ratio（LR）为199（Family-History LR:199）（PMID: 31853058）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为移码突变，导致基因编码蛋白第653位氨基酸由赖氨酸突变为丝氨酸并于699位发生终止。
snvindel.gene_function_en: BRCA1, breast cancer type 1 susceptibility protein, is a tumor suppressor (PMID: 30562755) involved in the DNA damage response and DNA repair (PMID: 21203981).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.2262（1133/5008）、0.1641（19089/116342）、0.1578（38482/243942）、0.1515（4739/31272）、0.3283（25426/77444）；COSMIC数据库记录82次RNF43蛋白第117位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型H记录10次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: RNF43，无名指蛋白43，是一种E3泛素连接酶，靶向Frizzled受体，导致Frizzled的溶酶体降解和Wnt信号的负调控（PMID: 25460271）。RNF43突变与多种肿瘤类型有关，在结直肠癌和子宫内膜癌中很常见（PMID: 25460271, PMID: 25344691）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 117th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Arginine to Histidine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.2262(1133/5008), 0.1641(19089/116342), 0.1277(185550/1453312), 0.1482(22517/151972), 0.3279(40167/122514) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=1165517) is Benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). The COSMIC database records 104 times of amino acid change at the RNF43 protein position 117, of which the mutant R117H is recorded 12 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.2262(1133/5008), 0.1641(19089/116342), 0.1578(38482/243942), 0.1515(4739/31272), 0.3276(35581/108604) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively; the COSMIC database records 104 times of amino acid change at the RNF43 protein position 117, of which the mutant R117H is recorded 12 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.2262（1133/5008）、0.1641（19089/116342）、0.1277（185550/1453312）、0.1482（22517/151972）、0.3279（40167/122514）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=1165517）的胚系突变分类为Benign（可靠度为两颗星）。COSMIC数据库记录104次RNF43蛋白第117位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型R117H记录12次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第117位氨基酸由精氨酸突变为组氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: RNF43, ring finger protein 43, is an E3 ubiquitin ligase that targets Frizzled receptors, resulting in lysosomal degradation of Frizzleds and negative regulation of Wnt signaling (PMID: 25460271). RNF43 mutations are associated with several tumor types, and are frequent in colorectal and endometrial cancer (PMID: 25460271, PMID: 25344691).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.6278（3144/5008）、0.5972（72497/121390）、0.6019（151298/251386）、0.5903（18486/31318）、0.7731（59823/77376）；CKB数据库报道为unknown，COSMIC数据库记录6次BRIP1蛋白第919位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型P记录4次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: BRIP1基因属于抑癌基因，编码蛋白是RecQ DEAH解旋酶家族的成员，参与DNA受损修复过程。BRIP1蛋白与BRCA1蛋白相互作用，共同修补受损的DNA链，从而阻止细胞内积累过多可能触发其分裂失控的基因损伤。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 919th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Serine to Proline.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.6278(3144/5008), 0.5972(72497/121390), 0.593(866589/1461350), 0.612(92966/151908), 0.7725(94694/122588) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=133756) is Benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). The COSMIC database records 18 times of amino acid change at the BRIP1 protein position 919, of which the mutant S919P is recorded 16 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.6278(3144/5008), 0.5972(72497/121390), 0.6019(151298/251386), 0.5903(18486/31318), 0.7733(83931/108540) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively; this variant is reported as unknown  in the CKB database, the COSMIC database records 18 times of amino acid change at the BRIP1 protein position 919, of which the mutant S919P is recorded 16 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.6278（3144/5008）、0.5972（72497/121390）、0.593（866589/1461350）、0.612（92966/151908）、0.7725（94694/122588）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=133756）的胚系突变分类为Benign（可靠度为两颗星）。COSMIC数据库记录18次BRIP1蛋白第919位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型S919P记录16次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第919位氨基酸由丝氨酸突变为脯氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: BRIP1, BRCA1 interacting protein C-terminal helicase 1, is involved in DNA repair and aids the tumor suppressor function of Brca1 (PMID: 14983014). BRIP1 germline mutations are associated with breast and ovarian cancers and somatic mutations are highest in endometrial, colon, and NSCLC (PMID: 27283171).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.001597（8/5008）、0.01085（840/77444），ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg数据库EAS人群等位基因频率分别为0.01434（124/8648）、0.01381（254/18394）、0.01731（27/1560）；CKB数据库报道为unknown，COSMIC数据库记录3次AXIN2蛋白第738位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型F记录2次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: AXIN2即毒素2，是调节β-catenin降解的Axin的同源物（PMID: 9554582）。 在大肠癌，卵巢癌，子宫内膜癌和肝癌中已发现AXIN2突变（PMID: 15735151）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 738th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Serine to Phenylalanine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.0109(1338/122784) in the iJGVD database, 0.01434(124/8648), 0.0135(536/39700), 0.01214(63/5188) in the EAS population of the ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg databases, 0.01905(4/210) in the EAS_CHS population of the 1000G database, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=240010) is Benign/Likely benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.01084(1177/108604) in the iJGVD database, 0.01434(124/8648), 0.01381(254/18394), 0.01731(27/1560) in EAS population of the ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg database, respectively, 0.01905(4/210) in EAS_CHS population of the 1000G database; the COSMIC database records 4 times of amino acid change at the AXIN2 protein position 738, of which the mutant S738F is recorded 3 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: AXIN2, axin 2, is a homologue of Axin that regulates beta-catenin degradation (PMID: 9554852). AXIN2 mutations have been identified in colorectal, ovarian, endometrial, and liver cancers (PMID: 15735151).

snvindel.gene_function_en: AXIN2, axin 2, is a homologue of Axin that regulates beta-catenin degradation (PMID: 9554852). AXIN2 mutations have been identified in colorectal, ovarian, endometrial, and liver cancers (PMID: 15735151).

snvindel.gene_function: PRKAR1A基因属于抑癌基因，编码蛋白激酶A的调节亚基，是Pka的重要组分，可介导cAMP信号转导（PMID: 26042218）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为3'UTR区突变。
snvindel.gene_function_en: PRKAR1A, protein kinase cAMP-dependent type I regulatory subunit alpha, is a major component of Pka which mediates cAMP-dependent signaling (PMID: 26042218). Inactivation of PRKAR1A is associated with Carney complex (PMID: 20301463) and adrenocortical tumors (PMID: 26042218).

snvindel.gene_function: STK11基因属于抑癌基因，编码丝氨酸/苏氨酸激酶11，与STRAD蛋白和MO25蛋白形成具有生物活性的异质三聚体，激活AMPK通路（PMID: 18439900）。STK11-AMPK信号调节细胞代谢和能量稳态，以及细胞对DNA损伤和营养缺乏的应激反应（PMID: 21396365）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为3'UTR区突变。
snvindel.gene_function_en: STK11, serine/threonine kinase 11, is a tumor suppressor (PMID: 30562755) involved in cell metabolism, growth, polarity, and tumor suppression through the regulation of AMPK family members (PMID: 26398719). STK11 germline mutations are common in Peutz-Jeghers syndrome and somatic STK11 mutations have been identified in melanoma, lung, pancreatic, cervical, and endometrial cancers (PMID: 26877140, PMID: 29191602) and are often associated with resistance to immune checkpoint blockcade (PMID: 30626603).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.2951（1478/5008）、0.3237（30686/94808）、0.2558（371853/1453768）、0.272（41356/152028）、0.2328（28488/122360）；Cancer Hotspots、COSMIC数据库无记录。基于剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: ERCC1基因编码蛋白是一种DNA核酸内切酶。该蛋白通过与核酸内切酶ERCC4相互作用，形成ERCC1-XPF DNA修复复合物（PMID: 23623389），在DNA核苷酸切除修复过程中发挥重要作用（PMID: 8811092, PMID: 10320375）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is located in 3'UTR of the gene.

Based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

Based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: ERCC1, ERCC excision repair 1, endonuclease non-catalytic subunit, forms part of an endonuclease complex that functions in DNA repair (PMID: 26074087). ERCC1 expression level has been correlated with response to platinum-based therapies in various tumor types, including ovarian, non-small cell lung, and head and neck cancers (PMID: 26804248, PMID: 26179868, PMID: 26870207).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.008986（45/5008）、0.01792（1388/77444），ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg数据库EAS人群等位基因频率分别为0.04586（235/5124）、0.03439（586/17038）、0.03333（52/1560）；Cancer Hotspots、COSMIC数据库无记录。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: POLD1聚合酶（DNA定向），delta 1催化亚基，是DNA聚合酶delta的催化亚基，介导DNA复制（PMID: 27320729）。在多种人类癌症中发现了POLD1突变（PMID: 27320729）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 19th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Arginine to Histidine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.01801(2202/122263) in the iJGVD database, 0.03571(36/1008), 0.04586(235/5124), 0.0275(1081/39302), 0.03526(183/5190) in the EAS population of the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=221055) is Benign/Likely benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: POLD1, polymerase (DNA directed), delta 1, catalytic subunit, is the catalytic subunit of DNA polymerase delta, which mediates DNA replication (PMID: 27320729). POLD1 mutations have been identified in a variety of human cancers (PMID: 27320729).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC数据库人群等位基因频率分别为1.0（5008/5008）、1.0（120931/120934），gnomAD、iJGVD数据库无记录；COSMIC数据库记录19次ASXL1蛋白第815位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型L815P记录15次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: ASXL1是转录调节因子，参与基因表达的表观遗传调控，并与几种蛋白质形成复合物以调控转录（PMID: 23736028）。ASXL1突变在慢性粒细胞单核细胞白血病中很常见（PMID: 26771811, PMID: 23736028），并且已在许多不同的肿瘤类型包括急性髓细胞性白血病和肝癌（PMID: 23736028）中被报道。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 815th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Leucine to Proline.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 1.0(5008/5008), 1.0(120931/120934) in the 1000G, ExAC databases, respectively, with no record in the gnomAD or iJGVD databases; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=133599) is Benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). The COSMIC database records 19 times of amino acid change at the ASXL1 protein position 815, of which the mutant L815P is recorded 15 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 1.0(5008/5008), 1.0(120931/120934) in the 1000G, ExAC databases, respectively, with no record in the gnomAD or iJGVD databases; the COSMIC database records 19 times of amino acid change at the ASXL1 protein position 815, of which the mutant L815P is recorded 15 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC数据库人群等位基因频率分别为1.0（5008/5008）、1.0（120931/120934），gnomAD、iJGVD数据库无记录；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=133599）的胚系突变分类为Benign（可靠度为两颗星）。COSMIC数据库记录19次ASXL1蛋白第815位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型L815P记录15次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。

snvindel.gene_function_en: ASXL1, additional sex combs like 1, transcriptional regulator, is involved in epigenetic regulation of gene expression and forms complexes with several proteins to regulate transcription (PMID: 23736028). Mutations in ASXL1 are frequent in chronic myelomonocytic leukemia (PMID: 26771811, PMID: 23736028), and have been identified in a number of different tumor types including acute myeloid leukemia and liver cancer (PMID: 23736028).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率为0.000008163（1/122506），gnomADg数据库AFR人群等位基因频率为0.00004829（2/41420），gnomADe数据库NFE人群等位基因频率为0.000001839（2/1087288），1000G、ExAC数据库无记录；COSMIC数据库记录6次MTOR蛋白第1792位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型A1792V记录4次。该变异位于MTOR基因的热点区域。
snvindel.gene_function: MTOR基因属于原癌基因，是雷帕霉素的靶点，编码的蛋白为一种丝氨酸/苏氨酸蛋白激酶，具有调节细胞生长和增殖的功能，在多种致癌途径中被激活（PMID: 24764656）。MTOR基因突变在多种人类癌症中经常被观察到（PMID: 24631838）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 1792nd amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Alanine to Valine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.000008163(1/122506) in the iJGVD database, 0.00004829(2/41420) in the AFR population of the gnomADg database, 0.000001839(2/1087288) in the NFE population of the gnomADe database, respectively, with no record in the 1000G or ExAC databases; the COSMIC database records 6 times of amino acid change at the MTOR protein position 1792, of which the mutant A1792V is recorded 4 times. This variant is located in hotspot region of the MTOR gene.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.000008163(1/122506) in the iJGVD database, 0.00004829(2/41420) in the AFR population of the gnomADg database, 0.000001839(2/1087288) in the NFE population of the gnomADe database, respectively, with no record in the 1000G or ExAC databases; the COSMIC database records 6 times of amino acid change at the MTOR protein position 1792, of which the mutant A1792V is recorded 4 times. This variant is located in hotspot region of the MTOR gene.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率为0.000008163（1/122506），gnomADg数据库AFR人群等位基因频率为0.00004829（2/41420），gnomADe数据库NFE人群等位基因频率为0.000001839（2/1087288），1000G、ExAC数据库无记录；COSMIC数据库记录6次MTOR蛋白第1792位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型A1792V记录4次。该变异位于MTOR基因的热点区域。

snvindel.gene_function_en: MTOR, mechanistic target of rapamycin, is a serine/threonine protein kinase, which regulates cell growth and proliferation and is activated in many oncogenic pathways (PMID: 24764656). MTOR mutations are frequently identified in a variety of human cancers (PMID: 24631838).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.1927（965/5008）、0.2758（33413/121168）、0.3192（466507/1461700）、0.251（38186/152134）、0.1951（23843/122178）；COSMIC数据库记录18次CDA蛋白第27位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型Q记录18次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: CDA基因编码参与嘧啶清除的酶。编码的蛋白质形成均四聚体，其催化胞苷和脱氧胞苷分别不可逆地水解为尿苷和脱氧尿苷。它是负责维持细胞嘧啶池的几种脱氨酶之一。该基因的突变与对用于治疗某些儿童白血病的胞嘧啶核苷类似物胞嘧啶阿拉伯糖苷的敏感性降低有关。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 27th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Lysine to Glutamine.

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.1927（965/5008）、0.2758（33413/121168）、0.3192（466507/1461700）、0.251（38186/152134）、0.1951（23843/122178）；COSMIC数据库记录18次CDA蛋白第27位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型Q记录18次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第27位氨基酸由赖氨酸突变为谷氨酰胺。
snvindel.gene_function_en: This gene encodes an enzyme involved in pyrimidine salvaging. The encoded protein forms a homotetramer that catalyzes the irreversible hydrolytic deamination of cytidine and deoxycytidine to uridine and deoxyuridine, respectively. It is one of several deaminases responsible for maintaining the cellular pyrimidine pool. Mutations in this gene are associated with decreased sensitivity to the cytosine nucleoside analogue cytosine arabinoside used in the treatment of certain childhood leukemias.

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.05（24/480）、0.001309（1468/1121628）、0.00002041（3/147006）、0.000009595（1/104222），1000G数据库无记录（ExAC、iJGVD数据未通过过滤标准）；COSMIC数据库记录5次ARID1A蛋白第21位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型P21del记录5次。
snvindel.gene_function: ARID1A基因属于抑癌基因，在动物实验中显示，ARID1A基因的功能与调节基因转录的增强子相关，其突变失活可能影响多种基因的表达和活性（PMID: 27941798）。ARID1A基因在多种肿瘤中均有发生，包括卵巢癌、子宫内膜癌、结直肠癌等（PMID: 21590771; PMID: 21900401） 。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a deletion mutation, which deletes the 21st amino acid in the gene-encoded protein.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: This variant is an in-frame deletion that occurs in a functionally unknown repeat region. The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.05(24/480), 0.001309(1468/1121628), 0.00002041(3/147006), 0.000009595(1/104222) in the ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively, with no record in the 1000G database (data in the ExAC, iJGVD databases fail the filter); the COSMIC database records 7 times of amino acid change at the ARID1A protein position 21, of which the mutant P21del is recorded 7 times.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: This variant is an in-frame deletion that occurs in a functionally unknown repeat region. The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.05(24/480), 0.001309(1468/1121628), 0.00002041(3/147006), 0.000009595(1/104222) in the ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively, with no record in the 1000G database (data in the ExAC, iJGVD databases fail the filter); the COSMIC database records 7 times of amino acid change at the ARID1A protein position 21, of which the mutant P21del is recorded 7 times.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.05（24/480）、0.001309（1468/1121628）、0.00002041（3/147006）、0.000009595（1/104222），1000G数据库无记录（ExAC、iJGVD数据未通过过滤标准）；COSMIC数据库记录5次ARID1A蛋白第21位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型P21del记录5次。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为缺失突变，导致基因编码蛋白第21位氨基酸缺失。
snvindel.gene_function_en: ARID1A, AT rich interactive domain 1A (SWI1-like), is a member of the SWI/SNF chromatin remodeling complex and is involved in cell-cycle activation (PMID: 29136504). ARID1A has been reported to influence PI3K/AKT pathways (PMID: 24618703), and loss of function is commonly found in gastric, colorectal (PMID: 28937020), and bladder cancers (PMID: 28583311), while in liver cancer, Arida1a has a context dependent role (PMID: 29136504).

snvindel.gene_function: AGO1，蛋白argonaute-1，调节细胞浆中RNA沉默，并与RNA聚合酶相互作用，影响基因表达。AGO1在多种肿瘤细胞系中的表达增加（PMID:16289642，PMID:24086155）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第645位氨基酸由精氨酸突变为组氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: AGO1, protein argonaute-1, regulates RNA silencing in the cell cytoplasm and interacts with RNA polymerases to affect gene expression. Increased expression of AGO1 has been identified in multiple cancer cell lines (PMID: 16289642, PMID: 24086155).

snvindel.gene_function: SPTA1是维持红细胞膜稳定性的细胞骨架网络的主要成分（PMID: 24569979）。SPTA1突变已在甲状腺乳头状癌（PMID: 31724970）、小细胞肺癌（PMID: 31612912）、前列腺癌（PMID: 30720096）和结直肠癌（PMID: 28280605）中发现。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第2071位氨基酸由组氨酸突变为谷氨酰胺。
snvindel.gene_function_en: SPTA1, spectrin alpha, erythrocytic 1, is a major component of the cytoskeletal network maintaining membrane stability of erythrocytes (PMID: 24569979). SPTA1 mutations have been identified in papillary thyroid carcinoma (PMID: 31724970), small cell lung cancer (PMID: 31612912), prostate adenocarcinoma (PMID: 30720096), and colorectal cancer (PMID: 28280605).

snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.01418(71/5008), 0.03273(3948/120626), 0.04217(61624/1461462), 0.03328(5063/152132), 0.00003260(4/122716) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the Cancer Hotspots database and the COSMIC database have no record for this variant. Based on the ensemble prediction tool BayesDel, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

SPTA1 mutations have been identified in papillary thyroid carcinoma (PMID: 31724970), small cell lung cancer (PMID: 31612912), prostate adenocarcinoma (PMID: 30720096), and colorectal cancer (PMID: 28280605).

snvindel.gene_function: ABL2基因属于原癌基因，其编码蛋白为非受体酪氨酸激酶，在细胞外刺激与细胞生长、存活和侵袭信号传导途径中充当联络者的角色（PMID: 23842646）。目前在多种肿瘤类型中已观察到ABL2扩增、融合和表达改变，包括肝细胞癌（PMID: 24940071），白血病（PMID: 25098428）和胃癌（PMID: 29767389）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第747位氨基酸由甘氨酸突变为半胱氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: ABL2, ABL proto-oncogene 2, non-receptor tyrosine kinase, serves as a liaison between extracellular stimuli and signaling pathways involved in cell growth, survival, and invasion (PMID: 23842646). ABL2 amplification, fusions, and altered expression has been observed in a variety of tumor types, including hepatocellular carcinoma (PMID: 24940071), leukemia (PMID: 25098428), and gastric cancer (PMID: 29767389).

snvindel.gene_function_en: This gene encodes a component of the interferon-regulated 2-5A system that functions in the antiviral and antiproliferative roles of interferons. Mutations in this gene have been associated with predisposition to prostate cancer and this gene is a candidate for the hereditary prostate cancer 1 (HPC1) allele.

snvindel.gene_function: ALK基因属于原癌基因，其编码蛋白隶属于胰岛素受体家族中的受体酪氨酸激酶（RTK），为跨膜蛋白。该蛋白在大脑的发育过程中起着重要的作用，其对神经系统中特定神经元产生影响。ALK基因的融合、突变或扩增现象广泛存在于多种肿瘤中，例如间变性大细胞淋巴瘤、神经母细胞瘤、结直肠癌及肺癌等（PMID: 8122112, PMID: 18593892, PMID: 19737969）。

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: ALK, anaplastic lymphoma kinase, is a receptor in the insulin receptor superfamily and is a key regulator of neuronal development (PMID: 21502284) and also promotes cell proliferation through activation of MAPK and PI3K signaling pathways (PMID: 27573755). Alk activating mutations, rearrangements, and fusions have been identified in various cancers (PMID: 22649787), including EML4-ALK in non-small cell lung cancer (PMID: 30108712, PMID: 30194140), and a number of mutations confer resistance in the context of Alk fusions (PMID: 25749034, PMID: 21948233).

snvindel.gene_function: INPP4A是一种脂质肌醇多磷酸4-磷酸酶，在PI3K/AKT信号通路中起负调控作用。INPP4A的主要功能是选择性水解肌醇环上的第4位磷酸基团，将PI(3,4)P2转化为PI(3)P (PMID: 24069021)。INPP4A主要在大脑中表达，并通过调节兴奋性毒性神经元死亡来维持大脑的完整性(PMID: 20463662)。INPP4A通过下调PI3K/AKT通路参与抑制小鼠细胞增殖和肿瘤生长(PMID: 21127264, PMID: 19325558)。最近的研究表明，BAP1和INPP4A在间皮瘤和石棉暴露肺腺癌患者中存在共突变(PMID: 26463840)。

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: INPP4A is a lipid inositol polyphosphate 4-phosphatase that has a role in negatively regulating the PI3K/AKT signaling pathway. The primary function of INPP4A is to selectively hydrolyze the position 4 phosphate group on the inositol ring, converting PI(3,4)P2 to PI(3)P (PMID: 24069021). INPP4A is predominantly expressed in the brain and maintains the integrity of the brain by regulating excitotoxic neuronal death (PMID: 20463662). INPP4A has been implicated in the suppression of cell proliferation and tumor growth in mice via downregulation of the PI3K/AKT pathway (PMID: 21127264, PMID: 19325558). Recent studies have shown co-mutations with BAP1 and INPP4A in patients with mesothelioma and asbestos-exposed lung adenocarcinoma (PMID: 26463840).

snvindel.gene_function: ERCC3是TFIIH基础转录因子复合解旋酶XPB亚基，是ATP依赖的5'-3'DNA解旋酶，在核苷酸切除修复和RNA转录中起作用（PMID: 8157004）。ERCC3无义突变与乳腺癌风险相关（PMID: 27655433），ERCC3 mRNA表达与胰腺导管腺癌的不良预后相关（PMID: 27384421）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第727位氨基酸由谷氨酸突变为缬氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: ERCC3, TFIIH basal transcription factor complex helicase XPB subunit, is an ATP-dependent 5’-3’ DNA helicase that plays a role in nucleotide excision repair and RNA transcription (PMID: 8157004). An ERCC3 nonsense mutation is associated with breast cancer risk (PMID: 27655433) and ERCC3 mRNA expression is correlated with poor prognosis in pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma (PMID: 27384421).

snvindel.gene_function: 这个基因编码的蛋白质是整合素超家族的成员。这个家族的成员具有粘附受体的功能，并将信号由细胞外基质传递到细胞内。被编码的蛋白质形成一个带有v链的二聚体，这个异质二聚体可以结合配体如纤维连接蛋白和转化生长因子1。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第432位氨基酸由组氨酸突变为酪氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: This gene encodes a protein that is a member of the integrin superfamily. Members of this family are adhesion receptors that function in signaling from the extracellular matrix to the cell. Integrins are heterodimeric integral membrane proteins composed of an alpha chain and a beta chain. The encoded protein forms a dimer with an alpha v chain and this heterodimer can bind to ligands like fibronectin and transforming growth factor beta 1. Alternate splicing results in multiple transcript variants.

snvindel.gene_function_en: STAT4, signal transducer and activator of transcription 4, is a STAT family transcription factor that mediates IL-12 signaling during cellular-mediated immune responses (PMID: 25798064). Stat4 protein is overexpressed in epithelial cells of ovarian cancer and is associated with poor prognosis and metastasis (PMID: 28114283).

snvindel.gene_function_en: PPARG, peroxisome proliferator-activated receptor gamma, is a transcription factor and member of the proliferator-activated receptor family of nuclear receptors and regulates adipocyte differentiation and glucose homeostasis (PMID: 9209705, PMID: 30651555). PPARG fusions are frequently observed with PAX8 in follicular thyroid carcinoma (PMID: 25069464) and missense mutations and amplification have been reported in luminal bladder cancer (PMID: 30651555).

Alterations in MST1R are associated with several tumor types (PMID: 23792360) and overexpression has been correlated with pancreatic cancer progression (PMID: 30967626).

snvindel.gene_function: BCL6属于抗细胞凋亡家族，被认为是转录阻遏物，在中心B细胞中起转录阻遏物的作用，在B淋巴细胞发育中起作用，并且对细胞存活和增殖至关重要（PMID: 20498019, PMID: 31788471）。BCL6表达增加与实体和血液系统恶性肿瘤相关，包括DLBCL，神经母细胞瘤，乳腺癌（PMID: 24917186）和B细胞急性淋巴细胞白血病（PMID: 31395741）。

snvindel.gene_function_en: BCL6, BCL6 transcription repressor, functions as a transcriptional repressor in germinal center B cells, playing a role in B-lymphocyte development, and is critical for cell survival and proliferation (PMID: 20498019, PMID: 31788471). Increased expression of BCL6 has been associated with both solid and hematological malignancies including DLBCL, neuroblastoma, breast cancer (PMID: 24917186), and B-cell acute lymphoblastic leukemia (PMID: 31395741).

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: SDHA, succinate dehydrogenase

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.1753（878/5008）、0.1298（15734/121228）、0.1314（32957/250898）、0.1613（5051/31308）、0.0379（2935/77444）；COSMIC数据库记录11次SDHA蛋白第657位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型I记录11次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: SDHA基因属于抑癌基因，编码蛋白是琥珀酸脱氢酶复合物的成员之一，是线粒体电子传递链中的关键酶。该基因功能缺失可导致胞内低氧环境而促进细胞癌变（PMID: 16103922）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 657th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Valine to Isoleucine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.1753(878/5008), 0.1298(15734/121228), 0.1229(178656/1453502), 0.1756(26650/151762), 0.03745(4597/122760) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=130279) is Benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). The COSMIC database records 15 times of amino acid change at the SDHA protein position 657, of which the mutant V657I is recorded 15 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.1753(878/5008), 0.1298(15734/121228), 0.1314(32957/250898), 0.1613(5051/31308), 0.03728(4049/108604) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively; the COSMIC database records 15 times of amino acid change at the SDHA protein position 657, of which the mutant V657I is recorded 15 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: SDHA, succinate dehydrogenase

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.2532（1268/5008）、0.1711（20754/121316）、0.1327（193961/1461728）、0.2063（31363/152024）、0.1433（17584/122718）；COSMIC数据库记录10次MTRR蛋白第350位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型K350R记录9次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: 该基因编码电子转移酶家族的一个成员——铁氧化还原酶nadp(+)还原酶(FNR)。该蛋白通过将蛋氨酸合成酶再生到功能状态，在蛋氨酸合成中发挥作用。由于蛋氨酸的合成需要叶酸供体的甲基转移，编码酶的活性对叶酸代谢和细胞甲基化十分重要。该基因突变可导致高半胱氨酸-巨幼细胞性贫血，cbl E型。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 350th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Lysine to Arginine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.2532(1268/5008), 0.1711(20754/121316), 0.1327(193961/1461728), 0.2063(31363/152024), 0.1433(17584/122718) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the COSMIC database records 10 times of amino acid change at the MTRR protein position 350, of which the mutant K350R is recorded 9 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.2532(1268/5008), 0.1711(20754/121316), 0.1327(193961/1461728), 0.2063(31363/152024), 0.1433(17584/122718) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the COSMIC database records 10 times of amino acid change at the MTRR protein position 350, of which the mutant K350R is recorded 9 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: This gene encodes a member of the ferredoxin-NADP(+) reductase (FNR) family of electron transferases. This protein functions in the synthesis of methionine by regenerating methionine synthase to a functional state. Because methionine synthesis requires methyl-group transfer by a folate donor, activity of the encoded enzyme is important for folate metabolism and cellular methylation. Mutations in this gene can cause homocystinuria-megaloblastic anemia, cbl E type. Alternative splicing of this gene results in multiple transcript variants.

snvindel.gene_function_en: This gene encodes a member of the ferredoxin-NADP(+) reductase (FNR) family of electron transferases. This protein functions in the synthesis of methionine by regenerating methionine synthase to a functional state. Because methionine synthesis requires methyl-group transfer by a folate donor, activity of the encoded enzyme is important for folate metabolism and cellular methylation. Mutations in this gene can cause homocystinuria-megaloblastic anemia, cbl E type. Alternative splicing of this gene results in multiple transcript variants.

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.2208（1106/5008）、0.2445（29636/121232）、0.2545（371947/1461740）、0.2768（42076/151992）、0.08025（9850/122738）；CKB数据库报道为unknown，COSMIC数据库记录8次IL7R蛋白第356位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型V记录5次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: IL7R基因属于原癌基因，编码的蛋白作为白细胞介素7和胸腺间质淋巴生成素受体复合物的一部分，参与T细胞的发育（PMID: 21892159, PMID: 21536738）。IL7R基因突变与急性白血病相关（PMID: 21892159, PMID: 21536738）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 356th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Isoleucine to Valine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.2208(1106/5008), 0.2445(29636/121232), 0.2545(371947/1461740), 0.2768(42076/151992), 0.08025(9850/122738) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the COSMIC database records 15 times of amino acid change at the IL7R protein position 356, of which the mutant I356V is recorded 12 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第356位氨基酸由异亮氨酸突变为缬氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: IL7R, interleukin 7 receptor, functions as part of the receptor complex for interleukin 7 and thymic stromal lymphopoietin, and is involved in development of T-cells (PMID: 21892159, PMID: 21536738). Mutations in IL7R are associated with acute leukemias (PMID: 21892159, PMID: 21536738).

snvindel.gene_function: RAD50基因属于抑癌基因，编码蛋白是MRE11/RAD50/NBS1复合物（MRN复合物）的一个组成部分，参与同源重组修复（PMID: 2659437, PMID: 15309560）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第665位氨基酸由缬氨酸突变为异亮氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: RAD50, RAD50 double strand break repair protein, forms a complex with Mre11 and Nbs1 to repair double strand breaks, mediate DNA recombination, and maintain telomeres (PMID: 21035407). RAD50 mutations have been observed in Burkitt lymphoma, myeloid leukemia, ovarian cancer, liver cancer, and endometrial carcinoma (PMID: 31767017).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.2995（1500/5008）、0.321（38017/118440）、0.3062（447158/1460408）、0.2682（40785/152054）、0.4235（51780/122273）；CKB数据库报道为gain of function，COSMIC数据库记录57次FGFR4蛋白第388位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型G388R记录56次。该变异可导致受体稳定性增强并持续激活、ERK信号传导和Stat3磷酸化增加，并在小鼠模型中促进肿瘤的形成和生长（PMID: 26675719, PMID: 29402970）。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为intermediate，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: FGFR4（成纤维细胞生长因子受体4）是一种与配体FGF19结合后激活的受体酪氨酸激酶，其激活后可激活RAS-MAPK、PI3K-AKT和STAT信号通路，并在胚胎发育和组织修复中发挥作用（PMID: 22508544, PMID: 32154250）。 在结直肠癌（PMID: 32236572）、肝细胞癌、乳腺癌、口咽鳞癌和胰腺癌（PMID: 32154250）中报道过Fgfr4过表达。FGFR4突变在胃癌中有报道（PMID: 31601997），某些突变可能导致对FGFR抑制剂耐药（PMID: 31575540）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 388th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Glycine to Arginine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.2995(1500/5008), 0.321(38017/118440), 0.3062(447158/1460408), 0.2682(40785/152054), 0.4235(51780/122273) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; this variant is reported as gain of function  in the CKB database, the COSMIC database records 57 times of amino acid change at the FGFR4 protein position 388, of which the mutant G388R is recorded 56 times. This mutation can lead to enhanced receptor stability and sustained activation, increased ERK signaling and Stat3 phosphorylation, and promote tumor formation and growth in mouse models (PMID: 26675719, PMID: 29402970). Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered intermediate, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.2995(1500/5008), 0.321(38017/118440), 0.3062(447158/1460408), 0.2682(40785/152054), 0.4235(51780/122273) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; this variant is reported as gain of function  in the CKB database, the COSMIC database records 57 times of amino acid change at the FGFR4 protein position 388, of which the mutant G388R is recorded 56 times. This mutation can lead to enhanced receptor stability and sustained activation, increased ERK signaling and Stat3 phosphorylation, and promote tumor formation and growth in mouse models (PMID: 26675719, PMID: 29402970). Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered intermediate, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.2995（1500/5008）、0.321（38017/118440）、0.3062（447158/1460408）、0.2682（40785/152054）、0.4235（51780/122273）；CKB数据库报道为gain of function，COSMIC数据库记录57次FGFR4蛋白第388位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型G388R记录56次。该变异可导致受体稳定性增强并持续激活、ERK信号传导和Stat3磷酸化增加，并在小鼠模型中促进肿瘤的形成和生长（PMID: 26675719, PMID: 29402970）。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为intermediate，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第388位氨基酸由甘氨酸突变为精氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: FGFR4, fibroblast growth factor receptor 4, is a receptor tyrosine kinase activated upon binding of the FGF19 ligand, which then activates RAS-MAPK, PI3K-AKT, and STAT pathways, and functions in embryonic development and tissue repair (PMID: 22508544, PMID: 32154250). Overexpression of Fgfr4 has been observed in colorectal cancer (PMID: 32236572), hepatocellular carcinoma, breast cancer, oropharyngeal squamous cell carcinoma, and pancreatic cancer (PMID: 32154250) and FGFR4 mutations have been reported in gastric cancer (PMID: 31601997) and may also confer resistance to FGFR inhibitors (PMID: 31575540).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomAD、iJGVD数据库无记录；Cancer Hotspots、COSMIC数据库无记录。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为intermediate，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: NSD1编码一种组蛋白甲基转移酶，通过组蛋白H3赖氨酸36和赖氨酸37的甲基化来调节基因表达(PMID: 21196496;PMID: 31727171) ，并且也是一个类固醇受体的共调节因子 (PMID: 11733144;PMID: 11509567)。Nsd1蛋白过表达在转移性胰腺导管腺癌和肝细胞癌中有报道，并被认为是与肝细胞癌预后较差有关(PMID: 29636367;PMID: 31727171)，而NSD1功能失活突变可提高HPV阴性的头颈部鳞状细胞癌对顺铂的敏感性(PMID: 29636367)。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 419th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Serine to Arginine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: This variant is not recorded in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomAD or iJGVD databases; the Cancer Hotspots database and the COSMIC database have no record for this variant. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered intermediate, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: This variant is not recorded in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomAD or iJGVD databases; the Cancer Hotspots database and the COSMIC database have no record for this variant. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered intermediate, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomAD、iJGVD数据库无记录；Cancer Hotspots、COSMIC数据库无记录。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为intermediate，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第419位氨基酸由丝氨酸突变为精氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: NSD1, nuclear receptor binding SET domain protein 1, is a histone methyltransferase that regulates gene expression through methylation of histone H3 lysine 36 (PMID: 21196496) and lysine 37 (H3K27me3) (PMID: 31727171) and is also a coregulator of steroid receptors (PMID: 11733144, PMID: 11509567). Overexpression of Nsd1 has been observed in metastatic pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma (PMID: 31060750) and in hepatocellular carcinoma patients with poor prognosis (PMID: 31727171), while loss of function Nsd1 mutations may increase sensitivity to cisplatin in HPV-negative head and neck squamous cell carcinoma (PMID: 29636367).

snvindel.gene_function: HLA-A基因属于抑癌基因，编码的蛋白是HLA-I类组织相容性抗原，在向免疫系统呈递外来抗原方面发挥作用（PMID:17326240）。HLA-A基因与ROS1基因的融合在痰盂样肿瘤中被观察到（PMID: 24445538），HLA-A基因突变与慢性粒细胞白血病、慢性淋巴细胞白血病和鼻咽癌有关（PMID: 20388056;PMID: 22814293;PMID: 22880099）。

snvindel.gene_function_en: HLA-A, HLA class I histocompatibility antigen, plays a role in the presentation of foreign antigens to the immune system (PMID: 17326240). A fusion of HLA-A with ROS1 has been observed in spitzoid neoplasms (PMID: 24445538), and HLA-A mutations have been associated with chronic myelogenous leukemia (PMID: 20388056), chronic lymphocytic leukemia (PMID: 22814293), and nasopharyngeal carcinoma (PMID: 22880099).

snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.2444(1224/5008), 0.1638(16240/99126), 0.002121(1601/754746), 0.001188(69/58098), 0.02162(289/13366) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively (data in the gnomADe, iJGVD databases fail the filter); the COSMIC database records 7 times of amino acid change at the HLA-A protein position 131, of which the mutant G131W is recorded 7 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.2444(1224/5008), 0.1638(16240/99126), 0.002121(1601/754746), 0.001188(69/58098), 0.02162(289/13366) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively (data in the gnomADe, iJGVD databases fail the filter); the COSMIC database records 7 times of amino acid change at the HLA-A protein position 131, of which the mutant G131W is recorded 7 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.2444（1224/5008）、0.1638（16240/99126）、0.002121（1601/754746）、0.001188（69/58098）、0.02162（289/13366）（gnomADe、iJGVD数据未通过过滤标准）；Cancer Hotspots、COSMIC数据库无记录。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第131位氨基酸由甘氨酸突变为色氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: HLA-A, HLA class I histocompatibility antigen, plays a role in the presentation of foreign antigens to the immune system (PMID: 17326240). A fusion of HLA-A with ROS1 has been observed in spitzoid neoplasms (PMID: 24445538), and HLA-A mutations have been associated with chronic myelogenous leukemia (PMID: 20388056), chronic lymphocytic leukemia (PMID: 22814293), and nasopharyngeal carcinoma (PMID: 22880099).

snvindel.gene_function: MDC1是DNA损伤检查点1的介体，是一种调节DNA损伤灶组装以应对DNA损伤的衔接蛋白（PMID:21326949）。MDC1突变与乳腺癌患者预后不良相关（PMID:28513990）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第1599位氨基酸由半胱氨酸突变为甘氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: MDC1, mediator of DNA damage checkpoint 1, is an adaptor protein that regulates the assembly of DNA damage foci in response to DNA damage (PMID: 21326949). Mutations of MDC1 have been associated with poor prognosis in breast cancer patients (PMID: 28513990).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在ExAC、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.000008242（1/121332）、0.01863（1379/74004）、0.03453（1144/33128），gnomADe数据库EAS人群等位基因频率为0.004517（138/30554），1000G数据库无记录（gnomAD、iJGVD数据未通过过滤标准）；OncoKB数据库报道为Unknown，COSMIC数据库记录2次MDC1蛋白第1334位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型T记录2次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: MDC1是DNA损伤检查点1的介体，是一种调节DNA损伤灶组装以应对DNA损伤的衔接蛋白（PMID:21326949）。MDC1突变与乳腺癌患者预后不良相关（PMID:28513990）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 1334th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Isoleucine to Threonine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.000008242(1/121332), 0.01863(1379/74004), 0.03453(1144/33128) in the ExAC, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, 0.004517(138/30554) in the EAS population of the gnomADe database, respectively, with no record in the 1000G database (data in the gnomAD, iJGVD databases fail the filter); the COSMIC database records 5 times of amino acid change at the MDC1 protein position 1334, of which the mutant I1334T is recorded 4 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function: PRDM1，PR域锌指蛋白1，编码β-干扰素基因表达的抑制因子（PMID: 1851123）并调节浆细胞分化（PMID: 27687004）。 PRDM1在多种肿瘤类型中发挥抑癌作用（PMID: 22143801,  PMID: 20047096），PRDM1表达降低可能预示结肠癌患者的生存不良（PMID: 29760071），并可能促进肺癌转移（PMID: 28378641）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第97位氨基酸由谷氨酸突变为甘氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: PRDM1, PR domain zinc finger protein 1, encodes a repressor of beta-interferon gene expression (PMID: 1851123) and regulates plasma cell differentiation (PMID: 27687004). PRDM1 plays a tumor suppressor role in various tumor types (PMID: 22143801; PMID: 20047096) and decreased expression may predict poor survival in colon cancer patients (PMID: 29760071) and may promote metastasis in lung cancer (PMID: 28378641).

snvindel.gene_function:
MYB, v-myb禽成髓细胞病病毒癌基因同源物，是调节细胞分化和增殖的转录激活因子(PMID: 21196221)。
MYB在几种类型的肿瘤中都存在异常(PMID: 21196221)。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第458位氨基酸由谷氨酸突变为天冬氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: MYB, v-myb avian myeloblastosis viral oncogene homolog, is a transcriptional activator that regulates cell differentiation and proliferation,(PMID: 21196221). MYB is dysregulated in several tumor types (PMID: 21196221).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomAD、iJGVD数据库无记录；Cancer Hotspots、COSMIC数据库无记录。基于整合预测工具BayesDel认为该变异为intermediate，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: ARID1B是包含富AT相互作用结构域的蛋白1B，是SWI/SNF染色质重塑复合物中的一员 (PMID: 15170388)；ARID1B突变在黑色素瘤、胃癌、结直肠癌、肝癌、神经母细胞瘤和胰腺癌等多种肿瘤中均有报道 (PMID: 27737960)。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 1568th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Proline to Serine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: This variant is not recorded in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomAD or iJGVD databases; the ClinVar database has no record about this variant. Based on the ensemble prediction tool BayesDel, this variant is considered intermediate, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

Based on the ensemble prediction tool BayesDel, this variant is considered intermediate, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: ARID1B, AT-rich interactive domain-containing protein 1B, is a member of the SWI/SNF chromatin remodeling complex and is involved in cell-cycle activation (PMID: 15170388). ARID1B mutations have been identified in several tumor types including, melanoma, gastric, colorectal, liver, neuroblastoma, and pancreatic (PMID: 27737960).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.4107（2057/5008）、0.5024（55710/110890）、0.4921（717843/1458702）、0.4704（71475/151942）、0.1227（14981/122054）；COSMIC数据库记录6次SOD2蛋白第16位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型A记录6次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: SOD2基因是铁/锰超氧化物歧化酶家族的一个成员。它编码一种线粒体蛋白，形成一个同源四聚体，每个亚单位结合一个锰离子。该蛋白与氧化性磷酸化的超氧化物副产物结合，并将其转化为过氧化氢和2价氧。SOD2基因的突变与特发性心肌病（IDC）、早衰、散发性运动神经元疾病和癌症有关。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 16th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Valine to Alanine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.4107(2057/5008), 0.5024(55710/110890), 0.4921(717843/1458702), 0.4704(71475/151942), 0.1227(14981/122054) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the COSMIC database records 15 times of amino acid change at the SOD2 protein position 16, of which the mutant V16A is recorded 15 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.4107(2057/5008), 0.5024(55710/110890), 0.4921(717843/1458702), 0.4704(71475/151942), 0.1227(14981/122054) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the COSMIC database records 15 times of amino acid change at the SOD2 protein position 16, of which the mutant V16A is recorded 15 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为5'UTR区突变。
snvindel.gene_function_en: This gene is a member of the iron/manganese superoxide dismutase family. It encodes a mitochondrial protein that forms a homotetramer and binds one manganese ion per subunit. This protein binds to the superoxide byproducts of oxidative phosphorylation and converts them to hydrogen peroxide and diatomic oxygen. Mutations in this gene have been associated with idiopathic cardiomyopathy (IDC), premature aging, sporadic motor neuron disease, and cancer. Alternative splicing of this gene results in multiple transcript variants. A related pseudogene has been identified on chromosome 1.

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在gnomADe、gnomADg数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.2866（250808/874968）、0.3103（29718/95774）；OncoKB数据库报道为Likely Neutral，COSMIC数据库记录19次PMS2蛋白第857位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型G857A记录19次。基于该变异的MAPP/PP2致病性先验概率认为该变异为neutral。
snvindel.gene_function: PMS2基因属于抑癌基因，编码一种核酸内切酶。编码蛋白在错配修复（MMR）途径中起重要作用，并与微卫星不稳定性（MSI）（PMID: 30121009）和基因组稳定性（PMID: 31747945）有关。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 857th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Glycine to Alanine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.2866(250808/874968), 0.3103(29718/95774) in the gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=36691) is Benign in germline classification (review status: three stars). Based on MAPP/PP2 prior probability of pathogenicity, the variant is considered neural.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.2866(250808/874968), 0.3103(29718/95774) in the gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively; this variant is reported as Likely Neutral in the OncoKB database, the COSMIC database records 19 times of amino acid change at the PMS2 protein position 857, of which the mutant G857A is recorded 19 times. Based on MAPP/PP2 prior probability of pathogenicity, the variant is considered neural.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在gnomADe、gnomADg数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.2866（250808/874968）、0.3103（29718/95774）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=36691）的胚系突变分类为Benign（可靠度为三颗星）。基于该变异的MAPP/PP2致病性先验概率认为该变异为neutral。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第857位氨基酸由甘氨酸突变为丙氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: PMS2, PMS1 homolog 2, mismatch repair system component, interacts with MLH1 to form the MutL-alpha complex, which functions in DNA mismatch repair (PMID: 18157157, PMID: 24333356) and is associated with microsatellite instability (MSI) (PMID: 30121009) and genomic stability (PMID: 31747945). Germline PMS2 mutations are associated with Lynch syndrome (PMID: 15528792), mutations in PMS2 are associated with susceptibility to colon cancer and endometrial cancer (PMID: 24978665), and overexpression has been reported in prostate cancer (PMID: 27803051).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomAD、iJGVD数据库无记录；Cancer Hotspots、COSMIC数据库无记录。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: ETV1，ETS 变体转录因子 1，编码 ETS 转录因子家族的成员，该家族在多个细胞过程中发挥作用，包括细胞生长、迁移、分化和血管生成 (PMID: 21298110, PMID: 30629294)。 在前列腺癌、尤文氏肉瘤 (PMID: 17390040, PMID: 10523827) 和神经胶质瘤 (PMID: 31381204) 中观察到 ETV1 融合，并且在尤文肉瘤、前列腺癌和胃肠道间质瘤 (PMID: 31381204) 中报告了 ETV1 过表达 。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 448th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Valine to Leucine.

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: ETV1, ETS variant transcription factor 1, encodes a member of the ETS family of transcription factors, which plays a role in multiple cellular processes including cell growth, migration, differentiation, and angiogenesis (PMID: 21298110, PMID: 30629294). ETV1 fusions have been observed in prostate cancer, Ewing's sarcoma (PMID: 17390040, PMID: 10523827), and glioma (PMID: 31381204), and ETV1 overexpression has been reported in Ewing sarcoma, prostate cancer, and gastrointestinal stromal tumors (PMID: 31381204).

snvindel.gene_function: 多囊群（PcG）多蛋白PRC1样复合物的组成部分，此复合物类在整个发育过程中维持许多基因（包括Hox基因）的转录抑制状态。PcG-PRC1复合物通过染色质重塑和组蛋白修饰发挥作用，介导组蛋白H2A'Lys-119的单泛素化，使染色质的表达能力发生遗传性改变（PMID: 25519132）. 含有PCGF5、RNF2、CSNK2B、RYBP和AUTS2的PRC1类复合物降低了组蛋白H2A泛素化活性，这是由于CSNK2B使RNF2磷酸化所致(PMID: 25519132）. 因此，复合物介导转录激活（PMID: 25519132）. 在细胞质中，在轴突和树突伸长以及胚胎脑发育过程中的神经元迁移中起作用。通过与RAC鸟嘌呤核苷酸交换因子的相互作用，促进肌动蛋白细胞骨架的重组、板状足的形成和轴突的延长，从而导致RAC1的激活（通过相似性）。这种基因的突变也与非神经系统疾病有关，如急性淋巴细胞白血病、皮肤老化、早发性雄激素性脱发和某些癌症。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第646位氨基酸由脯氨酸突变为精氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: Component of a Polycomb group (PcG) multiprotein PRC1-like complex, a complex class required to maintain the transcriptionally repressive state of many genes, including Hox genes, throughout development. PcG PRC1 complex acts via chromatin remodeling and modification of histones; it mediates monoubiquitination of histone H2A 'Lys-119', rendering chromatin heritably changed in its expressibility (PMID:25519132). The PRC1-like complex that contains PCGF5, RNF2, CSNK2B, RYBP and AUTS2 has decreased histone H2A ubiquitination activity, due to the phosphorylation of RNF2 by CSNK2B (PMID:25519132). As a consequence, the complex mediates transcriptional activation (PMID:25519132). In the cytoplasm, plays a role in axon and dendrite elongation and in neuronal migration during embryonic brain development. Promotes reorganization of the actin cytoskeleton, lamellipodia formation and neurite elongation via its interaction with RAC guanine nucleotide exchange factors, which then leads to the activation of RAC1 (By similarity). Mutations in this gene have also been associated with non-neurological disorders, such as acute lymphoblastic leukemia, aging of the skin, early-onset androgenetic alopecia, and certain cancers.

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.1022（512/5008）、0.08935（90272/1010324）、0.1235（18597/150622）、0.00004453（5/112288），ExAC数据库无记录；CKB数据库报道为unknown，COSMIC数据库记录4次SMO蛋白第25位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型G记录4次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: SMO基因属于原癌基因，编码一种膜蛋白受体，是hedgehog信号通路的保守信号转换器，在正常胚胎和神经元发育以及肿瘤发生过程中发挥重要作用(PMID: 26912893)。该通路在胚胎发育完成后即处于失活状态，如因某些原因被重新激活则可能导致机体癌变。SMO基因突变已经在散发基底细胞癌(PMID: 26950094)和髓母细胞瘤(PMID: 21614026)中被报道，在许多其他肿瘤类型中也被发现。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 25th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Aspartic acid to Glycine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.1022(512/5008), 0.08935(90272/1010324), 0.1235(18597/150622), 0.00004453(5/112288) in the 1000G, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively, with no record in the ExAC database; this variant is reported as unknown  in the CKB database, the COSMIC database records 6 times of amino acid change at the SMO protein position 25, of which the mutant D25G is recorded 6 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: SMO, smoothened, frizzled class receptor, is a G-protein coupled receptor and member of the Hedgehog signaling pathway, which is involved in cell fate, proliferation, and survival (PMID: 16881963). SMO gain-of-function mutations are associated with basal cell carcinoma (PMID: 25085664) and several missense mutations are associated with resistance to Hedgehog pathway inhibitors (PMID: 29175550, PMID: 25306392).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异可能形成功能损伤或失活的蛋白。该变异在gnomADe数据库AMR人群等位基因频率为0.001777（76/42760），ExAC数据库SAS人群等位基因频率为0.01086（149/13718），1000G、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库无记录；OncoKB数据库报道为Likely Oncogenic，COSMIC数据库记录81次KMT2C蛋白第2797位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型K2797Rfs*26记录71次。
snvindel.gene_function: KMT2C是一种H3K4组蛋白甲基化转移酶，参与转录共激活、染色质修饰和基因表观调节 (PMID: 31128216;PMID: 31337554;PMID: 31128216)。KMT2C突变与多种肿瘤相关，包括乳腺癌、弥散型胃腺癌（PMID:30108106）和泌尿道上皮癌(PMID: 24965397;PMID: 23429989;PMID: 24670651;PMID: 31128216;PMID: 30108106;PMID: 30665945)。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a frameshift mutation, which induces a substitution of Lysine with Arginine at position 2797 and causes termination of the protein at codon 2822.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: This variant is expected to form functionally impaired or inactive proteins. The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.001777(76/42760) in the AMR population of the gnomADe database, 0.01086(149/13718) in the SAS population of the ExAC database, respectively, with no record in the 1000G, gnomADg or iJGVD databases; this variant is reported as Likely Oncogenic in the OncoKB database, the COSMIC database records 81 times of amino acid change at the KMT2C protein position 2797, of which the mutant K2797Rfs*26 is recorded 71 times.

snvindel.gene_function_en: KMT2C, lysine methyltransferase 2C, is a H3K4 histone methyltransferase (PMID: 31128216) that is involved in transcriptional coactivation and functions in chromatin modification (PMID: 31337554) and epigenetic gene regulation (PMID: 31128216). KMT2C mutations are associated with various tumor types (PMID: 24965397; PMID: 23429989; PMID: 24670651), including breast cancer (PMID: 31128216), diffuse-type gastric adenocarcinoma (PMID: 30108106), and urothelial carcinoma (PMID: 30665945).

snvindel.gene_function_en: XRCC2, X-ray repair cross complementing 2, is a family member of the XRCC genes that is involved in homologous recombination repair (PMID: 15279796). XRCC2 mutations have been identified in breast and skin cancers (PMID: 15723711).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在gnomADe数据库人群等位基因频率为0.0000006904（1/1448470），1000G、ExAC、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库无记录；Cancer Hotspots、COSMIC数据库无记录。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为intermediate，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: PRKDC，蛋白激酶，DNA活化的催化多肽，是DNA- pk复合体的催化成分，通过非同源末端连接参与DNA修复（PMID: 14726021; PMID: 24680878）。在肺癌和结直肠癌细胞系和模型中敲除PRKDC会诱导DNA损伤和恶性转化增加，这表明PRKDC在这些情况下主要作为肿瘤抑制基因发挥作用（PMID：31055244, PMID: 26175416）。相反，PRKDC在乳腺癌和胃癌细胞系和模型中的过表达诱导细胞周期进程以及细胞增殖和迁移，表明PRKDC在这种情况下主要作为癌基因发挥作用（PMID: 31513357, PMID: 31255330）。PRKDC的突变已在多种癌症中被发现，包括肺癌、乳腺癌、肝癌、结直肠癌和皮肤癌（PMID：32238472, PMID: 35801800）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 2437th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Isoleucine to Threonine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.0000006904(1/1448470) in the gnomADe database, with no record in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADg or iJGVD databases; the Cancer Hotspots database and the COSMIC database have no record for this variant. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered intermediate, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: PRKDC, protein kinase, DNA-activated, catalytic polypeptide, is the catalytic component of the DNA-PK complex, which functions in DNA repair by non-homologous end-joining (PMID: 14726021, PMID: 24680878). Knockdown of PRKDC in lung cancer and colorectal cancer cell lines and models induces increased DNA damage and malignant transformation, suggesting that PRKDC functions predominantly as a tumor suppressor gene in these contexts (PMID: 31055244, PMID: 26175416). Conversely, overexpression of PRKDC in breast cancer and gastric cancer cell lines and models induces cell cycle progression and cellular proliferation and migration, suggesting that PRKDC functions predominantly as an oncogene in this context (PMID: 31513357, PMID: 31255330). Mutations of PRKDC have been identified in various cancers, including lung cancer, breast cancer, liver cancer, colorectal cancer and skin cancer (PMID: 32238472, PMID: 35801800).

Predicted to be involved in regulation of transcription by RNA polymerase II. Predicted to be part of chromatin. Predicted to be active in nucleus.

snvindel.gene_function: RECQL4（类似于解旋酶4的RecQ）是一种RecQ家族解旋酶，可展开双链DNA，并参与DNA修复和复制起始（PMID: 24606147, PMID: 31276497）。 RECQL4突变与发生淋巴瘤和骨肉瘤的风险增加有关（PMID: 29080750, PMID: 31604778），并且在浸润性乳腺癌中已报道RECQL4扩增（PMID: 32152520）。

snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.0102(1/98), 0.000001374(2/1455426) in the ExAC, gnomADe databases, respectively, with no record in the 1000G, gnomADg or iJGVD databases; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=529012) is Uncertain significance in germline classification (review status: one star). snvindel.gene_function_en: RECQL4, RecQ like helicase 4, is a RecQ family helicase that unwinds double-stranded DNA, therefore is involved in DNA repair and replication initiation (PMID: 24606147). RECQL4 mutations are associated with increased risk of developing lymphoma and osteosarcoma (PMID: 29080750).

snvindel.gene_function: SLC28A3，核苷转运体，可调节多种细胞过程，包括神经传递，血管张力，细胞表面受体附近的腺苷浓度，以及核苷药物的运输和代谢。SLC28A3对嘧啶和嘌呤核苷显示出广泛的特异性。

snvindel.gene_function_en: Nucleoside transporters, such as SLC28A3, regulate multiple cellular processes, including neurotransmission, vascular tone, adenosine concentration in the vicinity of cell surface receptors, and transport and metabolism of nucleoside drugs. SLC28A3 shows broad specificity for pyrimidine and purine nucleosides.

BRD3 fusion with NUTM1 has been identified in NUT midline carcinomas (PMID: 25688404).

snvindel.gene_function: TET1是一种依赖铁和α-酮谷氨酸的酶，参与将5-甲基胞嘧啶转化为5-羟甲基胞嘧啶（5hmC）的过程（PMID: 19372391）。这种DNA碱基向5hmC的转化是活化DNA甲基化的初始步骤，这一过程在基因调控、细胞重编程和哺乳动物发育中很重要（PMID: 20639862）。TET酶的活性被由IDH1和IDH2的特定突变产生的抑制性代谢物2-羟基戊二酸（2-HG）抑制，其产生导致高度特异性的DNA甲基化特征，并经常在某些胶质母细胞瘤和白血病中发现（PMID: 21383741）。TET1首先被确认为MLL基因的易位伙伴，是急性骨髓性白血病的关键致癌驱动因素（PMID: 23818607）。在各种人类癌症中也观察到TET1的表达减少。在乳腺癌中，TET1水平的降低被证明与肿瘤生长和转移的增加有关（PMID: 23716660），在结肠癌细胞系中，TET1表达的降低与异常的CpG甲基化谱和WNT途径的激活有关（PMID: 27977763, 25362856）。TET1表达的减少也与KRAS诱导的细胞转化有关（PMID: 25466250）。

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: TET1, tet methylcytosine dioxygenase 1, plays a critical role in DNA demethylation, supports DNA repair, and is involved in regulation of gene expression (PMID: 29556496, PMID: 28555658). TET1 mutations have been identified in colon cancer (PMID: 22895193), fusions between TET1 and KMT2A have been identified in acute myeloid leukemia (PMID: 12124344, PMID: 23100278), and TET1 promoter methylation and downregulation has been identified in multiple tumor types including lung, gastric, colorectal, breast, and renal cancers (PMID: 27225590).

snvindel.gene_function_en: MGMT, O-6-methylguanine-DNA methyltransferase, is a DNA repair protein that plays a role in removing DNA adducts and regulates cell death (PMID: 19846906, PMID: 23684800). MGMT fusions have been identified in glioma (PMID: 32753598), and MGMT promoter methylation and loss of MGMT expression has been identified in various tumor types, including lymphoma, glioma, colorectal, non-small cell lung, and head and neck carcinoma (PMID: 26035292, PMID: 10029064, PMID: 19846906).

snvindel.gene_function: MUC5B，粘液蛋白5B，低聚物粘液/凝胶形成，是一种大型凝胶形成的糖蛋白，是唾液、呼吸道和宫颈中粘液的主要成分（PMID: 9729478, PMID: 19783639）。MUC5B的异常表达与乳腺癌（PMID: 23056409, PMID: 22269464）和肺癌（PMID: 25733373）有关。

snvindel.gene_function_en: MUC5B, mucin 5B, oligomeric mucus/gel-forming, is a large gel-forming glycoprotein that is a major component of mucus in the saliva, respiratory tract, and cervix (PMID: 9729478, PMID: 19783639). Abnormal expression of MUC5B is associated with breast cancer (PMID: 23056409, PMID: 22269464) and lung cancer (PMID: 25733373).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.03634（182/5008）、0.0946（7109/75150）、0.08593（124858/1452950）、0.06052（9179/151674），iJGVD数据库无记录；COSMIC数据库记录5次MUC5B蛋白第4686位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型T4686M记录1次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: MUC5B，粘液蛋白5B，低聚物粘液/凝胶形成，是一种大型凝胶形成的糖蛋白，是唾液、呼吸道和宫颈中粘液的主要成分（PMID: 9729478, PMID: 19783639）。MUC5B的异常表达与乳腺癌（PMID: 23056409, PMID: 22269464）和肺癌（PMID: 25733373）有关。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 4686th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Threonine to Methionine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.03634(182/5008), 0.0946(7109/75150), 0.08593(124858/1452950), 0.06052(9179/151674) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively, with no record in the iJGVD database; the COSMIC database records 5 times of amino acid change at the MUC5B protein position 4686, of which the mutant T4686M is recorded once. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.03634(182/5008), 0.0946(7109/75150), 0.08593(124858/1452950), 0.06052(9179/151674) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively, with no record in the iJGVD database; the COSMIC database records 5 times of amino acid change at the MUC5B protein position 4686, of which the mutant T4686M is recorded once. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

Abnormal expression of MUC5B is associated with breast cancer (PMID: 23056409, PMID: 22269464) and lung cancer (PMID: 25733373).

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: RPS6KB2, ribosomal protein S6 kinase B2, is a serine/threonine kinase that regulates translation, therefore involved in multiple cellular processes (PMID: 20953835). RPS6KB2 expression has been associated with risks of breast, lung, and colon cancers (PMID: 26577839, PMID: 24894543, PMID: 21035469).

snvindel.gene_function: GSTP1基因编码一种谷胱甘肽S-转移酶，该酶可通过催化疏水性和亲电性化合物与还原型谷胱甘肽偶联，在解毒过程中发挥重要作用。与GSTP1基因相关的疾病包括Barrett食管和少弱畸精子症。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 185th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Isoleucine to Threonine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.356(1783/5008), 0.3404(40954/120310), 0.3504(511957/1461194), 0.379(57676/152194), 0.145(17754/122412) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the Cancer Hotspots database and the COSMIC database have no record for this variant. Based on the ensemble prediction tool BayesDel, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第185位氨基酸由异亮氨酸突变为苏氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: GSTP1 (Glutathione S-Transferase Pi 1) is a Protein Coding gene. Glutathione S-transferases (GSTs) are a family of enzymes that play an important role in detoxification by catalyzing the conjugation of many hydrophobic and electrophilic compounds with reduced glutathione. Diseases associated with GSTP1 include Barrett Esophagus and Oligoasthenoteratozoospermia.

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.06689（335/5008）、0.1101（13307/120820）、0.1136（28505/250874）、0.112（3514/31386）、0.0002855（31/108598）；CKB数据库报道为no effect - predicted，OncoKB数据库报道为Inconclusive，COSMIC数据库记录81次ATM蛋白第1853位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型N记录60次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: ATM基因属于抑癌基因，其编码蛋白是DNA损伤应答机制的核心调控者，其主要功能是在DNA双链断裂或其他形式的细胞应激时，被激活以启动DNA损伤检查点信号（PMID: 23219553）。激活后的ATM蛋白能够磷酸化数百种底物，进而激活并增强DNA损伤应答反应，最终驱动DNA修复、细胞周期停止或细胞凋亡等进程（PMID: 17525332）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 1853rd amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Aspartic acid to Asparagine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.06689(335/5008), 0.1101(13307/120820), 0.1327(193944/1461528), 0.1063(16176/152138), 0.0004319(53/122712) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=128458) is Benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.06689(335/5008), 0.1101(13307/120820), 0.1136(28505/250874), 0.112(3514/31386), 0.0002855(31/108598) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively; this variant is reported as no effect - predicted in the CKB database, and Inconclusive in the OncoKB database, the COSMIC database records 84 times of amino acid change at the ATM protein position 1853, of which the mutant D1853N is recorded 63 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.06689（335/5008）、0.1101（13307/120820）、0.1327（193944/1461528）、0.1063（16176/152138）、0.0004319（53/122712）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=128458）的胚系突变分类为Benign（可靠度为两颗星）。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第1853位氨基酸由天冬氨酸突变为天冬酰胺。
snvindel.gene_function_en: ATM, ATM serine/threonine kinase, is a member of the serine-threonine kinase family and coordinates cellular responses to DNA damage through activation of distinct DNA repair and signaling pathways (PMID: 22079189). ATM germline mutations are associated with ataxia telangiectasia (PMID: 27283171) and ATM somatic mutations are associated with endometrial, colon, pancreatic, breast cancers (PMID: 27283171, PMID: 27413114) and urothelial cancer (PMID: 29682192).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.5531（2770/5008）、0.4118（44922/109092）、0.4209（591468/1405284）、0.5326（79725/149694）、0.426（51849/121701）；COSMIC数据库记录34次CHD4蛋白第139位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型D记录30次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: CHD4是染色体域解旋酶DNA结合蛋白4，是核小体重构和组蛋白脱乙酰基酶（NuRD）复合体的一个亚基，既作为转录调节剂，又促进DNA双链断裂修复（PMID: 23697937, PMID: 23954449）。 在子宫内膜癌（PMID: 29888111）中已鉴定出CHD4突变，在结直肠癌（PMID: 28486105）和胶质母细胞瘤（PMID: 30872624）中已观察到CHD4表达增加。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 139th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Glutamic acid to Aspartic acid.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.5531(2770/5008), 0.4118(44922/109092), 0.4209(591468/1405284), 0.5326(79725/149694), 0.426(51849/121701) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the Cancer Hotspots database and the COSMIC database have no record for this variant. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: CHD4, chromodomain helicase DNA binding protein 4, is a subunit of the nucleosome remodeling and histone deacetylase (NuRD) complex, acting as a transcriptional regulator as well as promoting DNA double strand break repair (PMID: 23697937, PMID: 23954449). CHD4 mutations have been identified in endometrial cancer (PMID: 29888111), and increased CHD4 expression has been observed in colorectal cancer (PMID: 28486105) and glioblastoma (PMID: 30872624).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.3592（1799/5008）、0.2746（32569/118612）、0.2588（64341/248658）、0.3601（11294/31360）、0.02602（2015/77444）；CKB数据库报道为unknown，OncoKB数据库报道为Inconclusive，COSMIC数据库记录25次CDKN1B蛋白第109位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型G记录25次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: CDKN1B（p27）即环素依赖激酶抑制剂1B，调节细胞周期并作为肿瘤抑制因子参与G1期。CDKN1B突变可以促进肿瘤发生（PMID: 28687353）。CDKN1B的胚系突变与四型复杂内分泌肿瘤有关，体细胞突变与淋巴瘤、乳腺癌和内分泌肿瘤等各种肿瘤相关（PMID: 23555276, PMID: 18354415, PMID: 28687353）。

The COSMIC database records 30 times of amino acid change at the CDKN1B protein position 109, of which the mutant V109G is recorded 30 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: CDKN1B (p27), cyclin-dependent kinase inhibitor 1B, regulates cell cycle progression and is involved in G1 arrest to function as a tumor suppressor, while altered Cdkn1b may promote oncogenesis (PMID: 28687353). Germline mutations in CDKN1B are associated with multiple endocrine neoplasia type IV (MEN4) and reduced expression and somatic mutations are associated with a variety of tumors, including lymphoma, breast, and endocrine (PMID: 23555276; PMID: 18354415; PMID: 28687353).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomAD、iJGVD数据库无记录；Cancer Hotspots、COSMIC数据库无记录。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: KMT2D（组蛋白赖氨酸N-甲基转移酶2D）是一种组蛋白甲基转移酶，可将H3K4me甲基化，并参与转录激活，主要在发育和细胞分化过程中发生（PMID: 28666924;PMID: 24240169）。 KMT2D突变与各种肿瘤类型相关，包括ESCC（PMID: 25151357），滤泡性淋巴瘤（PMID: 24362818）和肺部（PMID: 28007623;PMID: 27873319）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 2752nd amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Proline to Serine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: This variant is not recorded in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomAD or iJGVD databases; the Cancer Hotspots database and the COSMIC database have no record for this variant. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: This variant is not recorded in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomAD or iJGVD databases; the Cancer Hotspots database and the COSMIC database have no record for this variant. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
