snvindel.gene_function_en: KMT2D, histone-lysine N-methyltransferase 2D, is a histone methyltransferase which methylates H3K4me and is involved in transcriptional activation, mostly during development and cell differentiation (PMID: 28669924, PMID: 24240169). KMT2D mutations are associated with various tumor types, including ESCC (PMID: 25151357), follicular lymphoma (PMID: 24362818), and lung (PMID: 28007623, PMID: 27873319).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.01597（80/5008）、0.04268（4504/105536）、0.05112（70729/1383574）、0.04163（6299/151320）、0.00005930（7/118046）；COSMIC数据库记录8次KMT2D蛋白第813位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型L记录6次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: KMT2D（组蛋白赖氨酸N-甲基转移酶2D）是一种组蛋白甲基转移酶，可将H3K4me甲基化，并参与转录激活，主要在发育和细胞分化过程中发生（PMID: 28666924;PMID: 24240169）。 KMT2D突变与各种肿瘤类型相关，包括ESCC（PMID: 25151357），滤泡性淋巴瘤（PMID: 24362818）和肺部（PMID: 28007623;PMID: 27873319）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 813th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Proline to Leucine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.01597(80/5008), 0.04268(4504/105536), 0.05112(70729/1383574), 0.04163(6299/151320), 0.00005930(7/118046) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the COSMIC database records 13 times of amino acid change at the KMT2D protein position 813, of which the mutant P813L is recorded 10 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.01597(80/5008), 0.04268(4504/105536), 0.05112(70729/1383574), 0.04163(6299/151320), 0.00005930(7/118046) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the COSMIC database records 13 times of amino acid change at the KMT2D protein position 813, of which the mutant P813L is recorded 10 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.01597（80/5008）、0.04268（4504/105536）、0.05112（70729/1383574）、0.04163（6299/151320）、0.00005930（7/118046）；COSMIC数据库记录8次KMT2D蛋白第813位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型L记录6次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第813位氨基酸由脯氨酸突变为亮氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: KMT2D, histone-lysine N-methyltransferase 2D, is a histone methyltransferase which methylates H3K4me and is involved in transcriptional activation, mostly during development and cell differentiation (PMID: 28669924, PMID: 24240169). KMT2D mutations are associated with various tumor types, including ESCC (PMID: 25151357), follicular lymphoma (PMID: 24362818), and lung (PMID: 28007623, PMID: 27873319).

snvindel.gene_function: SMARCD1基因属于抑癌基因，它通过与糖皮质激素受体相互作用促进染色质重塑，并通过与Tp53直接相互作用来介导抗肿瘤活性 （PMID: 19234488;PMID: 12917342;PMID: 18303029）。在乳腺癌中已鉴定出SMARCD1突变（PMID: 22722201）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第372位氨基酸由异亮氨酸突变为苏氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: SMARCD1, SWI/SNF related, matrix associated, actin dependent regulator of chromatin, subfamily d, member 1, encodes a component of the SWI/SNF complex that facilitates chromatin remodeling by interacting with the glucocorticoid receptor and mediates antitumor activity by directly interacting with Tp53 (PMID: 19234488, PMID: 12917342, PMID: 18303029). SMARCD1 mutations have been identified in breast cancer (PMID: 22722201).

snvindel.gene_function: ERBB3编码EGFR受体酪氨酸激酶HER3，可激活PI3K-AKT-mTOR和RAS-RAF-MEK-ERK途径来促进细胞存活和增殖（PMID: 17471238）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第291位氨基酸由脯氨酸突变为丝氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: ERBB3 encodes HER3, an EGFR receptor tyrosine kinase, which activates PI3K-AKT-mTOR and RAS-RAF-MEK-ERK pathways to promote cell survival and proliferation (PMID: 17471238).

snvindel.gene_function: HNF1A基因属于抑癌基因，是具有肿瘤抑制活性的转录因子，并在肝细胞分化和葡萄糖转运中发挥作用（PMID: 25233928, PMID: 26855178, PMID: 25076298）。HNF1A失活突变与3型青少年发病的成人型糖尿病（MODY3）和肝腺瘤相关（PMID: 33245425, PMID: 25076298）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为移码突变，导致基因编码蛋白第289位氨基酸由脯氨酸突变为丙氨酸并于316位发生终止。
snvindel.gene_function_en: HNF1A, HNF1 homeobox A, is a transcription factor that demonstrates tumor suppressor activity and plays a role in hepatocyte differentiation and glucose transport (PMID: 25233928, PMID: 26855178, PMID: 25076298). HNF1A inactivating mutations are associated with maturity onset diabetes of young, type 3 (MODY3) and hepatic adenomas (PMID: 33245425, PMID: 25076298).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.1206（604/5008）、0.1182（14342/121366）、0.1151（28939/251316）、0.1148（3601/31362）、0.000142（11/77444）；COSMIC数据库记录7次POLE蛋白第1396位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型S记录7次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: POLE基因编码DNA聚合酶ε的催化亚基，具有聚合酶活性和核酸外切酶的校正活性。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 1396th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Asparagine to Serine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.1206(604/5008), 0.1182(14342/121366), 0.1296(189344/1461462), 0.1284(19541/152142), 0.0002365(29/122604) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=380215) is Benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.1206(604/5008), 0.1182(14342/121366), 0.1151(28939/251316), 0.1148(3601/31362), 0.0001289(14/108604) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively; the COSMIC database records 8 times of amino acid change at the POLE protein position 1396, of which the mutant N1396S is recorded 8 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.1206（604/5008）、0.1182（14342/121366）、0.1296（189344/1461462）、0.1284（19541/152142）、0.0002365（29/122604）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=380215）的胚系突变分类为Benign（可靠度为两颗星）。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第1396位氨基酸由天冬酰胺突变为丝氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: POLE, DNA polymerase epsilon catalytic subunit, mediates proofreading activity during DNA repair and replication (PMID: 26822575, PMID: 29604063) and plays a role in genomic stability (PMID: 31747945). Somatic mutations in POLE have been identified in colorectal cancer (PMID: 29998005, PMID: 29072370), frequently in endometrial cancer (PMID: 26822575, PMID: 28795426, PMID: 30733993), and are often associated with high tumor mutational burden (PMID: 30733993, PMID: 29880869), but are less likely to be associated with DNA mismatch repair (MMR) deficiency (PMID: 30585826).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.002198（266/121028）、0.004157（6076/1461490）、0.002847（433/152098）、0.00004080（5/122560），1000G数据库SAS_GIH人群等位基因频率为0.009709（2/206）；COSMIC数据库记录7次FLT1蛋白第1201位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型P1201L记录1次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为intermediate，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: FLT1基因属于原癌基因，编码的蛋白为一种参与血管生成的受体酪氨酸激酶VEGFR1（PMID: 23172303）。FLT1基因的过表达和胚系突变与多种人类癌症有关（PMID: 24625025;PMID: 24909162）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 1201st amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Proline to Leucine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.002198(266/121028), 0.004157(6076/1461490), 0.002847(433/152098), 0.00004080(5/122560) in the ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, 0.009709(2/206) in the SAS_GIH population of the 1000G database, respectively; the COSMIC database records 7 times of amino acid change at the FLT1 protein position 1201, of which the mutant P1201L is recorded once. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered intermediate, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.002198(266/121028), 0.004157(6076/1461490), 0.002847(433/152098), 0.00004080(5/122560) in the ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, 0.009709(2/206) in the SAS_GIH population of the 1000G database, respectively; the COSMIC database records 7 times of amino acid change at the FLT1 protein position 1201, of which the mutant P1201L is recorded once. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered intermediate, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.002198（266/121028）、0.004157（6076/1461490）、0.002847（433/152098）、0.00004080（5/122560），1000G数据库SAS_GIH人群等位基因频率为0.009709（2/206）；COSMIC数据库记录7次FLT1蛋白第1201位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型P1201L记录1次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为intermediate，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第1201位氨基酸由脯氨酸突变为亮氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: FLT1 (VEGFR1), fms related tyrosine kinase 1, encodes VEGFR1, a receptor tyrosine kinase involved in angiogenesis (PMID: 23172303). Overexpression and germline mutations in FLT1 are associated with various human cancers (PMID: 24625025; PMID: 24909162).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.001398（7/5008）、0.003246（392/120780）、0.004631（6768/1461426）、0.003382（515/152266）、0.000008197（1/121998）；OncoKB数据库报道为Likely Neutral，COSMIC数据库记录9次BRCA2蛋白第2034位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型R2034C记录7次。该变异位于BRCA2基因重要功能域之外，基于整合预测工具BayesDel认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: BRCA2基因属于抑癌基因，编码蛋白参与同源重组通路，进行双链DNA修复，从而在基因组稳定性中发挥作用（PMID: 27530658）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 2034th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Arginine to Cysteine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.001398(7/5008), 0.003246(392/120780), 0.004631(6768/1461426), 0.003382(515/152266), 0.000008197(1/121998) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; this variant is being reviewed by the BRCAExchange expert group as Benign / Little Clinical Significance, the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=41558) is Benign in germline classification (review status: three stars). This variant is located outside the important functional domain of the BRCA2 gene, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.001398(7/5008), 0.003246(392/120780), 0.004631(6768/1461426), 0.003382(515/152266), 0.000008197(1/121998) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; this variant is reported as Likely Neutral in the OncoKB database, the COSMIC database records 9 times of amino acid change at the BRCA2 protein position 2034, of which the mutant R2034C is recorded 7 times. This variant is located outside the important functional domain of the BRCA2 gene, based on the ensemble prediction tool BayesDel, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第2034位氨基酸由精氨酸突变为半胱氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: BRCA2, breast cancer type 2 susceptibility protein, is a tumor suppressor involved in the homologous recombination pathway for double-strand DNA repair, thereby playing a role in genome stability (PMID: 27530658).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.3257（1631/5008）、0.457（54496/119242）、0.5271（769729/1460430）、0.4393（66834/152150）、0.2078（25520/122816）；COSMIC数据库记录14次BMP4蛋白第152位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型V152A记录12次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: BMP4（骨形态发生蛋白4）是转化生长因子β家族的成员，参与调节细胞增殖，细胞分化和上皮-间质转化（PMID: 28987388）。在肝细胞癌（PMID: 28987388），结直肠癌（PMID: 28611046）和甲状腺癌（PMID: 28214211）中有Bmp4的过度表达。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 152nd amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Valine to Alanine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.3257(1631/5008), 0.457(54496/119242), 0.5271(769729/1460430), 0.4393(66834/152150), 0.2078(25520/122816) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the COSMIC database records 14 times of amino acid change at the BMP4 protein position 152, of which the mutant V152A is recorded 12 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.3257(1631/5008), 0.457(54496/119242), 0.5271(769729/1460430), 0.4393(66834/152150), 0.2078(25520/122816) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the COSMIC database records 14 times of amino acid change at the BMP4 protein position 152, of which the mutant V152A is recorded 12 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.3257（1631/5008）、0.457（54496/119242）、0.5271（769729/1460430）、0.4393（66834/152150）、0.2078（25520/122816）；COSMIC数据库记录14次BMP4蛋白第152位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型V152A记录12次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第152位氨基酸由缬氨酸突变为丙氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: BMP4, bone morphogenetic protein 4, is a member of the transforming growth factor beta family involved in regulation of cell proliferation, cell differentiation, and epithelial-mesenchymal transition (PMID: 28987388). Overexpression of Bmp4 has been observed in hepatocellular carcinoma (PMID: 28987388), colorectal cancer (PMID: 28611046), and thyroid carcinoma (PMID: 28214211).

snvindel.gene_function: MLH3基因是DNA错配修复（MMR）基因的MutL同源（MLH）家族的成员，MLH参与DNA复制与减数分裂重组后基因组完整性的维持。MLH3基因的体细胞突变经常发生在表现出微卫星不稳定性的肿瘤中，胚系突变与遗传性非息肉性结直肠癌7型（HNPCC7）相关。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 420th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Valine to Isoleucine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.01157(1397/120774), 0.01395(20329/1456784), 0.01088(1656/152240), 0.00008177(10/122292) in the ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, 0.01889(19/1006) in the EUR population of the 1000G database, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=238243) is Benign/Likely benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). The COSMIC database records 11 times of amino acid change at the MLH3 protein position 420, of which the mutant V420I is recorded 11 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.01157(1397/120774), 0.01141(2811/246462), 0.0131(411/31380), 0.00006447(7/108582) in the ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively, 0.01889(19/1006) in EUR population of the 1000G database; the COSMIC database records 11 times of amino acid change at the MLH3 protein position 420, of which the mutant V420I is recorded 11 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.01157（1397/120774）、0.01395（20329/1456784）、0.01088（1656/152240）、0.00008177（10/122292），1000G数据库EUR人群等位基因频率为0.01889（19/1006）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=238243）的胚系突变分类为Benign/Likely benign（可靠度为两颗星）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第420位氨基酸由缬氨酸突变为异亮氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: MLH3, DNA mismatch repair protein Mlh3, is a DNA mismatch repair gene that dimerizes with MLH1 and localizes to centrosomes (PMID: 24333356, PMID: 25116689). MLH3 mutations have been associated with cervical squamous cell carcinoma (PMID: 24759751).

snvindel.gene_function: MGA是一种具有双重特异性的转录因子，能与MAX形成异二聚体并调节Myc靶基因（PMID:10601024，PMID:16908182）。在肺癌中发现了MGA突变（PMID:24362264），在肉瘤中发现了MGA-NUTM1（PMID:30723300，PMID:30552129）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为无义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第633位氨基酸由甘氨酸突变为终止密码子。
snvindel.gene_function_en: MGA, MAX dimerization protein MGA, is a transcription factor with dual specificity that can form a heterodimer with Max and regulate Myc target gene (PMID: 10601024, PMID: 16908182). MGA mutations have been identified in lung cancer (PMID: 24362264), and MGA-NUTM1 has been identified in sarcoma (PMID: 30723300, PMID: 30552129).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.01897（95/5008）、0.04028（4883/121230）、0.05063（74008/1461822）、0.03413（5198/152278）、0.000147（18/122476）；COSMIC数据库记录4次SMAD3蛋白第170位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型V记录4次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为intermediate，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function:
SMAD3是SMAD家族成员3，是一种转录因子(PMID: 30589983)，是TGF信号传导介质(PMID: 23139211)，在炎症中起作用(PMID: 30659096)。
在梭形细胞肿瘤(PMID: 29309308)中发现了SMAD3与EWSR1的融合，在结直肠癌(PMID: 23139211)中发现了体细胞突变。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 170th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Isoleucine to Valine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.01897(95/5008), 0.04028(4883/121230), 0.05063(74008/1461822), 0.03413(5198/152278), 0.000147(18/122476) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the COSMIC database records 4 times of amino acid change at the SMAD3 protein position 170, of which the mutant I170V is recorded 4 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered intermediate, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.01897(95/5008), 0.04028(4883/121230), 0.05063(74008/1461822), 0.03413(5198/152278), 0.000147(18/122476) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the COSMIC database records 4 times of amino acid change at the SMAD3 protein position 170, of which the mutant I170V is recorded 4 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered intermediate, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: SMAD3, SMAD family member 3, is a transcription factor (PMID: 30589983) and mediator of TGF beta signaling (PMID: 23139211) that plays a role in inflammation (PMID: 30659096). A fusion of SMAD3 with EWSR1 has been identified in spindle cell tumors (PMID: 29309308) and somatic mutations have been identified in colorectal cancer (PMID: 23139211).

snvindel.gene_function: NEIL1基因编码一个DNA糖基化酶Nei内切酶VIII类家族的一员，可通过清除受损的碱基（主要是氧化的嘧啶）启动碱基切除修复，参与DNA修复途径。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为移码突变，导致基因编码蛋白第191位氨基酸由苯丙氨酸突变为亮氨酸并于210位发生终止。
snvindel.gene_function_en: This gene is a member of the Nei endonuclease VIII-like gene family which encodes DNA glycosylases. The encoded enzyme participates in the DNA repair pathway by initiating base excision repair by removing damaged bases, primarily oxidized pyrimidines. Multiple transcript variants encoding different isoforms have been found for this gene.

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.05132（257/5008）、0.05591（6732/120402）、0.05561（13969/251184）、0.06865（2151/31334），iJGVD数据库无记录；COSMIC数据库记录65次BLM蛋白第868位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型L记录62次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: BLM（也称Bloom综合征蛋白）是一种DNA解旋酶，在维持基因组完整性方面起重要作用（PMID: 28232778）。Blm蛋白功能的丧失会导致布卢姆综合症以及患癌风险增加（PMID: 28232778）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 868th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Proline to Leucine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.05132(257/5008), 0.05591(6732/120402), 0.06613(96587/1460534), 0.06549(9956/152014), 0.00005706(7/122670) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=92393) is Benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). The COSMIC database records 65 times of amino acid change at the BLM protein position 868, of which the mutant P868L is recorded 62 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.05132(257/5008), 0.05591(6732/120402), 0.05561(13969/251184), 0.06865(2151/31334) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg database, respectively, with no record in the iJGVD database; the COSMIC database records 65 times of amino acid change at the BLM protein position 868, of which the mutant P868L is recorded 62 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: BLM, Bloom syndrome RecQ like helicase, is a DNA helicase that plays important roles in maintaining genomic integrity (PMID: 28232778). Loss of Blm protein function leads to Bloom's syndrome and increased cancer risk (PMID: 28232778).

snvindel.gene_function: SLX4基因编码SLX4蛋白，SLX4蛋白参与与DNA损伤修复相关的各种过程。SLX4蛋白定位于DNA上的双链断裂（DSB），通过招募其他参与DNA修复和基因组稳定性的复合物或蛋白质单体（如ERCC1/ERCC4与SLX1核酸内切酶复合物、MSH2/MSH3错配修复复合物以及端粒蛋白TRF2等）进而形成多蛋白复合物（PMID: 19596235, PMID: 19596236, PMID: 19595721, PMID: 19595722）。SLX4对部分类型的DNA修复至关重要，包括DNA链间交联（ICLs）、霍利迪连接（HJ）解析和端粒稳态（PMID: 24938228）。SLX4蛋白在各种肿瘤中突变频率较低，该基因的胚系突变是导致范可尼贫血其中一个亚型（FANCP）的病因之一（PMID: 21240275, PMID: 21240277）。SLX4被认为是家族性非BRCA1/2突变型乳腺癌患者的一种假定遗传因素，但尚未被研究证实（PMID: 22911665, PMID: 22401137, PMID: 21805310, PMID: 23211700）。

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: SLX4, SLX4 structure-specific endonuclease subunit, is a component of the endonuclease complexes response to DNA interstrand crosslink repair and replication fork failure (PMID: 21527828). SLX4 mutations have been identified in breast and ovarian cancers (PMID: 28423363, PMID: 21805310).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.04113（206/5008）、0.05839（7059/120884）、0.06132（89633/1461660）、0.04975（7575/152268）、0.0298（3642/122232）；COSMIC数据库记录17次SLX4蛋白第952位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型A952V记录7次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: SLX4基因编码SLX4蛋白，SLX4蛋白参与与DNA损伤修复相关的各种过程。SLX4蛋白定位于DNA上的双链断裂（DSB），通过招募其他参与DNA修复和基因组稳定性的复合物或蛋白质单体（如ERCC1/ERCC4与SLX1核酸内切酶复合物、MSH2/MSH3错配修复复合物以及端粒蛋白TRF2等）进而形成多蛋白复合物（PMID: 19596235, PMID: 19596236, PMID: 19595721, PMID: 19595722）。SLX4对部分类型的DNA修复至关重要，包括DNA链间交联（ICLs）、霍利迪连接（HJ）解析和端粒稳态（PMID: 24938228）。SLX4蛋白在各种肿瘤中突变频率较低，该基因的胚系突变是导致范可尼贫血其中一个亚型（FANCP）的病因之一（PMID: 21240275, PMID: 21240277）。SLX4被认为是家族性非BRCA1/2突变型乳腺癌患者的一种假定遗传因素，但尚未被研究证实（PMID: 22911665, PMID: 22401137, PMID: 21805310, PMID: 23211700）。

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg数据库AFR人群等位基因频率分别为0.0174（23/1322）、0.01807（188/10404）、0.01517（508/33478）、0.01673（695/41544），iJGVD数据库无记录；COSMIC数据库记录6次SLX4蛋白第237位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型Q记录2次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: SLX4基因编码SLX4蛋白，SLX4蛋白参与与DNA损伤修复相关的各种过程。SLX4蛋白定位于DNA上的双链断裂（DSB），通过招募其他参与DNA修复和基因组稳定性的复合物或蛋白质单体（如ERCC1/ERCC4与SLX1核酸内切酶复合物、MSH2/MSH3错配修复复合物以及端粒蛋白TRF2等）进而形成多蛋白复合物（PMID: 19596235, PMID: 19596236, PMID: 19595721, PMID: 19595722）。SLX4对部分类型的DNA修复至关重要，包括DNA链间交联（ICLs）、霍利迪连接（HJ）解析和端粒稳态（PMID: 24938228）。SLX4蛋白在各种肿瘤中突变频率较低，该基因的胚系突变是导致范可尼贫血其中一个亚型（FANCP）的病因之一（PMID: 21240275, PMID: 21240277）。SLX4被认为是家族性非BRCA1/2突变型乳腺癌患者的一种假定遗传因素，但尚未被研究证实（PMID: 22911665, PMID: 22401137, PMID: 21805310, PMID: 23211700）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 237th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Arginine to Glutamine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.0174(23/1322), 0.01807(188/10404), 0.01517(508/33478), 0.01673(695/41544) in the AFR population of the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively, with no record in the iJGVD database; the COSMIC database records 6 times of amino acid change at the SLX4 protein position 237, of which the mutant R237Q is recorded twice. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function: FUS，是一种DNA/RNA结合蛋白，在转录调节、RNA 剪接、RNA 转运、DNA 修复和损伤反应中发挥作用(PMID: 26822113, PMID: 25289647, PMID: 27731383)。 FUS 融合常见于粘液样/圆形细胞脂肪肉瘤、 尤因肉瘤等肉瘤亚型中存在(PMID: 28447036, PMID: 34465585, PMID: 34277226)。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为无义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第23位氨基酸由谷氨酰胺突变为终止密码子。
snvindel.gene_function_en: FUS, RNA-binding protein FUS, is a DNA/RNA-binding protein that plays a role in transcription, DNA repair, and RNA splicing (PMID: 26822113, PMID: 25289647). FUS fusions with DDIT3 are commonly observed in myxoid/round cell liposarcomas (PMID: 28447036).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在gnomADg数据库等位基因频率为0.000006578（1/152024），gnomADe数据库非始祖效应人群中无记录；OncoKB数据库报道为Likely Oncogenic，Cancer Hotspots数据库记录109次TP53蛋白第280位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型R280S记录8次。Cancer Hotspots数据库记录109次TP53蛋白第280位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型R280S记录8次；体外蛋白功能研究结果显示，该变异影响蛋白功能（PMID: 12826609, PMID: 29979965, PMID: 30224644）。基于预测工具BayesDel及aGVGD认为该变异为disease-causing，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: TP53基因属于抑癌基因（PMID: 30562755），编码蛋白参与细胞周期停滞和凋亡，是肿瘤中最常发生突变的基因（PMID: 10065147, PMID: 22713868）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 280th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Arginine to Serine.

evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项II期、开放标签、非随机研究（NCT01164995, PMID: 37236033），入组32名中位年龄为63岁（39–77岁）的TP53突变PROC（抗铂性卵巢癌）患者，使用卡铂AUC 5 mg/ml·min静脉注射和阿达沃司替布（Adavosertib）225 mg BID口服，为期2.5天，周期21天；主要目的是确定卡铂和阿达沃司替布的疗效和安全性。次要目标包括无进展生存期（PFS）、循环肿瘤细胞（CTC）变化等。研究结果显示，在29名可疗效评估的患者中，12名患者部分缓解（PR），客观ORR为41%（95% CI:23%-61%），中位PFS为5.6个月（95% CI:3.8-10.3）。研究认为：阿达沃司替布225 mg BID 2.5天和卡铂AUC 5联合使用是安全的，并在PROC患者中显示出抗肿瘤疗效。

一项多中心II期临床试验（NCT01357161, PMID: 32611648），试验分为2个部分，第一部分为开放标签的安全性试验，第二部分为随机、双盲、安慰剂对照的临床试验；总共入组121位TP53突变的铂敏感的卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌患者，分别使用Adavosertib(AZD1775)+卡铂+紫杉醇或安慰剂+卡铂+紫杉醇治疗。主要研究终点为ePFS（RECIST v1.1加强版评估的PFS）和安全性。研究结果：PFS对比中，Adavosertib+卡铂+紫杉醇 vs 安慰剂+卡铂+紫杉醇为7.9个月 vs 7.3个月（HR 0.63[95% CI 0.38-1.06];two-side P=0.080），满足预设的显著性阈值（P＜0.2）。

一项II期临床试验（NCT03588078, PMID: 33600210），入组52例携带TP53突变的患者，包括34例骨髓异常增长综合征患者（MDS）、18例急性髓系白血病患者（AML，包括7名骨髓母细胞超过30%的患者），使用APR-246（Eprenetapopt）联合阿扎胞苷进行治疗；主要终点为缓解率，次要终点为安全性、总生存期等参数。研究结果显示，MDS患者的总体缓解率为62%，包括47%的完全缓解率，中位缓解持续时间为10.4个月；AML患者的总体缓解率为33%，包括17%的完全缓解率（在骨髓母细胞小于和大于30%的急性髓系白血病中，总缓解率分别为27%、0%）。中位随访时间为9.7个月，MDS的中位OS为12.1个月，骨髓母细胞小于和大于30%的AML的中位OS分别为13.9和3.0个月。研究结论为：在极高危TP53m MDS和AML患者群体中，APR-246（Eprenetapopt）联合阿扎胞苷是安全的，并显示出比单独使用阿扎胞苷更高的缓解率，以及更长的总生存期。

一项I期临床试验（NCT01339871, PMID: 25669829），旨在探究培唑帕尼（Pazopanib）联合伏立诺他（Vorinostat）在晚期实体瘤患者中的最高耐受剂量和安全性。共纳入78例患者（肉瘤：n=23，结直肠癌：n=14，黑色素瘤：n=7，卵巢癌：n=5，肾细胞癌：n=4；肝癌：n=3，非小细胞肺癌：n=3，其他：n=19），接受11个剂量水平的联合治疗，结果表明：15例（19%）患者具有临床获益（PR：n=4，SD≥6个月：n=11），78例患者的中位PFS和中位OS分别为2.2个月、8.9个月；使用Cox回归模型确定临床获益的多变量分析中显示TP53突变状态与临床获益有关，36例患者接受了TP53突变检测，与TP53野生型的患者（n=25）相比，TP53突变型患者（n=11）的临床获益率更高（45% vs 16%）、中位PFS更长（3.5个月 vs 2.0个月）、中位OS更长（12.7个月 vs 7.4个月），从联合治疗中获益的TP53突变型患者为：携带TP53 R213*、G245S的结直肠癌患者，携带TP53 R175H、DBDdel、H193R的肉瘤患者。所有患者中未出现与治疗相关的死亡事件，推荐的II期剂量为培唑帕尼（600 mg/天）联合伏立诺他（300 mg/天）。

一项I期、开放标签、非随机三组剂量递增的临床试验中（NCT00648648，PMID: 27601554），入组202名晚期实体瘤患者，组1（n=9）先接受单剂量Adavosertib/AZD1775（观察14天，8人加入组2A），组2接受单剂量Adavosertib（组2A，n=43）或每日两次五倍剂量/每日一次双倍剂量（组2B，n=158）联合一种化疗（吉西他滨、顺铂或卡铂）。研究结果显示，在176名可评估疗效的患者中，94名（53%）患者病情稳定，17名（10%）患者达到部分缓解；TP53突变患者（n=19）中4名达到部分缓解（PR），应答率为21%，而TP53野生型患者（n=33）为12%。研究结论为，Adavosertib单剂联合化疗安全、耐受性好；TP53突变患者的应答率更高一些，但仍需扩大样本量进一步评估。

snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.000006578(1/152024) in the gnomADg database, with no record among non-founder effect populations of the gnomADe database; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=988616) is Conflicting classifications of pathogenicity (Pathogenic, likely pathogenic, uncertain significance) in germline classification (review status: one star). The Cancer Hotspots database records 109 times of amino acid change at the TP53 protein position 280, of which the mutant R280S is recorded 8 times; the in vitro protein functional studies demonstrate that this variant affects protein function (PMID: 12826609, PMID: 29979965, PMID: 30224644). Based on the prediction tools REVEL and aGVGD, this variant is considered disease-causing, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.000006578(1/152024) in the gnomADg database, with no record among non-founder effect populations of the gnomADe database; this variant is reported as Likely Oncogenic in the OncoKB database, the Cancer Hotspots database records 109 times of amino acid change at the TP53 protein position 280, of which the mutant R280S is recorded 8 times. The Cancer Hotspots database records 109 times of amino acid change at the TP53 protein position 280, of which the mutant R280S is recorded 8 times; the in vitro protein functional studies demonstrate that this variant affects protein function (PMID: 12826609, PMID: 29979965, PMID: 30224644). Based on the prediction tools REVEL and aGVGD, this variant is considered disease-causing, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第280位氨基酸由精氨酸突变为丝氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: TP53, cellular tumor antigen p53, is a tumor suppressor (PMID: 30562755) involved in cell cycle arrest and apoptosis, and is the most frequently mutated gene in cancer (PMID: 10065147, PMID: 22713868). TP53 germline mutations are common in Li-Fraumeni syndrome (PMID: 30239254) and somatic missense mutations are frequent in almost all cancer types cancers (PMID: 30224644) and are also implicated in chemoresistance (PMID: 9927204, PMID: 24065105, PMID: 27066457).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.736（3686/5008）、0.8306（100442/120934）、0.8667（1250127/1442426）、0.8131（123271/151606）、0.641（78458/122390）；CKB数据库报道为unknown，COSMIC数据库记录7次AURKB蛋白第298位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型T记录5次。
snvindel.gene_function: AURKB（aurora B激酶）是一种丝氨酸-苏氨酸蛋白激酶，在细胞分裂过程中在分离子代染色单体中起作用，并在调节基因组稳定性中起作用（PMID: 28095398）。 在实体瘤如非小细胞肺癌（PMID: 28095398）和白血病（PMID: 22940834;PMID: 26199132）中，Aurkb的过表达与预后不良有关。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 298th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Methionine to Threonine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.736(3686/5008), 0.8306(100442/120934), 0.8667(1250127/1442426), 0.8131(123271/151606), 0.641(78458/122390) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the COSMIC database records 21 times of amino acid change at the AURKB protein position 298, of which the mutant M298T is recorded 18 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool BayesDel, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

Based on the ensemble prediction tool BayesDel, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: AURKB, aurora B kinase, is a serine-threonine protein kinase, which plays a role in the separation of daughter chromatids during cell division and functions in regulation of genomic stability (PMID: 28095398). Overexpression of Aurkb has been associated with poor prognosis in solid tumors, such as non-small cell lung cancer (PMID: 28095398), and in leukemia (PMID: 22940834, PMID: 26199132).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.4521（2264/5008）、0.607（72992/120254）、0.6544（955482/1460050）、0.5224（79420/152036）、0.508（62319/122682）；CKB数据库报道为no effect - predicted，OncoKB数据库报道为Likely Neutral，COSMIC数据库记录20次ERBB2蛋白第1170位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型P1170A记录20次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: ERBB2基因属于原癌基因，编码蛋白是具有受体酪氨酸激酶活性的跨膜糖蛋白，属于表皮生长因子受体家族，又称为表皮生长因子受体2，也属于受体酪氨酸激酶家族。ERBB2蛋白没有与配体结合的结构域，但可以与家族成员形成异源二聚体来结合配体，从而通过磷酸化激活下游蛋白如MAPK蛋白和PI3K蛋白。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 1170th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Proline to Alanine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.4521(2264/5008), 0.607(72992/120254), 0.6544(955482/1460050), 0.5224(79420/152036), 0.508(62319/122682) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; this variant is reported as no effect - predicted in the CKB database, and Likely Neutral in the OncoKB database, the COSMIC database records 20 times of amino acid change at the ERBB2 protein position 1170, of which the mutant P1170A is recorded 20 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.4521(2264/5008), 0.607(72992/120254), 0.6544(955482/1460050), 0.5224(79420/152036), 0.508(62319/122682) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; this variant is reported as no effect - predicted in the CKB database, and Likely Neutral in the OncoKB database, the COSMIC database records 20 times of amino acid change at the ERBB2 protein position 1170, of which the mutant P1170A is recorded 20 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.4521（2264/5008）、0.607（72992/120254）、0.6544（955482/1460050）、0.5224（79420/152036）、0.508（62319/122682）；CKB数据库报道为no effect - predicted，OncoKB数据库报道为Likely Neutral，COSMIC数据库记录20次ERBB2蛋白第1170位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型P1170A记录20次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第1170位氨基酸由脯氨酸突变为丙氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: ERBB2 (HER2), erb-b2 receptor tyrosine kinase 2, is an EGFR receptor tyrosine kinase that activates PI3K-AKT-mTOR and RAS-RAF-MEK-ERK pathways, therefore regulating growth and transformation (PMID: 17471238). ERBB2 (HER2) amplification, overexpression, and activation has been implicated in several tumor types (PMID: 17471238).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.07827（392/5008）、0.09743（11676/119842）、0.09723（24092/247780）、0.1087（3409/31362），iJGVD数据库无记录；COSMIC数据库记录3次RNF43蛋白第686位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型R记录2次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: RNF43，无名指蛋白43，是一种E3泛素连接酶，靶向Frizzled受体，导致Frizzled的溶酶体降解和Wnt信号的负调控（PMID: 25460271）。RNF43突变与多种肿瘤类型有关，在结直肠癌和子宫内膜癌中很常见（PMID: 25460271, PMID: 25344691）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 686th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Proline to Arginine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.07827(392/5008), 0.09743(11676/119842), 0.1143(166749/1459162), 0.1117(17010/152304), 0.00006535(8/122414) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=1169209) is Benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.07827(392/5008), 0.09743(11676/119842), 0.09723(24092/247780), 0.1087(3409/31362) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg database, respectively, with no record in the iJGVD database; the COSMIC database records 4 times of amino acid change at the RNF43 protein position 686, of which the mutant P686R is recorded 3 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.07827（392/5008）、0.09743（11676/119842）、0.1143（166749/1459162）、0.1117（17010/152304）、0.00006535（8/122414）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=1169209）的胚系突变分类为Benign（可靠度为两颗星）。COSMIC数据库记录4次RNF43蛋白第686位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型R记录3次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。

snvindel.gene_function_en: RNF43, ring finger protein 43, is an E3 ubiquitin ligase that targets Frizzled receptors, resulting in lysosomal degradation of Frizzleds and negative regulation of Wnt signaling (PMID: 25460271). RNF43 mutations are associated with several tumor types, and are frequent in colorectal and endometrial cancer (PMID: 25460271, PMID: 25344691).

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

RNF43 mutations are associated with several tumor types, and are frequent in colorectal and endometrial cancer (PMID: 25460271, PMID: 25344691).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在ExAC、gnomADe数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.000009746（1/102602）、0.000008255（2/242278），1000G、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库无记录；COSMIC数据库记录4次AXIN2蛋白第702位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型H记录1次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为disease-causing，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: AXIN2即毒素2，是调节β-catenin降解的Axin的同源物（PMID: 9554582）。 在大肠癌，卵巢癌，子宫内膜癌和肝癌中已发现AXIN2突变（PMID: 15735151）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 702nd amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Arginine to Histidine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.000009746(1/102602), 0.000001369(2/1460942) in the ExAC, gnomADe databases, respectively, with no record in the 1000G, gnomADg or iJGVD databases; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=641256) is Uncertain significance in germline classification (review status: two stars). Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered disease-causing, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.000009746(1/102602), 0.000008255(2/242278) in the ExAC, gnomADe database, respectively, with no record in the 1000G, gnomADg or iJGVD databases; the COSMIC database records 4 times of amino acid change at the AXIN2 protein position 702, of which the mutant R702H is recorded once. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered disease-causing, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: AXIN2, axin 2, is a homologue of Axin that regulates beta-catenin degradation (PMID: 9554852). AXIN2 mutations have been identified in colorectal, ovarian, endometrial, and liver cancers (PMID: 15735151).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.2558（1281/5008）、0.1885（18576/98570）、0.1393（197513/1418070）、0.2124（32343/152252）、0.2267（27592/121714）；CKB数据库报道为unknown，COSMIC数据库记录4次DOT1L蛋白第1418位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型L记录4次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: DOT1L是一个组蛋白H3K79的甲基化转移酶，对组蛋白3赖氨酸79残基进行甲基化（PMID: 12123582）。H3K79甲基化与双链断裂的DNA损伤反应有关（PMID: 15525939）。这种修饰也与各种细胞和发育过程有关，包括细胞分裂、胚胎发育、减数分裂和造血（PMID: 21724828, PMID: 24526115）。H3K79甲基化修改了染色质结构，可以促进转录活动（PMID: 18285465）。在白血病中，这种修饰通过阻止抑制性Sirtuin1（SIRT1）复合物的结合而促进转录活性（PMID: 25822366）。在混合系白血病（MLL）易位白血病中，DOT1L被证明对MLL融合蛋白的转化活性很重要，DOT1L的抑制剂已被用于治疗该亚型（PMID: 18977325, PMID: 15851025, PMID: 21741596）。在乳腺癌中，DOT1L已被证明与c-Myc-p300复合物共同促进上皮细胞向间质转化，在临床特征上，DOT1L与更具侵略性的疾病有关（PMID: 26199140）。DOT1L的突变已在包括结肠癌、小细胞肺癌和鳞状头颈癌的大规模测序工作中被发现（PMID: 22810696, PMID: 26168399, PMID: 25056374）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 1418th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Valine to Leucine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.2558(1281/5008), 0.1885(18576/98570), 0.1393(197513/1418070), 0.2124(32343/152252), 0.2267(27592/121714) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the COSMIC database records 7 times of amino acid change at the DOT1L protein position 1418, of which the mutant V1418L is recorded 7 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.2558（1281/5008）、0.1885（18576/98570）、0.1393（197513/1418070）、0.2124（32343/152252）、0.2267（27592/121714）；CKB数据库报道为unknown，COSMIC数据库记录4次DOT1L蛋白第1418位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型L记录4次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。

snvindel.gene_function_en: DOT1L, DOT1-like histone H3K79 methyltransferase, mediates histone H3 methylation at lysine 79, a methylation state associated with active gene transcription, and is associated with pathogenesis of mixed lineage leukemia (MLL)-rearranged leukemia (PMID: 24854991). DOT1L amplification and increased protein expression has been reported in pancreatic adenocarcinoma (PMID: 28529740).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomAD、iJGVD数据库无记录；Cancer Hotspots、COSMIC数据库无记录。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为disease-causing，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: GNA11基因属于原癌基因，编码的蛋白属于鸟嘌呤核苷酸结合蛋白（G蛋白）的家族成员，在不同的跨膜信号系统中作为调节器或传感器。GNAQ与GNA11形成的复合物为G蛋白α亚基，这两个基因调控细胞分裂、增强MEK（有丝分裂原活化蛋白激酶的激酶）蛋白活性（PMID: 27148356）。GNA11热点突变损害内在的GNA11 GTP酶活性，导致下游通路组成性激活（PMID: 23640210; PMID: 27148356; PMID: 29209985）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 63rd amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Histidine to Arginine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: This variant is not recorded in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomAD or iJGVD databases; the Cancer Hotspots database and the COSMIC database have no record for this variant. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered disease-causing, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: This variant is not recorded in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomAD or iJGVD databases; the Cancer Hotspots database and the COSMIC database have no record for this variant. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered disease-causing, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomAD、iJGVD数据库无记录；Cancer Hotspots、COSMIC数据库无记录。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为disease-causing，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。

snvindel.gene_function_en: GNA11, G protein subunit alpha 11, is a guanine nucleotide-binding protein (G protein) subunit, which is activated following ligand binding to G-protein coupled receptors and functions in cell signaling (PMID: 27148356). GNA11 hotspot mutations impair intrinsic Gna11 GTPase activity, resulting in constitutive pathway activation and are common in uveal melanoma (PMID: 23640210, PMID: 27148356, PMID: 29209985).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomAD、iJGVD数据库无记录；COSMIC数据库记录2次INSR蛋白第173位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型V173M记录2次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function:
INSR，胰岛素受体，编码受体酪氨酸激酶，在配体激活时，导致调节葡萄糖、脂质、能量和组织生成(PMID: 23457259, PMID: 24384568)。
INSR常在前列腺癌、乳腺癌、卵巢癌等多种癌症中过表达(PMID: 18785179, PMID: 19074892, PMID: 12193537)。

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: INSR, insulin receptor, encodes for a receptor tyrosine kinase, which, upon ligand activation, leads to regulation of glucose, lipids, and energy, and tissue generation (PMID: 23457259, PMID: 24384568). INSR is often overexpressed in multiple cancer types including prostate, breast, and ovarian cancer (PMID: 18785179, PMID: 19074892, PMID: 12193537).

snvindel.gene_function: MUC16，细胞表面相关的粘蛋白16，也被称为CA125，是一种高分子量的跨膜糖蛋白。Muc16的过表达与卵巢癌、胰腺癌和乳腺癌有关（PMID: 25002120），在高级别浆液性卵巢癌中观察到MUC16融合（PMID: 31745703），Muc16突变在胃癌（PMID: 30389134，PMID: 30098163）和子宫内膜癌（PMID: 30288353）中较常见。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第13460位氨基酸由丙氨酸突变为谷氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: MUC16, mucin 16, cell surface associated, also known as CA125, is a high molecular weight transmembrane glycoprotein expressed by epithelial cells for protection and lubrication (PMID: 25002120) in the maintenance of mucosa (PMID: 29999426). Overexpression of Muc16 is associated with ovarian, pancreatic, and breast cancers (PMID: 25002120), while fusions have been observed in high-grade serous ovarian cancer (PMID: 31745703) and Muc16 mutations are common in gastric (PMID: 30389134, PMID: 30098163) and endometrial cancers (PMID: 30288353).

snvindel.gene_function_en: MUC16, mucin 16, cell surface associated, also known as CA125, is a high molecular weight transmembrane glycoprotein expressed by epithelial cells for protection and lubrication (PMID: 25002120) in the maintenance of mucosa (PMID: 29999426). Overexpression of Muc16 is associated with ovarian, pancreatic, and breast cancers (PMID: 25002120), while fusions have been observed in high-grade serous ovarian cancer (PMID: 31745703) and Muc16 mutations are common in gastric (PMID: 30389134, PMID: 30098163) and endometrial cancers (PMID: 30288353).

snvindel.gene_function: CIC，是蛋白质 capicua 的同源物，是转录抑制子 HMG-box 超家族的成员。 CIC 突变与少突胶质细胞瘤相关，CIC 融合与肉瘤相关(PMID: 21817013, PMID: 22588899, PMID: 16717057)。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为移码突变，导致基因编码蛋白第509位氨基酸由脯氨酸突变为组氨酸并于522位发生终止。
snvindel.gene_function_en: CIC, protein capicua homolog, is a member of the HMG-box superfamily of transcriptional repressors. CIC mutations are associated with oligodendroglioma and CIC fusions are associated with sarcoma (PMID: 21817013; PMID: 22588899; PMID: 16717057).

snvindel.gene_function: ERCC1基因编码蛋白是一种DNA核酸内切酶。该蛋白通过与核酸内切酶ERCC4相互作用，形成ERCC1-XPF DNA修复复合物（PMID: 23623389），在DNA核苷酸切除修复过程中发挥重要作用（PMID: 8811092, PMID: 10320375）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为3'UTR区突变。
snvindel.gene_function_en: ERCC1, ERCC excision repair 1, endonuclease non-catalytic subunit, forms part of an endonuclease complex that functions in DNA repair (PMID: 26074087). ERCC1 expression level has been correlated with response to platinum-based therapies in various tumor types, including ovarian, non-small cell lung, and head and neck cancers (PMID: 26804248, PMID: 26179868, PMID: 26870207).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.272（1362/5008）、0.1963（23831/121384）、0.162（236766/1461612）、0.1787（27172/152062）、0.5424（66527/122646）；COSMIC数据库记录4次IFNGR2蛋白第64位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型R记录3次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: IFNGR2基因是一种蛋白质编码基因，编码γ-干扰素受体的非配体结合β链。其相关途径包括全反式维甲酸介导的细胞凋亡和结核病。与IFNGR2相关的疾病包括由于Ifngammar2部分缺失导致的免疫缺陷28和常染色体显性遗传孟德尔易感性分枝杆菌病。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 64th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Glutamine to Arginine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.272(1362/5008), 0.1963(23831/121384), 0.162(236766/1461612), 0.1787(27172/152062), 0.5424(66527/122646) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the COSMIC database records 11 times of amino acid change at the IFNGR2 protein position 64, of which the mutant Q64R is recorded 10 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.272(1362/5008), 0.1963(23831/121384), 0.162(236766/1461612), 0.1787(27172/152062), 0.5424(66527/122646) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the COSMIC database records 11 times of amino acid change at the IFNGR2 protein position 64, of which the mutant Q64R is recorded 10 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.272（1362/5008）、0.1963（23831/121384）、0.162（236766/1461612）、0.1787（27172/152062）、0.5424（66527/122646）；COSMIC数据库记录4次IFNGR2蛋白第64位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型R记录3次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第64位氨基酸由谷氨酰胺突变为精氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: IFNGR2 (Interferon Gamma Receptor 2) is a Protein Coding gene. This gene (IFNGR2) encodes the non-ligand-binding beta chain of the gamma interferon receptor. Among its related pathways are all-trans-Retinoic Acid Mediated Apoptosis and Tuberculosis. Diseases associated with IFNGR2 include Immunodeficiency 28 and Autosomal Dominant Mendelian Susceptibility To Mycobacterial Diseases Due To Partial Ifngammar2 Deficiency.

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomAD、iJGVD数据库无记录；Cancer Hotspots、COSMIC数据库无记录。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: U2AF1基因属于原癌基因，编码剪接因子亚基蛋白U2AF35，与U2AF65共同调控前mRNA内含子的去除，产生成熟的mRNA并在蛋白合成过程中被翻译(PMID: 1388271)。U2AF1突变常见于骨髓增生异常综合征（MDS）、急性髓性白血病和肺腺癌 (PMID: 22389253;PMID: 22158538;PMID: 22323480)。MDS中的U2AF1突变与转变为继发性急性髓细胞白血病的风险增加相关。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 140th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Isoleucine to Leucine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: This variant is not recorded in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomAD or iJGVD databases; the Cancer Hotspots database and the COSMIC database have no record for this variant. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: This variant is not recorded in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomAD or iJGVD databases; the Cancer Hotspots database and the COSMIC database have no record for this variant. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomAD、iJGVD数据库无记录；Cancer Hotspots、COSMIC数据库无记录。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第140位氨基酸由异亮氨酸突变为亮氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: U2AF1, U2 small nuclear RNA auxiliary factor 1, is a 35 kDa subunit splicing factor, that functions in 3' splice site recognition to regulate expression of genes involved in hematological and solid tumor development (PMID: 2963698, PMID: 28986033). U2AF1 is frequently mutated in myelodysplatic syndrome (MDS), chronic myelomonocytic leukemia, atypical CML, acute myeloid leukemia, and lung adenocarcinoma (PMID: 23645565, PMID: 22678168, PMID: 24498085, PMID: 30138727, PMID: 29991672).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.1665（834/5008）、0.2813（20952/74490），gnomAD、iJGVD数据库无记录；COSMIC数据库记录7次SIK1蛋白第15位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型S记录7次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: SIK1基因编码一个丝氨酸/苏氨酸蛋白激酶，属于单磷酸腺苷激活的激酶（AMPK）亚家族的成员，含有一个泛素相关（UBA）结构域。SIK1在保守的信号转导通路中发挥作用。该基因的突变与早期婴儿癫痫性脑病30有关。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 15th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Glycine to Serine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.1665(834/5008), 0.2813(20952/74490) in the 1000G, ExAC databases, respectively, with no record in the gnomAD or iJGVD databases; the COSMIC database records 12 times of amino acid change at the SIK1 protein position 15, of which the mutant G15S is recorded 12 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.1665(834/5008), 0.2813(20952/74490) in the 1000G, ExAC databases, respectively, with no record in the gnomAD or iJGVD databases; the COSMIC database records 12 times of amino acid change at the SIK1 protein position 15, of which the mutant G15S is recorded 12 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.1665（834/5008）、0.2813（20952/74490），gnomAD、iJGVD数据库无记录；COSMIC数据库记录7次SIK1蛋白第15位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型S记录7次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第15位氨基酸由甘氨酸突变为丝氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: This gene encodes a serine/threonine protein kinase that contains a ubiquitin-associated (UBA) domain. The encoded protein is a member of the adenosine monophosphate-activated kinase (AMPK) subfamily of kinases that play a role in conserved signal transduction pathways. A mutation in this gene is associated with early infantile epileptic encephalopathy 30.

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.000008861（1/112860）、0.00002141（5/233514）、0.00003184（1/31408），1000G、iJGVD数据库无记录（ExAC数据库数据未通过过滤标准）；CKB数据库报道为no effect - predicted，OncoKB数据库报道为Unknown，COSMIC数据库记录2次CHEK2蛋白第490位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型E记录2次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: CHEK2基因属于抑癌基因，编码蛋白检查点激酶2，是一种丝氨酸/苏氨酸激酶，在DNA损伤检查点通路中起着不可或缺的作用，可防止受损细胞继续进行细胞周期。ATR激酶和ATM激酶通过磷酸化激活CHEK2蛋白以响应DNA损伤（PMID: 12781359）。激活后的CHEK2蛋白会作为一种效应激酶，介导下游信号，导致多种细胞反应，包括细胞周期检查点激活、细胞周期停滞、DNA修复和/或细胞凋亡（PMID: 25404613）。CHEK2蛋白通过维持染色体稳定性在有丝分裂过程中也发挥着重要作用（PMID: 20364141）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 490th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Aspartic acid to Glutamic acid.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.000008861(1/112860), 0.00002103(30/1426374), 0.00003286(5/152154) in the ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively, with no record in the 1000G or iJGVD databases (data in the ExAC database fails the filter); the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=128062) is Conflicting classifications of pathogenicity (Uncertain significance, likely benign) in germline classification (review status: one star). Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing. Functional studies in yeast have shown that this variation is Benign (PMID: 30851065).
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.000008861(1/112860), 0.00002141(5/233514), 0.00003184(1/31408) in the ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg database, respectively, with no record in the 1000G or iJGVD databases(data in the ExAC database fail the filter); this variant is reported as no effect - predicted  in the CKB database, the COSMIC database records twice of amino acid change at the CHEK2 protein position 490, of which the mutant D490E is recorded twice. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.000008861（1/112860）、0.00002103（30/1426374）、0.00003286（5/152154），1000G、iJGVD数据库无记录（ExAC数据未通过过滤标准）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=128062）的胚系突变分类为Conflicting classifications of pathogenicity（Uncertain significance, likely benign）（可靠度为一颗星）。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。酵母体内功能研究表明，该变异为Benign（PMID: 30851065）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第490位氨基酸由天冬氨酸突变为谷氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: CHEK2, checkpoint kinase 2, is a serine-threonine protein kinase and a putative tumor suppressor (PMID: 30562755) required for checkpoint-mediated cell cycle arrest and activation of DNA repair and apoptosis in response to DNA damage (PMID: 28553140). CHEK2 alterations are associated with predisposition to certain human cancers, including breast, prostate, kidney, and colon (PMID: 24880342; PMID: 24713400, PMID: 28553140).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在gnomADe、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.000001374（2/1455452）、0.000008177（1/122298），1000G、ExAC、gnomADg数据库无记录；OncoKB数据库报道为Unknown，COSMIC数据库记录1次ZNRF3蛋白第858位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型M记录1次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: ZNRF3是一个跨膜的E3泛素连接酶，负向调节WNT信号通路（PMID: 30692207, PMID: 24225776, PMID: 22575959）。WNT信号传导在WNT受体和共同受体（包括Frizzled（FZD）和LRP5/6）的配体参与后被激活，导致下游信号传导增加（PMID: 30692207, PMID: 24225776, PMID: 22575959）。ZNRF3通过泛素介导的内吞作用使FZD和LRP6降解，从而拮抗WNT信号传导（PMID: 30692207, PMID: 22575959, PMID: 24349440）。其他WNT信号分子，包括磷蛋白Dishevelled（DSH），都需要ZNRF3介导在膜上的活动（PMID: 22575959, PMID: 22895187, PMID: 25891077）。此外，RSpondin（RSPO）家族的蛋白，作为WNT途径的激动剂，可以促进ZNRF3的膜清除和FZD的稳定性，导致WNT途径的激活（PMID: 22575959, PMID: 22895187, PMID: 24165923, PMID: 29769720）。WNT信号是组织平衡、增殖和维持干细胞生态位的重要调节器（PMID: 22895187, PMID: 27088858, PMID: 30692207），ZNRF3表达的损失导致肠道干细胞区的扩张（PMID: 22895187）。在各种癌症类型中已发现ZNRF3的下调，ZNRF3过表达能导致细胞增殖减少，这表明ZNRF3作为肿瘤抑制剂的功能（PMID: 29088784）。在肾上腺皮质癌和锯齿状途径的结直肠癌等患者中发现ZNRF3的功能丧失体细胞突变和缺失（PMID: 24747642, PMID: 25490274, PMID: 29879932, PMID: 27661107, PMID: 24236197）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 858th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Threonine to Methionine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.000001374(2/1455452), 0.000008177(1/122298) in the gnomADe, iJGVD databases, respectively, with no record in the 1000G, ExAC or gnomADg databases; the COSMIC database records once of amino acid change at the ZNRF3 protein position 858, of which the mutant T858M is recorded once. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.000001374(2/1455452), 0.000008177(1/122298) in the gnomADe, iJGVD databases, respectively, with no record in the 1000G, ExAC or gnomADg databases; the COSMIC database records once of amino acid change at the ZNRF3 protein position 858, of which the mutant T858M is recorded once. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在gnomADe、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.000001374（2/1455452）、0.000008177（1/122298），1000G、ExAC、gnomADg数据库无记录；OncoKB数据库报道为Unknown，COSMIC数据库记录1次ZNRF3蛋白第858位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型M记录1次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第858位氨基酸由苏氨酸突变为蛋氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: ZNRF3, E3 ubiquitin-protein ligase ZNRF3, is a E3 ubiquitin ligase that negatively regulates the Wnt receptor pathway by degrading frizzled and LRP6 (PMID: 22575959). ZNRF3 is a putative tumor suppressor that has been observed to have decreased expression in papillary thyroid carcinoma (PMID: 27448298) and mutations have been reported in colorectal cancer (PMID: 27661107).

snvindel.gene_function: EWSR1，EWS RNA结合蛋白1，是一种多功能蛋白，参与多种细胞过程，包括基因表达、细胞信号传导、RNA加工和转运(PMID: 21816343)。该蛋白包括一个N末端转录激活域和一个C末端RNA结合域。该基因与编码转录因子的各种基因之间的染色体易位导致参与肿瘤发生的嵌合蛋白的产生。这些嵌合蛋白通常由该蛋白的N末端转录激活域与转录因子蛋白的C末端DNA结合域融合而成。该基因的突变，特别是t(11,22)(q24,q12)易位，已知可引起尤因肉瘤、神经外胚层和各种其他肿瘤(PMID: 23329308, PMID: 27740934)。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第75位氨基酸由苏氨酸突变为异亮氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: EWSR1, RNA-binding protein EWS, belongs to the TET family of RNA and DNA binding proteins and is involved in multiple cellular functions including gene expression and RNA processing (PMID: 21816343). EWSR1 fusions are frequently observed in sarcomas (PMID: 23329308, PMID: 27740934).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.2234（1119/5008）、0.2959（35899/121310）、0.2886（421891/1461706）、0.2308（35108/152142）、0.02534（3105/122538）；CKB数据库报道为unknown，COSMIC数据库记录4次EP300蛋白第997位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型V记录4次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: EP300，E1A结合蛋白p300，在组蛋白和其他蛋白的乙酰化中起作用，并起转录共激活剂的作用，并且经常在各种肿瘤类型中突变（PMID: 25111821;PMID: 24622842）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 997th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Isoleucine to Valine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.2234(1119/5008), 0.2959(35899/121310), 0.2886(421891/1461706), 0.2308(35108/152142), 0.02534(3105/122538) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the COSMIC database records 6 times of amino acid change at the EP300 protein position 997, of which the mutant I997V is recorded 6 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.2234(1119/5008), 0.2959(35899/121310), 0.2886(421891/1461706), 0.2308(35108/152142), 0.02534(3105/122538) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the COSMIC database records 6 times of amino acid change at the EP300 protein position 997, of which the mutant I997V is recorded 6 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.2234（1119/5008）、0.2959（35899/121310）、0.2886（421891/1461706）、0.2308（35108/152142）、0.02534（3105/122538）；CKB数据库报道为unknown，COSMIC数据库记录4次EP300蛋白第997位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型V记录4次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第971位氨基酸由异亮氨酸突变为缬氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: EP300, E1A binding protein p300, functions in acetylation of histones and other proteins, as well as acting as a transcriptional co-activator, and is frequently mutated in various tumor types (PMID: 25111821, PMID: 24622842).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异为蛋白长度改变的变异。该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.02358（89/3775）、0.01154（826/71559）、0.018（19662/1092467）、0.03046（3402/111693）、0.003049（311/102016）；OncoKB数据库报道为Unknown，COSMIC数据库记录13次ZRSR2蛋白第447位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型S447_R448dup记录10次。
snvindel.gene_function: ZRSR2（锌指CCCH型，RNA结合基序和富含丝氨酸/精氨酸 2）是剪接体的一部分，在3'剪接位点识别中起作用，因此调节Mapk/Erk途径中E2F转录因子和基因的表达（PMID: 21041408, PMID: 25586593）。ZRSR2突变与骨髓增生异常综合症和急性髓细胞性白血病相关，尤其是在男性中（PMID: 21909114, PMID: 26769228）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a duplication mutation, which repeates the 447th to 448th amino acids of the gene-encoded protein.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: This variant causes a change in protein length. The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.02358(89/3775), 0.01154(826/71559), 0.018(19662/1092467), 0.03046(3402/111693), 0.003049(311/102016) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the COSMIC database records 25 times of amino acid change at the ZRSR2 protein position 447, of which the mutant S447_R448dup is recorded 22 times.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: This variant causes a change in protein length. The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.02358(89/3775), 0.01154(826/71559), 0.018(19662/1092467), 0.03046(3402/111693), 0.003049(311/102016) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the COSMIC database records 25 times of amino acid change at the ZRSR2 protein position 447, of which the mutant S447_R448dup is recorded 22 times.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异为蛋白长度改变的变异。该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.02358（89/3775）、0.01154（826/71559）、0.018（19662/1092467）、0.03046（3402/111693）、0.003049（311/102016）；OncoKB数据库报道为Unknown，COSMIC数据库记录13次ZRSR2蛋白第447位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型S447_R448dup记录10次。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为重复突变，导致基因编码蛋白第447位到448位氨基酸重复。
snvindel.gene_function_en: ZRSR2, zinc finger CCCH-type, RNA binding motif and serine/arginine rich 2, is a component of the splicesome that functions in 3' splice site recognition, therefore regulates expression of E2F transcription factors and genes in the Mapk/Erk pathways (PMID: 21041408, PMID: 25586593). ZRSR2 mutations are associated with myelodysplastic syndromes and acute myeloid leukemia, particularly in males (PMID: 21909114, PMID: 26769228).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.1555（587/3775）、0.1376（11544/83898）、0.1286（141123/1097410）、0.1022（11367/111236）、0.478（48785/102068）；CKB数据库报道为loss of function - predicted，COSMIC数据库记录47次KDM6A蛋白第726位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型K记录45次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: KDM6A属于抑癌基因，编码赖氨酸特异性脱甲基酶6A，是一种Jumonji结构域组蛋白去甲基化酶，主要功能为通过染色质重塑调节基因转录以影响细胞生长和分化。KDM6A中的胚系突变和点突变可导致Kabuki综合征，其特征在于典型的面部特征、骨骼异常、皮纹异常、轻度至中度智力残疾和出生后身材矮小（PMID:22197486;PMID:22840376; PMID:22901312;PMID:23076834）。目前在多种恶性肿瘤中发现KDM6A失活突变，如多发性骨髓瘤、食道鳞状细胞癌、透明细胞肾细胞癌、成神经管细胞瘤、腺样囊性癌和尿路上皮膀胱癌等（PMID:19330029;PMID:22722829;PMID:22832583;PMID:21248752;PMID:23685749;PMID:24476821;PMID:21822268;PMID:25092538;PMID:25225064）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 726th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Threonine to Lysine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.1555(587/3775), 0.1376(11544/83898), 0.1286(141123/1097410), 0.1022(11367/111236), 0.478(48785/102068) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; this variant is reported as loss of function - predicted  in the CKB database, the COSMIC database records 49 times of amino acid change at the KDM6A protein position 726, of which the mutant T726K is recorded 47 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.1555(587/3775), 0.1376(11544/83898), 0.1286(141123/1097410), 0.1022(11367/111236), 0.478(48785/102068) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; this variant is reported as loss of function - predicted  in the CKB database, the COSMIC database records 49 times of amino acid change at the KDM6A protein position 726, of which the mutant T726K is recorded 47 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.1555（587/3775）、0.1376（11544/83898）、0.1286（141123/1097410）、0.1022（11367/111236）、0.478（48785/102068）；CKB数据库报道为loss of function - predicted，COSMIC数据库记录47次KDM6A蛋白第726位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型K记录45次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第726位氨基酸由苏氨酸突变为赖氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: KDM6A, lysine demethylase 6A, is a Jumonji domain histone demethylase that targets H3 lysine 27 (H3K27) to regulate gene transcription through chromatin remodeling and plays a role in cell growth and differentiation (PMID: 30753822). Altered expression of Kdm6a has been reported in HNSCC and bladder cancer (PMID: 25275298, PMID: 25225064) and mutations have been observed in acute myeloid leukemia, bladder carcinoma, breast cancer, chronic myeloid leukemia, colorectal adenocarcinoma, endometrial adenocarcinoma, clear cell renal cell carcinoma, and glioblastoma (PMID: 30753822).

snvindel.gene_function: GATA1基因编码的蛋白为GATA结合蛋白1，该蛋白是一种转录激活因子或抑制因子，在红系发育中起重要作用。GATA1基因突变与唐氏综合征白血病和白血病有关（PMID: 25435116;PMID: 2480866）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第332位氨基酸由甘氨酸突变为丝氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: GATA1, GATA binding protein 1, is a transcriptional activator or repressor, which plays a role in erythroid development. GATA1 mutations are associated with Down Syndrome preleukemia and leukemia (PMID: 25435116; PMID: 24880866).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在gnomADg数据库AMI人群等位基因频率为0.02041（14/686），gnomADe数据库ASJ人群等位基因频率为0.01137（220/19345），1000G数据库EUR人群等位基因频率为0.01044（8/766），ExAC数据库FIN人群等位基因频率为0.01104（50/4528），iJGVD数据库无记录；COSMIC数据库记录15次ATRX蛋白第1860位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型S记录15次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: ATRX是转录调节剂，属于SWI/SNF染色质重塑蛋白家族，在DNA修复和端粒长度中起作用。在包括神经胶质瘤（PMID: 23249563, PMID: 26936505）在内的多种肿瘤类型中，已经鉴定出ATRX缺失突变和点突变，并且在胰腺神经内分泌肿瘤（PMID: 30081149）和卵巢室管膜瘤（PMID: 29944970）中也发现了ATRX拷贝数缺失突变。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 1860th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Asparagine to Serine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.02041(14/686) in the AMI population of the gnomADg database, 0.01137(220/19345) in the ASJ population of the gnomADe database, 0.01044(8/766) in the EUR population of the 1000G database, 0.01104(50/4528) in the FIN population of the ExAC database, respectively, with no record in the iJGVD database; the COSMIC database records 19 times of amino acid change at the ATRX protein position 1860, of which the mutant N1860S is recorded 19 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.02041(14/686) in the AMI population of the gnomADg database, 0.01137(220/19345) in the ASJ population of the gnomADe database, 0.01044(8/766) in the EUR population of the 1000G database, 0.01104(50/4528) in the FIN population of the ExAC database, respectively, with no record in the iJGVD database; the COSMIC database records 19 times of amino acid change at the ATRX protein position 1860, of which the mutant N1860S is recorded 19 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在gnomADg数据库AMI人群等位基因频率为0.02041（14/686），gnomADe数据库ASJ人群等位基因频率为0.01137（220/19345），1000G数据库EUR人群等位基因频率为0.01044（8/766），ExAC数据库FIN人群等位基因频率为0.01104（50/4528），iJGVD数据库无记录；COSMIC数据库记录15次ATRX蛋白第1860位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型S记录15次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第1822位氨基酸由天冬酰胺突变为丝氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: ATRX, transcriptional regulator ATRX, is in the SWI/SNF family of chromatin remodeling proteins and plays a role in DNA repair and telomere length. ATRX loss and mutations have been identified in a high percentage of tumor types including glioma (PMID: 23249563; PMID: 26936505) and copy number loss has also been observed in pancreatic neuroendocrine tumors (PMID: 30081149) and ovarian ependymomas (PMID: 29944970).

msi.variant_desc_en: Microsatellite, also known as simple repeat sequence (SSR), refers to the short tandem repeat sequences throughout the human genome, generally composed of 1-6 nucleotides. During DNA replication, Microsatellite Instability (MSI) is defined as the change in microsatellite length caused by the insertion or deletion of repeat units in tumor cells. Numerous studies have shown that MSI is caused by mismatch repair (MMR) gene mutations or functional defects (PMID: 25701956). MSI has been found in a variety of cancers, including endometrial cancer, colorectal cancer, and gastric adenocarcinoma. MSI has been reported in 10%-15% of sporadic colorectal cancer patients (PMID: 15528785), and the NCCN guidelines clearly recommend that all patients with colorectal cancer should be considered for MSI or MMR testing. MSI has also been regarded as an important molecular marker for the prognosis and adjuvant treatment of colorectal cancer and other solid tumors.
msi.variant_desc_cn: 微卫星（Microsatellite）又称简单重复序列（SSR），是指遍布于人类基因组中的短串联重复序列，一般由1-6个核苷酸组成。DNA复制时，肿瘤细胞内的微卫星由于重复单位的插入或缺失而造成的微卫星长度的变化，称为微卫星不稳定性（Microsatellite Instability, MSI）。大量研究表明，MSI是由错配修复（mismatch repair，MMR）基因突变或功能缺陷引起的（PMID: 25701956）。MSI在多种癌种中被发现，包括子宫内膜癌、结直肠癌和胃腺癌等。据报道，10%-15%的散发性结直肠癌患者存在MSI（PMID: 15528785），NCCN指南明确推荐所有结直肠癌患者均需考虑做MSI或MMR检测。临床上也已将MSI作为结直肠癌及其他实体瘤预后和制定辅助治疗方案的重要分子标志物。

evi_sum.regimen_name: 纳武利尤单抗+伊匹木单抗
evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 胰腺腺癌NCCN指南（2023.v2）推荐Nivolumab+ipilimumab用于TMB-H（≥10 mut/Mb）的局部晚期/转移性胰腺腺癌患者的后续治疗以及疾病复发后的治疗。

evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_cn: FDA已批准帕博利珠单抗（pembrolizumab）单药用于不可切除或转移性的高肿瘤突变负荷(TMB-H)[≥10mut/Mb]的成人和儿童实体瘤，这些患者经既往治疗后进展，且没有令人满意的替代治疗方案。
evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项多中心、非随机、开放标签试验中(KEYNOTE-158; NCT02628067)，对10个队列中具有高肿瘤突变负担(TMB-H)的实体瘤患者进行前瞻性计划的回顾性分析，以研究帕博利珠单抗在TMB-H实体瘤患者中的疗效。患者每3周静脉注射200 mg帕博利珠单抗，主要疗效指标为BIRC根据 RECIST v1.1评估的ORR和DoR。790例可评估的患者中，102例（13％）是TMB-H（TMB≥10mut/Mb）患者。研究结果显示，中位随访时间11.1个月，客观缓解率(ORR）达29%，中位缓解时间未达到，缓解持续时间≥12个月的患者占 57％，缓解持续时间≥24个月的患者占 50％。基于以上研究，FDA批准帕博利珠单抗（pembrolizumab）单药用于不可切除或转移性的高肿瘤突变负荷(TMB-H)[≥10mut/Mb]的成人和儿童实体瘤（既往治疗后疾病进展且没有更佳替代疗法）。

evi_sum.regimen_name: 贝伐珠单抗+阿替利珠单抗
evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项多中心、单臂、开放标签、II期非随机对照试验（NCT03836066, PMID: 36520426），纳入18岁或以上IIIB-IV期非鳞NSCLC患者，高TMB（TMB≥10mut/Mb）且无EGFR、ALK、STK11、MDM2或ROS1变异，旨在评估阿替利珠单抗联合贝伐珠单抗治疗高TMB晚期非鳞NSCLC的疗效和安全性。参与者在每个21天周期的第1天给予阿替利珠单抗（1200 mg）联合贝伐单抗（15 mg/kg）治疗，直至出现疾病进展或不可耐受毒性或死亡等。主要疗效终点为12个月无进展生存(PFS)率。研究结果显示，在38例可评估患者中，12个月的PFS率为51.3%，12个月OS率为72.0%。中位PFS为13.0个月，中位OS未达到。16例（42.1%）达到客观缓解，30例（78.9%）达到疾病控制。中位缓解时间为2.8个月，中位缓解持续时间为11.7个月。安全性方面，不良事件多为1级或2级。PD-L1水平与反应、PFS或OS无关。研究结论：阿替利珠单抗联合贝伐珠单抗是治疗高TMB非鳞NSCLC的一种潜在疗法。

evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_cn: NMPA批准西妥昔单抗β与FOLFIRI方案联合用于一线治疗RAS/BRAF基因野生型的转移性结直肠癌。
evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项开放、随机对照、多中心、前瞻性Ⅲ期临床研究（CTR20170701），分析了505例RAS/BRAF基因野生型、转移性结直肠癌受试者。临床数据显示，西妥昔单抗β联合FOLFIRI化疗方案，与单用FOLFIRI化疗相比显著延长患者的无进展生存期（PFS, 13.133个月 vs. 9.567个月, P=0.004），提升客观缓解率（ORR，69.1% vs. 42.3%, P<0.001)，且延长了总生存期（OS，2.322年 vs. 1.900年, P=0.024）。基于上述研究，NMPA批准西妥昔单抗β与FOLFIRI方案联合用于一线治疗RAS/BRAF基因野生型的转移性结直肠癌。

CSCO结直肠癌指南（2022）中，对RAS和BRAF均野生型的初始不可切除转移性结肠癌患者，如适合强烈治疗，推荐的治疗方案中包括西妥昔单抗联合不同的化疗（FOLFOX、FOLFIRI等）、贝伐珠单抗联合不同的化疗（FOLFOX、CAPEOX、FOLFIRI、FOLFOXIRI等），其中针对原发灶位于左侧结直肠和右侧结直肠的，上述治疗方案的推荐级别不同。如不适合强烈治疗且MSS或MSI-L/pMMR，推荐的治疗方案包括氟尿嘧啶类单药±贝伐珠单抗、西妥昔单抗单药（左半结直肠）、减量的两药化疗±西妥昔单抗/贝伐珠单抗等。根据一线接受的治疗方案的不同，二线治疗推荐的治疗方案中包括选择不同的化疗方案±西妥昔单抗/贝伐珠单抗。对MSS或MSI-L/pMMR患者，三线治疗推荐的治疗方案中还包括瑞戈非尼、呋喹替尼等。对于原发灶可切除（≤中度复发风险）、转移瘤不可切除的同时性转移性直肠癌的治疗原则同上所述。

CSCO结直肠癌指南（2022）中，对RAS和BRAF均野生型的初始不可切除转移性结肠癌患者，如适合强烈治疗，推荐的治疗方案中包括西妥昔单抗联合不同的化疗（FOLFOX、FOLFIRI等）、贝伐珠单抗联合不同的化疗（FOLFOX、CAPEOX、FOLFIRI、FOLFOXIRI等），其中针对原发灶位于左侧结直肠和右侧结直肠的，上述治疗方案的推荐级别不同。如不适合强烈治疗且MSS或MSI-L/pMMR，推荐的治疗方案包括氟尿嘧啶类单药±贝伐珠单抗、西妥昔单抗单药（左半结直肠）、减量的两药化疗±西妥昔单抗/贝伐珠单抗等。根据一线接受的治疗方案的不同，二线治疗推荐的治疗方案中包括选择不同的化疗方案±西妥昔单抗/贝伐珠单抗。对MSS或MSI-L/pMMR患者，三线治疗推荐的治疗方案中还包括瑞戈非尼、呋喹替尼等。对于原发灶可切除（≤中度复发风险）、转移瘤不可切除的同时性转移性直肠癌的治疗原则同上所述。

NCCN结直肠癌指南中认为，所有转移性结直肠癌患者均应进行RAS基因（KRAS和NRAS）及BRAF基因突变检测；并指出，KRAS、NRAS基因突变（2/3/4号外显子中）的结直肠癌患者不能用西妥昔单抗或帕尼单抗进行治疗；而BRAF V600E突变的患者除非同时使用BRAF抑制剂，否则极有可能对西妥昔单抗和帕尼单抗无反应。对于KRAS/NRAS/BRAF基因突变为阴性的直肠癌、左半结肠癌患者，可根据疾病分期和转移状态，使用西妥昔单抗/帕尼单抗联合不同的化疗药物进行治疗。

CSCO结直肠癌指南（2022）中，对RAS和BRAF均野生型的初始不可切除转移性结肠癌患者，如适合强烈治疗，推荐的治疗方案中包括西妥昔单抗联合不同的化疗（FOLFOX、FOLFIRI等）、贝伐珠单抗联合不同的化疗（FOLFOX、CAPEOX、FOLFIRI、FOLFOXIRI等），其中针对原发灶位于左侧结直肠和右侧结直肠的，上述治疗方案的推荐级别不同。如不适合强烈治疗且MSS或MSI-L/pMMR，推荐的治疗方案包括氟尿嘧啶类单药±贝伐珠单抗、西妥昔单抗单药（左半结直肠）、减量的两药化疗±西妥昔单抗/贝伐珠单抗等。根据一线接受的治疗方案的不同，二线治疗推荐的治疗方案中包括选择不同的化疗方案±西妥昔单抗/贝伐珠单抗。对MSS或MSI-L/pMMR患者，三线治疗推荐的治疗方案中还包括瑞戈非尼、呋喹替尼等。对于原发灶可切除（≤中度复发风险）、转移瘤不可切除的同时性转移性直肠癌的治疗原则同上所述。

CSCO结直肠癌指南（2022）中，对RAS和BRAF均野生型的初始不可切除转移性结肠癌患者，如适合强烈治疗，推荐的治疗方案中包括西妥昔单抗联合不同的化疗（FOLFOX、FOLFIRI等）、贝伐珠单抗联合不同的化疗（FOLFOX、CAPEOX、FOLFIRI、FOLFOXIRI等），其中针对原发灶位于左侧结直肠和右侧结直肠的，上述治疗方案的推荐级别不同。如不适合强烈治疗且MSS或MSI-L/pMMR，推荐的治疗方案包括氟尿嘧啶类单药±贝伐珠单抗、西妥昔单抗单药（左半结直肠）、减量的两药化疗±西妥昔单抗/贝伐珠单抗等。根据一线接受的治疗方案的不同，二线治疗推荐的治疗方案中包括选择不同的化疗方案±西妥昔单抗/贝伐珠单抗。对MSS或MSI-L/pMMR患者，三线治疗推荐的治疗方案中还包括瑞戈非尼、呋喹替尼等。对于原发灶可切除（≤中度复发风险）、转移瘤不可切除的同时性转移性直肠癌的治疗原则同上所述。

drug.drug_mechanism_cn:
PD-L1可以在肿瘤细胞和/或肿瘤浸润性免疫细胞上表达，并且可以在肿瘤微环境中有助于抑制抗肿瘤免疫反应。PD-L1与T细胞和抗原呈递细胞上的PD-1和B7.1受体结合，抑制细胞毒性T细胞活性、T细胞增殖和细胞因子的产生。
Atezolizumab是与PD-L1结合并阻断其与PD-1和B7.1受体相互作用的单克隆抗体。这释放了PD-L1 / PD-1介导的免疫反应抑制作用，包括抗肿瘤免疫反应的激活，而不会引起抗体依赖性细胞毒性。在同系小鼠肿瘤模型中，阻断PD-L1活性可导致肿瘤生长减少。
在癌症的小鼠模型中，与单独的靶向治疗相比，PD-1 / PD-L1和MAPK途径的双重抑制可通过增加抗原呈递，T细胞浸润和激活来抑制肿瘤生长并提高肿瘤免疫原性。
adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准阿替利珠单抗+考比替尼+维莫非尼用于治疗BRAF V600突变不可切除或转移性黑色素瘤患者。
FDA批准贝伐珠单抗联合阿替利珠单抗用于疗既往未接受全身治疗的不可切除或转移性HCC患者。
NMPA批准贝伐珠单抗联合阿替利珠单抗治疗既往未接受过全身系统性治疗的不可切除肝细胞癌患者。

drug.drug_mechanism_cn: Pazopanib（帕唑帕尼）是一种多酪氨酸激酶抑制剂，包括血管内皮生长因子受体（VEGFR）-1，VEGFR-2，VEGFR-3，血小板衍生生长因子受体（PDGFR）-α和-β，成纤维细胞生长因子受体（FGFR） -1和-3，细胞因子受体（Kit），白介素2受体诱导的T细胞激酶（Itk），淋巴细胞特异性蛋白酪氨酸激酶（Lck）和跨膜糖蛋白受体酪氨酸激酶（c-Fms）。 在体外，Pazopanib抑制配体诱导的VEGFR-2，Kit和PDGFR-β受体的自磷酸化。 在体内，Pazopanib抑制小鼠肺中VEGF诱导的VEGFR-2磷酸化，小鼠模型中的血管生成以及小鼠中某些人肿瘤异种移植物的生长。
阿扎胞苷为胞苷的嘧啶核苷类似物，具有抗肿瘤活性。 阿扎胞苷被掺入 DNA 中，它可逆地抑制 DNA 甲基转移酶，从而阻断 DNA 甲基化。 阿扎胞苷对 DNA 的低甲基化可能会激活因高甲基化而沉默的肿瘤抑制基因，从而产生抗肿瘤作用。 该试剂还掺入 RNA，从而破坏正常的 RNA 功能并削弱 tRNA 胞嘧啶-5-甲基转移酶活性。
adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准艾伏尼布联合阿扎胞苷用于IDH1突变，新诊断≥75岁或因并发症无法使用强烈诱导化疗AML患者的治疗。

drug.drug_mechanism_cn: Niraparib（尼拉帕利）是聚（ADP-核糖）聚合酶（PARP）酶PARP-1和PARP-2的抑制剂，它们在DNA修复中起作用。 体外研究表明，Niraparib诱导的细胞毒性可能涉及抑制PARP酶活性和增加PARP-DNA复合物的形成，从而导致DNA损伤，细胞凋亡和细胞死亡。 在具有或不具有BRCA1 / 2缺陷的肿瘤细胞系中观察到了Niraparib诱导的细胞毒性增加。 在具有BRCA1 / 2缺陷的人类癌细胞系的小鼠异种移植模型中，以及在具有突变或野生型BRCA1 / 2的同源重组缺陷的人类患者源性异种移植肿瘤模型中，Niraparib降低了肿瘤的生长。
adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准尼拉帕利用于经3线及以上化疗的、HRD阳性（携带BRCA基因的致病或疑似致病性突变或基因组存在不稳定性并在对最后一次铂类化疗反应后6个月以上出现疾病进展）的晚期卵巢癌、输卵管癌及原发性腹膜癌成人患者的治疗。
FDA批准尼拉帕利用于经含铂化疗后达到完全缓解或部分缓解的复发性上皮性卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌成人患者的维持治疗。
FDA批准尼拉帕利用于一线含铂化疗后达到完全缓解或部分缓解的晚期上皮性卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌成人患者的维持治疗。

NMPA批准尼拉帕利用于晚期上皮性卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌成人患者对一线含铂化疗达到完全缓解或部分缓解后的维持治疗。
NMPA批准尼拉帕利用于铂敏感的复发性上皮性卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌成人患者在含铂化疗达到完全缓解或部分缓解后的维持治疗。
FDA批准尼拉帕利用于经含铂化疗后达到完全缓解或部分缓解的、携带有害或疑似有害胚系BRCA突变的复发性上皮性卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌的成年患者的维持治疗。
adaptation_disease_en:
